Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Friend,Over this past election cycle, we made SO much progress. Just take a look at what our team has accomplished together:

These victories aren't just scattered wins on a map — they're proof that our efforts are working. They're wins for our values and the future we're building together. And we can only thank you, friend, for your support.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for keeping up the good fight! And if you can, feel free to pitch in to keep the momentum going as we prepare for the road ahead. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2024-FR-December?refcode=E11599-20241209-YourImpact-SL-2024Race&&&&amount=25]

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/moms-horrifying-response-to-trans?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Daily Wire reporter Mary Margaret Olohan asked the _**[mom of a transgender son](https://substack.com/redirect/5754b2d0-9d33-4358-9125-1830e04c7dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ what if they regretted permanent gender transitioning one day.
Her response will HAUNT you...
_**[Watch below:](https://substack.com/redirect/5754b2d0-9d33-4358-9125-1830e04c7dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5754b2d0-9d33-4358-9125-1830e04c7dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"A lot of people think that children shouldn't be able to (transition) until they're 18 given a lot of these procedures are irreversible," Olohan told the mom, who was there supporting the right for minors to access gender surgeries.
She was one of many who arrived at SCOTUS last week as justices considered a Tennessee law banning the use of puberty blockers and hormone therapy on minors.
"Hormone therapy isn't really irreversible," the mom claimed. "His voice would remain deeper, but otherwise it would be reversible."
"What if he's like 'I don't have breast, I can't breastfeed my children. I realized I'm actually a woman and now I can't breastfeed my kids.'?" Olohan asked.
The mom's response is unbelievable: "I bottle-fed and breastfed,... That's kinda the least of my worries"
Watch the rest of the shocking interview:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5754b2d0-9d33-4358-9125-1830e04c7dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
| | POLL

_Six months is a long time, Patriot. _

Six months ago, Joe Biden was still the presumptive Democratic nominee for President.

And, six months from now, Donald Trump will be well into his second term as President.

**_The bottom line:_ Before the Left gets a six-month head start on fundraising, our team needs your help to raise as much as we can before it's too late. **

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: The Hypocrisy Is Off the Charts
body:
Peter, You’ve got to be kidding me. The Biden-Harris crew is trying to justify pardoning Hunter Biden with some garbage about “war politics.” Meanwhile, they’ve weaponized the DOJ to go after President Trump at every turn. HELP ME FIGHT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=The+Hypocrisy+Is+Off+The+Charts+Email]

Here on Long Island, we call that what it is: rank hypocrisy. While the powerful protect their own, hardworking families like ours are stuck watching them bend the rules and dodge accountability. They want us to look the other way, but we’re not falling for it.

You know my record—I’ve spent my life standing up to nonsense like this, whether as an NYPD detective or serving our community. I will never stop fighting for what’s right.

But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help keep the pressure on? [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=The+Hypocrisy+Is+Off+The+Charts+Email]

This administration is shameless. They weaponize the DOJ to go after their political opponents while protecting their own family from justice. If we let them get away with this, it’s open season on fairness and accountability.

Long Islanders will not sit on the sidelines—we fight back. Let’s show them we’re here and not going anywhere.

Thanks for always having my back,

Anthony

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I’m as cold as ice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Ac9/?__vbtrk=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Ac9/?__vbtrk=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
I’m as _**cold as ice**_ with the Fake News.
You have to be when they’re trying to destroy the MAGA Movement on national television.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
There’s nothing that grinds my gears more right now than seeing talking heads at CNN, CBS, and MSNBC LIE to their viewers.
So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight one-on-one?
That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressmen to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself.
**But the lies I’ve had to dismantle these past few weeks have me worried.**
They’ve demanded to know if I thought President Trump was too dangerous to be President again, going so far as to question the will of 57% of the American people, even hinting that Trump wasn’t qualified to be President.
I’ve been cold, hard, and collected with these partisan activists, picking apart their outrageous lies one by one, show after show.
The problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense against you, me, and President Trump every single day, and if I can’t continue to challenge them, their lies could seriously get out of hand.
I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight.
_**[So please, can you chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Ac9/?__vbtrk=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ _**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Aca/?__vbtrk=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Aca/?__vbtrk=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

|

|

Thank you and God Bless,
Byron Donalds _**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Aca/?__vbtrk=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Aca/?__vbtrk=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MzE1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight. | | Thank you and God Bless, Byron Donalds | | | | | | | Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress 138 Conant Street Beverly, MA 01985 | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friend, It’s been a little over one week since we were able to flip CA-45 from red-to-blue, but we’re ready to hit the ground running. I look forward to representing that optimism and working tirelessly to ensure that our communities’ voices are heard in Washington. = Let’s get to work! name: Adam Schiff
subject: My oath of office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8213%2E5257348%2E9xR2RZ)
Derek — I was just sworn in as a United States Senator.
I am so grateful for this opportunity to serve the great state of California and the entire country.
Filling the seat held by Senator Dianne Feinstein — who was not only a mentor and a hero for Californians, but a dear friend to me — is an enormous responsibility. I have big shoes to fill, and I will work tirelessly to deliver for Californians, just as she did for more than 30 years.
I take the oath of office incredibly seriously. With this position, I have the chance to pass vital legislation that will impact generations to come.
And we have no shortage of challenges ahead. Lowering costs of groceries and childcare. Increasing the amount of affordable housing. Addressing the climate crisis. Releasing young Americans from the burdens of crippling student loan debt. Keeping our communities safe from gun violence. The list goes on.
I promise to work day in and day out to deliver for Californians. In every community, in every part of the state, whether people voted for me or they didn’t.
I will work with colleagues — Democrats, Republicans, and Independents — to secure the changes our country desperately needs and deserves. And I will _always_ stand up for our democracy and the rule of law, no matter who threatens them.
I take this responsibility very seriously, and I cannot thank you enough for your continued support, Derek.
I would not be in this position without you. Your commitment to our movement and cause, your grassroots support, your kind words, and your volunteer shifts all made a difference in our race.
I’m excited and motivated by the challenges ahead because I know we will face them together.
Thank you, Derek.
— Adam

name: Wes Moore
subject: What we’re fighting for
body:
Friend,

When I was elected to office, my goal has always been to be the best public servant that I can be. To govern with humility and grace.

Governing means showing up and putting in the work. It means working in partnership regardless of political party. If we’re going to create policies that benefit everyone, we have to earn support from everyone, not just Democrats.

That’s how our campaign won with the most individual votes in the history of Maryland, and it’s how we’ve managed to pass all 26 of our bills over the last two legislative sessions with bipartisan support.

As we prepare for January’s session to gavel in, here’s where I’m focusing our energy: * Making housing more affordable

* Making our communities safer for all
* Growing our economy so everyone can have a good-paying job
* Expanding reproductive rights
* Investing in education, and so much more.

Our work for a better Maryland that leads the way for the whole country is more critical than ever. That’s why today, I’m asking for your support. The upcoming statewide political fundraising freeze is around the corner, and I want to make sure my team and I are prepared for the fights ahead. Please add in a donation today so we can make sure we’re in a good spot before the freeze begins in January. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241209-1?refcode=em20241209-1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Elevate,

Wes

name: Bryan
subject: December 9 Campaign Update
body:
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|*

logo

Here’s an update from our campaign:

** ICYMI: WI’s 1st District is Hard At Work!
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.wisconsinrightnow.com/milwaukee-county-delivered-most-net-votes-for-trump-dane-county-least/#google_vignette

Our hard work is getting results. In its analysis of November’s election, Wisconsin Right Now (https://www.wisconsinrightnow.com/milwaukee-county-delivered-most-net-votes-for-trump-dane-county-least/#google_vignette) found that President Trump gained votes in every Wisconsin county, while Vice President Kamala Harris lost support in 25 counties.

That growth was especially strong in Wisconsin’s 1st District. ALL 5 of the 1st District counties are in the top 10, with Milwaukee, Rock, and Kenosha taking the top 3 spots! Thank you for all of your hard work.

I want to give a shout out to our County Party Chairs and all the volunteers who helped make this possible:

Milwaukee- Hilario Deleon

Rock- Andreina Patilliet

Kenosha- Sandy Wiedmeyer

Walworth- Chris Goebel

Racine- Andrew Docksey

** Michael Whatley continues as RNC Chair under President Trump
------------------------------------------------------------
Bryan Steil with RNC Chair Michael Whatley and President Trump's nominee for Attorney General Pam Bondi

Chairman Whatley has been instrumental in promoting election integrity, protecting the vote, and getting President Trump and Republicans elected. The RNC is well served by Michael Whatley continuing as Chairman. I look forward to continuing to work with Chairman Whatley and his team to get Republicans elected.

Read his statement on X here (https://x.com/ChairmanWhatley/status/1864347480566923312) .

** Rodney Scott to lead U.S. Customs and Border Patrol under President Trump
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.foxnews.com/politics/trump-continues-fill-his-cabinet-naming-3-ambitious-nominees-top-homeland-security-immigration

Last year, I held a town hall in Kenosha about border security. We discussed the importance of securing our border to stop the drug and human trafficking crisis we have all seen in the last four years. We invited former Chief of the United States Border Patrol Rodney Scott to give important insight and information about the Biden Administration’s failed border policies.

I am excited that Rodney will return as Chief of the U.S. Border Patrol under President Trump. He is the right man for the job. Check out the article here (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/trump-continues-fill-his-cabinet-naming-3-ambitious-nominees-top-homeland-security-immigration) .

On Wisconsin,

Bryan Steil

View email in browser (https://mailchi.mp/cddcdba9a42b/december-9-campaign-update?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. . 1818 Milton Ave # 1448 . Janesville, WI 53545-1129 . USA
update your preferences (https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=e739147c02) or unsubscribe (https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=e739147c02)

body:

| Friend, we sent you this time-sensitive poll to gauge public support for the **No Kings Act** , and we’re still waiting for your response.

We’re confused... **Do you support Trump effectively becoming a King, or _was this a mistake?_**

We need 12,242 more responses for conclusive data — please, correct the record immediately: **[Do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241209_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=6&akid=18172%2E878179%2ETz7Kcz)** | [YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241209_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=7&akid=18172%2E878179%2ETz7Kcz)

Thank you SO much for your long awaited response,

_— The Voter Protection Project_

TO: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
SUBJECT: 🚫 No King Trump!
**❗ BREAKING NEWS ❗**
**"No Kings Act": Chuck Schumer says he will introduce a bill to try and reverse the Supreme Court’s immunity decision.**

**[Friend, do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241209_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=10&akid=18172%2E878179%2ETz7Kcz)**

*** 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT ***
* * *
Look, every day more and more Democrats call on Congress to pass the **No Kings Act** and __REVERSE__ the Supreme Court’s immunity decision...

But unless we - the PEOPLE - mount MAJOR pressure on Congress to take action, we’ll _lose our chance_ to put a check on Trump’s power.

**_That’s why we NEED to know where you stand:_**

**[Do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241209_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=15&akid=18172%2E878179%2ETz7Kcz)**

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: (TAKE ACTION) Tell your senators to REJECT Trump’s anti-science Energy Secretary nominee.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4ODA0NDUS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDYwMzc0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
TELL YOUR SENATORS TO REJECT TRUMP’S CLIMATE DENIER ENERGY SECRETARY NOMINEE

Donald Trump has chosen Big Oil CEO Chris Wright to be the next Secretary of
Energy. If he is confirmed by the Senate, it would put a climate change denier
in charge of the country’s energy policy.

We can’t let that happen without a fight.Trump’s most extreme nominees are already facing headwinds in the Senate — we
need your help to call on senators to REJECT Chris Wright.

We’ve set a goal to deliver 8,000 petition signatures this week. Please take action right now to help us reach our goal >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ TAKE ACTION NOW https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_ Peter — Last month, Trump announced he’ll nominate a climate change
denier and Big Oil executive to lead the U.S. Department of Energy. Chris Wright, the CEO of fracking company Liberty Energy, has said that “there is no climate crisis”and denies the scientific consensus that climate-fueled natural disasters are
becoming more frequent. We have a chance to make Wright’s confirmation a real fight if we act quickly.
Many senators aren’t aware of his most extreme views. We need to change that — help us urge the Senate to block science-denying Chris Wright from leading the
Department of Energy. Take action right now: tell your senators to REJECT Chris Wright’s nomination and keep climate change deniers from leading key federal agencies. body:

To me, and you, I know the millions of dollars it will cost to defend our rights and the future of our families is worth it.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.
---
_Not_ the Lefts Lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---

---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=101df70c3b264cc492236215effa606c&_e=1Q5qo8H0FfMROEvHkf_Z0HdXOEhi_aCxOmqD-CKQU4DoplqJBUft9M3Qme8RCn7AMGe1-PGDaQg-4byBb7SY2g0WCH8FR-syql_6IT4Nr0rHFxHXpLbEOG-8zAQJP0-WfZ8XoFJbryq5fUJJxuKZKviwmRq9zRVqVbDbhWkA5t49vIhBrjPi-XQMICfv0Z4X7jssf2HgeZaTMzCDtcRVE57-rzGXUZIkNM4ZL38FD900bqmKFRSK-Wzq_bnYfYrhJkNbWrGGb2Ty8b9jmS2KJUY3gJ2GmpRQiASoG3_dAX_ECF7pweJ3uyiLFBJZbGS9cKGkBn22dTgGYzlDt8CqgxZ5wRJYqLLeAuRhTB8jQkvX2XiU0inZxLqykIp36z9FkhxNCe1xqCdG48irEwvbFdcOafgGhd7FDDOPiHWJYzs%3D)

Derek —

Join the **Young Democrats of America** for an exciting and informative training session hosted by **ActBlue**!

This training is designed to help you supercharge your digital fundraising efforts. Whether you’re just starting out or looking to take your fundraising to the next level, this is the perfect opportunity to learn from the experts.

📅 **Date:** Thursday, December 12, 2024
⏰ **Time:** 6:00 PM – 7:00 PM EST
📍 **Zoom Link:** [Join Here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwobza3YIYu8JmyH4VyZvbmf3DEKFLqJ17kJAM6S9fkogfNEiS4bB3Vg5JaZP2-Wemdpzpedes__RcELJvM4zNeH4EbaYBTPIg89C16i6lgAOxURkhmRzo1hto10oJOvuTBqF7CsFIQq8LnL7rMyZR_zlDImlpMHbp4U-eNUHOgjv2HWGTn5PMmaUst0Mtsxoy6BjOkPKhvuioiDfUxxAooj69jAqEevOqsbETqO3v7LYtSoJia94mF2L7DAVzRteEIPUEihTZV2Fc3nt-tDKB6fgjVP1749RebK1SKe1qWTfbjvYVzgtFgghwTYZJqy3l7Glu_IghOY_fQRidnTxRHiufT1henHB1Yq1ak_TlRw9EPB3bfbAhDVJXM4_Kf5ujUA/4c6/AIgcIlmCT7aUfXlnFdECCg/h1/h001.oVWKtCsqKyvUh9rIMkaabOF4cBpdwovvtRo1ErzKSP0)

Digital fundraising can sometimes feel overwhelming, but with ActBlue's guidance, we’ll tackle your toughest challenges together. Are you wondering where to start? Do you need support refining your current strategy?

We’ll have experts ready to answer your questions and offer practical tips to make your digital fundraising efforts successful. All YDA members are highly encouraged to participate in this training. Share widely and bring your fellow Young Democrats!

Don’t miss this chance to gain invaluable tools to help fuel your campaigns and initiatives. Please mark your calendars and join us for this incredible opportunity!

Best regards,

Quentin Wathum-Ocama
President, Young Democrats of America

name: Kerry McQuisten (Newsletter)
subject: November was YUGE!
body:
| | | | |
# What a month November was!
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| _The exact moment in West Palm Beach when we knew with 100% certainty that Kamala Harris had no path to victory and President Trump had won!_
---
| _See?!_ I told you we were winning in my last newsletter! November 5th couldn't have gone any better - at least nationally. America now has a four-year reprieve from the path to socialism/communism, and the Democrats are in shambles.
Solomon and I headed to President Trump's watch party in Florida last month, and celebrated with a few hundred like-minded conservatives when the news came out that President Trump had won. We were awake nearly two days straight by the time we got back to Oregon since we took the redeye on the way over, and President Trump didn't take the stage until the wee hours of the morning Eastern time. We were there when he announced his run, and we were there for the win. What an amazing experience this election cycle has been!
Oregon didn't fare so well, unfortunately. In fact, our state was an epic election-night failure - also as predicted. We lost one of our two Republican-held congressional seats. We lost every statewide race by huge margins. We became a superminority in the state house and senate. Democrats are now poised to shove through billions of dollars in new taxes. We can't stop them immediately, but we can if we focus a couple years out. Our plan? See the Oregon Conservative Caucus (OCC) section below. You can help save our state for just a few dollars and a few hours of volunteer time per month. Doing the same thing again and again and expecting different results IS insanity. OCC is doing something different!
We did take a couple weeks off after the election for a family vacation, thus the delay in this newsletter. I'm looking forward to Christmas and New Years. January will be busy again - looks like we'll be in DC for a week of back-to-back meetings for a number of reasons, so I'll have an interesting update at the end of that month!

---
---
_More from the West Palm celebration including fabulous NFRW President Julie Harris and the NFRW ladies, David Bossie, Corey Lewandowski, Dr. Ben Carson, fmr. Speaker Newt Gingrich, and President Trump and family taking the stage._
---
| |
---
---
**The Oregon Conservative Caucus!**
---
| Let's turn back to the Oregon Conservative Caucus for a minute. We're over 100 members strong already, with members in 2/3 of Oregon's counties. We're working on recruiting our second group of 100 members now! Our members are the foundation for flipping Oregon red. With that foundation in place, we'll soon be crafting policy statements, focusing on fundraising and registering Republicans in key targeted areas. Our monthly OCC Insider Zoom members-only calls are in full swing, and we've started planning our first annual meeting and awards ceremony next spring. We have an amazing group going. And did I mention... no infighting or drama?!
Link: [Oregon Conservative Caucus | Nonprofit](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/wfFgBAHqI5M-aHi7D_F9GA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRpOjPkP0UgMTA2Yjc1NDIwNWJhNWYzNjM3OTY2MzE0NzQ0YzI0NTREKWh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lm9yZWdvbmNvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZWNhdWN1cy5jb20vVwVzcGNldUIKZ1Xkrldnca86pVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAX2M~)
---
|
---
**Recent Newsletters**
* [ _Election Homestretch - Winning!_](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/E1a77eC84UkxQM5PWz7Hyw~~/AAAHUQA~~~)
* [_My View from Inside Trump's Election Game-Changer_](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/pISDaCQQeuPNGDv1PWSj_g~~/AAAHUQA~~~)
* [ _President Trump's New Policy Announcement with us at Republicans Overseas_](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/hnc4drly5GZb8qnI1gOElA~~/AAAHUQA~~~)
* [ _With JD Vance and RFK Jr. in CA_](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/KQJFvQNZ2H-qoCXOLEp_tQ~~/AAAHUQA~~~)
* [ _CCP Election Cyber-Interference_](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/EQ2lFytCTwQsgG6-IIVPuQ~~/AAAHUQA~~~)
* _At the _[_RNC Convention, Oregon Wildfire_](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/7RmRvRQ6f6zQlWHQgTyz9w~~/AAAHUQA~~~) _s_
* [ _With President Trump_](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/5iFbqHEshWHRNo_PlHrj-g~~/AAAHUQA~~~) _ Again_
* [ _From Cows to Coconuts_](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/4N0hgXDrnI4tki2zdDIw_A~~/AAAHUQA~~~)
* [ _Successful Baker County Republican Women's Event_](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/OByHgtIuJL1Nht9mHYXbBg~~/AAAHUQA~~~)

clean_body: | | | | | What a month November was! | | | | | | | | | The exact moment in West Palm Beach when we knew with 100% certainty that Kamala Harris had no path to victory and President Trump had won! | See?! I told you we were winning in my last newsletter! November 5th couldn't have gone any better - at least nationally. America now has a four-year reprieve from the path to socialism/communism, and the Democrats are in shambles. Solomon and I headed to President Trump's watch party in Florida last month, and celebrated with a few hundred like-minded conservatives when the news came out that President Trump had won. We were awake nearly two days straight by the time we got back to Oregon since we took the redeye on the way over, and President Trump didn't take the stage until the wee hours of the morning Eastern time. We were there when he announced his run, and we were there for the win. What an amazing experience this election cycle has been! Oregon didn't fare so well, unfortunately. In fact, our state was an epic election-night failure - also as predicted. We lost one of our two Republican-held congressional seats. We lost every statewide race by huge margins. We became a superminority in the state house and senate. Democrats are now poised to shove through billions of dollars in new taxes. We can't stop them immediately, but we can if we focus a couple years out. Our plan? See the Oregon Conservative Caucus (OCC) section below. You can help save our state for just a few dollars and a few hours of volunteer time per month. Doing the same thing again and again and expecting different results IS insanity. OCC is doing something different! We did take a couple weeks off after the election for a family vacation, thus the delay in this newsletter. I'm looking forward to Christmas and New Years. January will be busy again - looks like we'll be in DC for a week of back-to-back meetings for a number of reasons, so I'll have an interesting update at the end of that month! More from the West Palm celebration including fabulous NFRW President Julie Harris and the NFRW ladies, David Bossie, Corey Lewandowski, Dr. Ben Carson, fmr. Speaker Newt Gingrich, and President Trump and family taking the stage. | | The Oregon Conservative Caucus! | Let's turn back to the Oregon Conservative Caucus for a minute. We're over 100 members strong already, with members in 2/3 of Oregon's counties. We're working on recruiting our second group of 100 members now! Our members are the foundation for flipping Oregon red. With that foundation in place, we'll soon be crafting policy statements, focusing on fundraising and registering Republicans in key targeted areas. Our monthly OCC Insider Zoom members-only calls are in full swing, and we've started planning our first annual meeting and awards ceremony next spring. We have an amazing group going. And did I mention... no infighting or drama?! body:

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrigsv9hunv34gtsgsd67rckcsepi2s6ms0tdcjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3h62o76c5h2bs)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."

| | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGRA_J6jtCqYTGf9TBARmggSPVbT9acGv-q3fuGkH5fpWKqqPlmD81G2Ja6cSXR_GQGr7irGGwY2TUsaA4tbOwnS_oVl-SCOjaRBBb7gBAOG9Z_D2-VrUhbjSbtGz2uvmTKXFvDLwhRYcRs4h08kxXWJQT0gOlB62TGccDlq8pISlC5ckrDO82iuwMisQ39mMui94beADkA1UB61I2MXkp29i2a-RhYII97OnEXgPENIvD9-f2bDA0C-03C_9Bv-ozITGyTXbP09sNjF9qcld0j6eabSCu_QfFCQZQ4QXqZenEhIyaVo2gT6jZ_luW4PrDWW05ppKl5tMO_Rd_9J_PHBCswyZZIt4kCEkLIMhDg9NRTPadIPiUHwLGT8ukRYE/4c6/Lm_mU5xxSlC-wk3vFMVnEQ/h0/h001.ucu-iROd-uZ8HAha6wiSFH3b8SQsLpOHQkEiRvTkpfA)

Hello,

We hope you had a great time in Boston! As you may be aware we are have the **2025 YDA Spring Meeting Application now open**! This will be the first meeting of the 2025 year and we would love to celebrate in your city.

The application is due January 10th 2025, with a goal of having the meeting in Late March-April. We would love to see your amazing city, **[you can find the application here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.RNKlYhK-gnABEpCnH88uwCGjUmiOgEr5kYJJw-_j0CX2XRrsZxRdRPoOBCSD84PmcYFQhXZjMv7gcMFBBcxE6dv_OGuZfOBVOm25mvpPV9h1DKT3_Fh_LTD22YPXs9MRNdx6tJxoVWzIcMC-Ai7k-SiSzcByLLkS0uONQNtjMYz7o7eWnPXU3NvKg_R9khzG0ECy9z9c8Z2RFtPMrZyJerDX5EJUml8C95G2D8b0A3zPOC3HxqYPgWf0lcu2fKEnzwzISCNjaYyNMpSJWJ1VDUBLYLVPipKRDgBhf3q4z3Oz-mw6awUbQtd5i8PIf1nRrEN78xxPX_A9B3ilx_ZMww/4c6/Lm_mU5xxSlC-wk3vFMVnEQ/h1/h001.HCV_6U7EZzXdT4tbdWYk-wKzJ41hcR2fJjH2eP0eiBo)**.

We also have prepared some of the following tips and tricks to assist with your bid:
* Medium to large size cities are best for travel and affordability. Emphasizing affordable locations of note for meals and entertainment, alongside the walkability of the bid site is a plus;
* Ensure there are unionized hotels in the city, if there are none that is not a deal breaker however it does make a stronger bid;
* Propose hotels for your bid that are affordable for all members of our organization;
* Please be aware that typical National Committee meetings include 100 to 150 people. Please assume roughly half as many rooms will be required for the total number of attendees. Addressing the number of meeting rooms in your bid is a strength as well we request around 5 breakout style rooms and one large reception room;
* Quotes in advance always make a strong bid. Be sure to include A/V costs in your quotes.

We are super excited to see your bids!

Best Regards,
Austin Christoffersen
| **_**The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,**[donate anything you can afford right now to YDA.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpvx43AV9gSahrX7Vza7T_RPaLyq8Fmvx7JUU3Z5JlokkqYQWbGMUEfDi-tfZKqnglUT6ndyDTOLcaJVR6mPVqY60JPv7nM-iARL6BRf1K3yA6XjjqU7Kfq76vC47j9KNgxDfKbGYvmE6w6v6DXswVdVRzFrv8bBxGL6uMnPrV0KZ1W0FwfIfaQE4jOIVUGYCdyUrn2nrWkDSJ2dgGw8VIyupnuLDJJXUzC6NbwHA_dQBxe7E9Rnc9-d9vGZRIJ8h79HGr_8dh7Qd7pJbxSZ-5LiuVCLJMwPuUjNqooJlm3qynYIHNVBeAyETDrd9H9_wMHlelIstJnBQLwUDhUaPxOFZautku7M0AIPKLp1r4pvsCW-94BEWSEh5qAH4mjKg/4c6/Lm_mU5xxSlC-wk3vFMVnEQ/h2/h001.BI54TWxn5yNGTHIiyvLaAVIFoH3M0sfpF3RH3xZfxyo)_**

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5b8avj45b0s8v0aeashp08qdvio5o9hqoeocnl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3h61ob2chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7nvlo5lbcmonq45es0c1v84s30vkp8qb5j0tpbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3h61ob2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg15g4jbrl0vj042cn2vo4gat6aicca0s9u78cv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3h61ob2chh2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
Most Americans know very little about America’s founding.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ku35j52sbjhmj7o1ndecifs236vuhe7oriuu50_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3h61ob2c1h2bs)
---

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zep993m3i9ok0e4hsjhsk0p7kkkev66jlpmqq85g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3h61ob2c1h2bs) Fellow Conservative,

Most Americans know very little about America's founding.

In today's public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we're dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That 's why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers. **

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I 'd like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage's _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/get-your-free-founders-almanac-ebook/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqfs9674266p1s0ojoa04urdmeivbunjqu61l698_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3h61ob2c1h2bs)**

Please use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and stand up for our founding principles.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkb-u3CwQxZ8Gd6xg8OJ14eLqs9x8ulGUJiViYcyia7DFn13l7SPWSZ8OnWEO53f4-ak-td98dN90wOnLJJWyiikbFfFVqK7WF6oVMOgpB8qZ4p2d7Giklh1OfBDiBjCOrHtMKKVg3DI7oEVmJFuvgvGBsfV-k2vfd35qPhw4Y7deCrjcQK7j9cphEONdS0Z6pjdM5fKFeJg9uoQ5JzzqffNGx4vZQ7dNj1KOTMQHgYXAktHUhJeXjwltu0FgaQAElnfqEyHX9MRfNDqK9NBtUyy1BBXQ-hqImDFovxGQTcx7TQaJmHcIZxlt5T0qhoj5__9-0L8kf3Sjw6G9i0TM54T1KmqVXjS6JrxTZE2fXH3_UNH56JI3D3UmPS32WDAWIua1Rpu0zz46AjI1wNTOYi6pIgGpQzn27Ivf24N9lyZ7vPy2-SwH0jPXWN5llX_80ucEvwMAAP__AvSpmA)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkb-u3CwQxZ8Gd6xg8OJ14eLqs9x8ulGUJiViYcyia7DFn13l7SPWSZ8OnWEO53f4-ak-td98dN90wOnLJJWyiikbFfFVqK7WF6oVMOgpB8qZ4p2d7Giklh1OfBDiBjCOrHtMKKVg3DI7oEVmJFuvgvGBsfV-k2vfd35qPhw4Y7deCrjcQK7j9cphEONdS0Z6pjdM5fKFeJg9uoQ5JzzqffNGx4vZQ7dNj1KOTMQHgYXAktHUhJeXjwltu0FgaQAElnfqEyHX9MRfNDqK9NBtUyy1BBXQ-hqImDFovxGQTcx7TQaJmHcIZxlt5T0qhoj5__9-0L8kf3Sjw6G9i0TM54T1KmqVXjS6JrxTZE2fXH3_UNH56JI3D3UmPS32WDAWIua1Rpu0zz46AjI1wNTOYi6pIgGpQzn27Ivf24N9lyZ7vPy2-SwH0jPXWN5llX_80ucEvwMAAP__AvSpmA)

body:

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

| | | |

# Review of 2024 Interim Session
The interim period between sessions gives us as legislators the opportunity to take a deeper dive into the issues facing our state. Through an array of study committees and commissions, we are able to collaborate with leading experts from around the state as well as our fellow legislators.

These meetings and input from our community are essential in crafting the most informed legislation as we approach our 2025 budget session.
## Interim Committee Assignments
During this interim, I had the privilege of serving on the Interim Study Committees on**Education** ; **Employment and Labor** ; **Energy, Utilities, and Telecommunications** ; **Pension Management Oversight** ; and **Roads and Transportation**.

Additionally, I served on the **Indiana Behavioral Health Commission** , **Interagency State Council on Black and Minority Health** , **Doula Reimbursement Advisory Board** , **Health Care Cost Oversight Task Force** , **Medicaid Advisory Committee** and the **Indiana White River State Park Development Commission**.
---
#
* * *
---
**Indy Energy Assistance Program** This program provides income-eligible households in Marion County with utility assistance in the winter. The program helps with heat and electricity, but not water bills.

**To apply, you will need:**

• Proof of Income
• Current utility bills or account statements
• Landlord Affidavit or current lease (for applicants with utilities in rent only)
• LSP may require additional documents based on household circumstances

The moratorium began on Dec. 1, 2024, and if your application has been approved, you cannot be disconnected from electricity and heating service.

The deadline to apply is April 14, 2025.

---

My pre-session survey allows me to hear directly from you. I work for you and our shared communities and am always wanting to hear about the issues you face and the opportunities you see in our neighborhoods.

Whether you are filling out the hard copy of this survey that came in the mail or taking it online, thank you so much for taking the time to give your input!

I’ve got something here you’re gonna want to see:

In fact, you’ll never see the world the same way again...

Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon!

In fact, these night vision binoculars are so powerful, we’ve dubbed them...

**[Claim Your 7-Level Infrared Night Vision Binoculars - 50% OFF!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19337/6374453/18a99f71d22ffbaef80625b9977688b7caf69052/5d57bbc3e13e346b70ff5c2daf1305b771c4cb94) **

Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians.

Plus they’re IP54 water resistant.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer these DarkForce binos to you at an insane 50% OFF discount...

While supplies last, I’m throwing in a free neck strap, charging cable and **free shipping!** **[Grab your Night Vision Binoculars before we run out](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19337/6374453/18a99f71d22ffbaef80625b9977688b7caf69052/5d57bbc3e13e346b70ff5c2daf1305b771c4cb94)**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The Results are in and Americans Support DOGE
body:
Tea Party Patriots Action post-election poll proves it’s time for a change in government
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** If you have not seen the Tea Party Patriots Action post-election survey yet, we asked Americans for their thoughts on an array of topics--most significant is Americans' response to the idea that DOGE (Department of Government Efficiency) will eliminate wasteful government spending and force federal employees back to work in their offices, where they can be held accountable.
[Our survey](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a7df8b9c/1edb9794a7de33b2 "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/government-efficiency-poll") found that DOGE's existence is supported by 78.6% of Republicans, 64.0% of Democrats, and 68.0% of Independents, giving the department broad bipartisan support.These results stand in stark contrast to what the mainstream media and extreme left would have the American people believe, which is why we want you to share this survey with your friends, family and social media followers. The left will try to manufacture a narrative that Americans don't support these actions, hoping that their falsehoods will sway opinions.**ACTION ITEM** ************ Share our results and sign up to receive updates about DOGE's actions and how you can help make sure that President Trump's agenda is implemented. **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a7df8b9c/1edb9794a7de33b4)
---
| **** ******** The election outcome was everything we'd hoped for, but the opposition is already working hard to "resist" and obstruct President Trump in every way, everywhere. If you want President Trump's agenda to become a reality, he needs you to take action supporting that agenda starting now.
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Looking back at the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc2O3CAQhJ8G3xjhBsH64MNKlm8bRdFKOaJe6HiQDLb4mVHePmKc3HND1XTxVfHzw35g2EPavmGkueZqc7EpF2cTPSvH5kPlaEGA4iPwUdhx8LMy4KUeaB6NlG-gtRHDffZKOT1K8yYIcZoMCPhSyouvSUsCb4Ywd58RRiEmpYW5OQI3gdHGSDkhSaYE7pRrudU7ZTrb1x4cpkoYb-6Iwz7faz0Lk-8MVgZrIdcy3Z4hZfL9BoO1wzNYX8QXfmn5Qb952jjxE_umXFuNNpIPLTK5UMSwM9BdLEfLjphcDohXEX3lNaqOyeXzxyf_l-Kv7jCeGLbE5HJNhLIJbX7ytHXhRVGQP0b7_d2mLaQtB3e3F-llcaRKqTK5_GrJZwwlpI2Bzj1g7me51NyIgcZYz6OEGo7-oBry7M9n2PdQtGFKbD3Lq6z6n9_5mOFPAAAA___d-KgV)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc2O3CAQhJ8G3xjhBsH64MNKlm8bRdFKOaJe6HiQDLb4mVHePmKc3HND1XTxVfHzw35g2EPavmGkueZqc7EpF2cTPSvH5kPlaEGA4iPwUdhx8LMy4KUeaB6NlG-gtRHDffZKOT1K8yYIcZoMCPhSyouvSUsCb4Ywd58RRiEmpYW5OQI3gdHGSDkhSaYE7pRrudU7ZTrb1x4cpkoYb-6Iwz7faz0Lk-8MVgZrIdcy3Z4hZfL9BoO1wzNYX8QXfmn5Qb952jjxE_umXFuNNpIPLTK5UMSwM9BdLEfLjphcDohXEX3lNaqOyeXzxyf_l-Kv7jCeGLbE5HJNhLIJbX7ytHXhRVGQP0b7_d2mLaQtB3e3F-llcaRKqTK5_GrJZwwlpI2Bzj1g7me51NyIgcZYz6OEGo7-oBry7M9n2PdQtGFKbD3Lq6z6n9_5mOFPAAAA___d-KgV)

clean_body: This is what mattered most... Friend: After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to the 2024 election and uncover exactly what led us to such a landslide victory. Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, money. "...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in." [Source: Cronkite News] But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the single most important factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU. Thank you, Newt Gingrich ******************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Hi, Marsha Blackburn here. I’ve worn a lot of hats over the years. I’m mom, grandmother, Senator, and now – I’m a Vice Chair for the National Republican Senatorial Committee for 2026. It’s the honor of a lifetime to help lead Republicans to victory once again. But there’s one small hang-up. Chuck Schumer and his far-Left buddies are FUMING about losing their hold on power. They can’t believe we pulled off a trifecta, so they’re charging ahead to sabotage our Conservative Senate Majority and President Trump’s agenda before we even take power. I won’t let these anti-America Radicals get away with it… And I have a hunch you won’t either. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a9ed854af2e17849dd398634db40bacb25f6dc48a0d27d22c14f2b000471ac1ceadca9e0d705d24ef9df7729e2ca7fd691147dcdcc640f15ef0a79040320f094 So here’s my ask today: Will you join me in pledging your FULL SUPPORT for President Trump and his agenda? https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a9ed854af2e17849dd398634db40bacb25f6dc48a0d27d22c14f2b000471ac1ceadca9e0d705d24ef9df7729e2ca7fd691147dcdcc640f15ef0a79040320f094 “I, Peter, pledge my full support for President Trump and his strong America First agenda.” https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a9ed854af2e17849dd398634db40bacb25f6dc48a0d27d22c14f2b000471ac1ceadca9e0d705d24ef9df7729e2ca7fd691147dcdcc640f15ef0a79040320f094 ADD YOUR NAME There’s a lot to get done. If we want to help President Trump deliver on his mandate from the American People, it will take the full support of our entire MAGA movement to get it across the finish line. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a9ed854af2e17849dd398634db40bacb25f6dc48a0d27d22c14f2b000471ac1ceadca9e0d705d24ef9df7729e2ca7fd691147dcdcc640f15ef0a79040320f094 We’ve never let the anti-America Radicals shut us down before. And you can bet it WON’T happen under my watch. I’m counting on you to help me see this through. For America, Marsha Blackburn Vice Chairwoman, NRSC Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62700510dfaa455a90c6b601dc9d50bc&_e=yk0FPUrpmDanK6NlTVesFnJgcCA7ZMTLaemdMC8_IwTkIxQuWm5NdMm3a7CEwkdBh1e_5R-t8V2t-Gmt04B5ee9aAEGw_4EPlKq0MY-UdHNd5Le9pjYeypGj0luxBcIwtIsf2w6BkbvOZm1LzWZCDTUZw1gFTMu_wvyY1b03dW-d2qPbsP4YUv3ZkmLZNCUSv2EOPVa_EBlLuThkSGmzmRfzYNr6tuB2WNLJENOaPjdTZCNcd5xA68GgF6JYxZdOVw1_NfHSdis9RhvvlcX3opG_hqUphjiU8-ObUnSm4bC8HQGIBm7zYg6e01zQw-8Sx2FUFX2JudgyUzYVtNPdCEMlG78Uof6IEY590k-kRr8uoKB_WRzrwOV6LndvZ-n5G9AqhKnxokTKm60XnuxCZw%3D%3D)**

body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hkTMqf5AuTPt_6bhfEMpyg~~/AARclAA~~)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hkTMqf5AuTPt_6bhfEMpyg~~/AARclAA~~)

[Please complete your survey by following the personalized link below:](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hkTMqf5AuTPt_6bhfEMpyg~~/AARclAA~~)**

Thank you,

Newt Gingrich

| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fJ48OuUqRJY8D5s0Vf3lzg~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fJ48OuUqRJY8D5s0Vf3lzg~~/AARclAA~)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Looking back at the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/W33V2l4K9VfHve58GPJWEw~~/AARclAA~~~)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/W33V2l4K9VfHve58GPJWEw~~/AARclAA~~~)

[Please complete your survey by following the personalized link below:](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/W33V2l4K9VfHve58GPJWEw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

**[secure.official2024audit/dpwillis67@gmail.com/submission-pending](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/W33V2l4K9VfHve58GPJWEw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Thank you,
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/W33V2l4K9VfHve58GPJWEw~~/AARclAA~~~)
Newt Gingrich

body:

Lamar](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFyqzAQgOHTiA5mdxGgV6h4DZ3TpmRWaG00EZJHyMa-fSbpc4H_n-_zslw4xJBuH7yLra9rXghIt0gtwuI5xPeiG28d-H_YiMWp700Po5mazRrP4vTg-1HL5MwAvAIawtWPjEzUBPsTQ0JA7A3obhIY9MAwGI8yuVVpEB9qLl3dpMqLj2t856eUbs17E-1W6_1Q_X9Fs6L5PM-uHhvnFEOSLpebonnj5F3OX4pmSbUEORTNkXcu7R4KO-FH6x458Z1LlaZYfz9DjOEYJ6XhtnOIv7P6p_5p6TsAAP__g1Jd_w) was inaugurated as the president of the Republic of Texas, succeeding Sam Houston as the second person elected to the position. ## Terrell Officer Killed in Line of Duty
Terrell police officer Jacob Candanoza, 28, was [fatally shot during a traffic stop](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAURL8Gd1jca2JIQZHG2ibbbmlhcx0jYbAAx8nfr_z6V00xo9HR-fccn9YHH19_7UamfpY0okDJATmI0VkfvqNsnJmEu0NDBlTX6U70WjWr6eQMVtlJ6EmCxl6AVnTvJTilJsR74811BggCoNNCtorETd6suGkHpKaZSUHO15TbulKljy1L-KY35XZOWxPMWuteWPdgODAczvNstxKvjuFAkR-F4RDpvGLOfiOGQ6WcKQS-p-Bn4mlZ_EyZO0-F26VS5mVNlbsj-_jiNdtrwEtNO99sXI9Y-REd5dN-GQ4288cD3p9V_mmycfvpQ_ClV0yK12Z9-OGsv4p7G_wfAAD__7_acao) Sunday night at a Super 8 motel, marking the first line-of-duty death for the department in over 40 years. The suspect, 25-year-old Darrian Cortez Johnson, was [arrested in neighboring Van Zandt County](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQRb8GOqwBY0MKite4y2u3tDAMMdpJsDCKnb9fefvtbnF1js7Xfb77TPn1-O-f6NqZyqxAaSGVkDBHn-kzax7dAvEmOTpp-t72MFrDVydvqKzx3qqbtiEZE5cA4xhigCUkHHh2F0wqCVL2FnRnEAY9eBhslGiWwDRgzK3Urq3Y8PR7ok95Y-1CeXJya2vbzvp_TE1MTcdxdKmc-oXHfh2Ymq7J1NSwViQSW6EcUJSUcsAq9rU08Z2JMPLq4nZkoryPhml4PH2mX0v7M_vt1E8AAAD__zFcW7s) and is facing charges of capital murder of a peace officer. Candanoza enlisted in the Marines after graduating from Midlothian High School, and he had just [joined the Terrell Police Department in July](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu3CAQAL8Gd1iwxoYUFGncvbQpLQyLvdGesTDvfPf30aVPPdJoNL-_lq9ATMf2KzzQt1cuCygwUoPUakmB-L2YLvlVpR-6Q6_tMLhBTc52u48q2mAzZGeMS9GCm6zKE07gcFpx6Mh_ZBq00npwyvQW1WjGoEaXNNo1CqMwUSu1bzs2fIUr87s8sfaxPDr2e2vnJYafAmYB833f_bHGlO8PFjAfeF8CZi4xsIC5Ya3ILM_CFFGWnClilbFSoxiY35KOP98Vk6RDXnspjY5NXt_XibHJ0CSHuqGAebB6BDsKmLvq03kTM12TFUZtj0D8L67999bTw98AAAD__7ZabbM). ”He loved being a police officer,” his father said. A procession of police officers escorted Candanoza’s body early Monday morning from a Forney hospital to the Dallas County Medical Examiner’s Office. Candanoza is survived by his wife and a young daughter.
## Fire Destroys Historic Marshall Church
A [massive fire](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGnMZ3RzAAxFC5u4y633RIZPIlHa5bI9obk7Vdsv_WRviP9H9f56iXJ1_2_39jW122fCajXSBphDl7Se-6bYBcIEzZs0XTd2MFlNE2062DGBUZkQximBYfFmG4yEyEzXBbTiD0xJATEboS-NQxDP3gYxoBsllX1wEHqntsaufLLl1t670_O7bpvTbKx1kdR3T9FTpE7jqP9POrrHBW501bkkBQ5mBS5zZciT9Y3yawDl5r3d9FRSt2zrHrzuUSfkl7jd16jItdkGx6HpCTlYlQP981L-r2uf7Z4WvoJAAD__yqsX9I) early Monday morning destroyed the historic 163-year-old First Methodist Church in downtown Marshall, requiring the efforts of five fire departments and 75 firefighters to contain it. Crews worked throughout the day to put out hotspots and dismantle the walls, which were deemed unstable after the roof collapsed. [See photos here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEbjsQ28wsVr6LLtlsixh2BlwJHxhvD3q6y23fLqSudI5_MyXXzitN0-_EquvuY8IaCRCqWCKfrE52Sa6K4Q_6mGnOq1HjR0Q98srpsVddpaQwPMHgJ26Ltr6JU1FjXoJrk3TKECpfQApu0JrLEe7BAV9dcgDFBMNZe2LlTp5feZz_yk0oa8NuyWWh-70P8FjgLH4zjaO9X7-xQ4bnTsAkfOwbP8HWqw8iRfZOYoV1_2xTPLsHyVsMhIey35pCjTJudUSODYFBcfR2JOe9cLA7fVJ_6x1z9zPB1-BwAA___RdGHS). Built in 1861, the church was a storage site for ammunition during the Civil War and hosted a meeting of Confederate governors in 1862. Its first bell was given to the Confederacy, and it was replaced by one stolen from the Union. The cause of the fire is unknown, and the Marshall Fire Department has asked the State Fire Marshal’s Office to [assist in the investigation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DHv2yAUBPBPgzcseGDjDAxdvP27drQe8AhI2I6Axkk_fZVWHbueTj-d7sfX9oW55OP-HXey_RXPDQRoLoFLsQXM5b3pIVgnwk0OZKVRalFiXsyQLCpy8ySklm5BB0oscSZvtEazKJzCkO0HkyCFlGoRejQkJj2hmJYgyTjPtKCQ-1nHnqjTC1ss7_NJdfTnPhSben80pr4xWBms13WNO9aWsJSDrrZTa3Tc_7YZrJ-Mwfo4S_bEYHUFfxEP1Ho9343HXFvnO_V0htw69-ln9Ynng_9DGaxYe_aFNtKEMRjP3QyeS0mR3xwQj3GWk5KTUzcYU9_LUG14XLmU3GbDtLjvmMuf-f2_fz4t_A4AAP__tOp5kA).

On this day in 1838, was inaugurated as the president of the Republic of Texas, succeeding Sam Houston as the second person elected to the position. Abilene 🌤️ 48/31 | Amarillo ⛅ 44/29° | Austin ⛅ 60/41° | Brownsville ☁️ 80/55° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 70/51° | DFW ⛅ 51/38° | El Paso 🌤️ 54/36° | Houston 🌥️ 69/46° | Lubbock ⛅ 47/31° | San Antonio ⛅ 62/44° | Texarkana 🌧️ 58/39° | Terrell Officer Killed in Line of Duty Terrell police officer Jacob Candanoza, 28, was Sunday night at a Super 8 motel, marking the first line-of-duty death for the department in over 40 years. The suspect, 25-year-old Darrian Cortez Johnson, was and is facing charges of capital murder of a peace officer. Candanoza enlisted in the Marines after graduating from Midlothian High School, and he had just . ”He loved being a police officer,” his father said. A procession of police officers escorted Candanoza’s body early Monday morning from a Forney hospital to the Dallas County Medical Examiner’s Office. Candanoza is survived by his wife and a young daughter. Fire Destroys Historic Marshall Church A early Monday morning destroyed the historic 163-year-old First Methodist Church in downtown Marshall, requiring the efforts of five fire departments and 75 firefighters to contain it. Crews worked throughout the day to put out hotspots and dismantle the walls, which were deemed unstable after the roof collapsed. . Built in 1861, the church was a storage site for ammunition during the Civil War and hosted a meeting of Confederate governors in 1862. Its first bell was given to the Confederacy, and it was replaced by one stolen from the Union. The cause of the fire is unknown, and the Marshall Fire Department has asked the State Fire Marshal’s Office to . Bowl Game Bonanza While the University of Texas and Southern Methodist University qualified for the College Football Playoff, are headed for bowl games. The 8-4 Texas A&M Aggies will face the 6-6 USC Trojans in the on Friday, Dec. 27. The Trojans hold a 3-0 record against the Aggies, with wins in 1964, 1975, and 1977. The 4-8 Houston Cougars are the only Big 12 team from Texas not going to a bowl game. Texas Tech, TCU, and Baylor, each with an 8-4 overall record, are scheduled to play Arkansas in the on Dec. 27, Louisiana-Lafayette in the on Dec. 28, and LSU in the on Dec. 31, respectively. Sam Houston will play in the —their first-ever bowl game—against Georgia Southern on Dec. 19, while UTSA will play Coastal Carolina in the on Dec. 23. Finally, Texas State and UNT will face off in the on Jan. 3. | is a local Arlington, Texas, family-owned business that has been shipping fine nuts and gifts for more than 35 years. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1906, [President Theodore Roosevelt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFrwzAQhX-NvMVIJzmxBw3pYOiQELp0NLL1HKvIuSCLmPTXl7h07PR9HMfj8T5P3cmFGG7Xs5th88gdSTI7RTslO-9CfHam8HYECLqAVQetay33DRWTHQejak2OjFKmItPoAykJTWjQmEoWwb7SFCmplK6VLKu-Geu6d72XILmvhJHwIXMqvzjc8oQxPvmBVA48F9FOOd8XoY-CWkHtuq5lnsCeExLzggdiHnDLSCWnq6D2LfIL7xmzoPbj70dQRTIsG46rSx5-8zxh45l7xM0ucMPv7ZLCN4pk_X0NMYZlfxBGXmcX4tYt_7fVw9JPAAAA__9bqGid) became the first American Nobel Prize winner, receiving the Peace Prize for his role in negotiating an end to the Russo-Japanese War. ## Suspect Held in CEO Murder
Luigi Mangione, designated "a person of interest" in the Manhattan murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, was [taken into custody](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFrwzAQBeBfI282upOi2IOGQvGWLqV0NLJ0slUUK1iXhPz74u5dvwePx_u-TBeXctqWD3cly7FMKFG3gC3IKbiUX5Nugo1ESKohC2eleiXNgM1qZzQYYx80au1ARx96DRINyuB9RGqSPdoAQQKoHmR3mofY97ObgySU5iS0pJC47N1PSRuvFPOrPGjvfLk22a7MtyrUm8BR4Ohmv9Gzdks5YoHj16fA8b4lprCSy7x6t1PrqbR1LYXTtrTZMVVuN-LW51IPqvd6I3_YU-BYuewvocYUhHoHMKcBwAzNbsPtmXJO1ZyFlsvVpfw3iv876WHxNwAA__9rDmmw) in Altoona, Pennsylvania, Monday after being spotted at a McDonald's. Mangione was [recognized by a fast-food employee](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGunDAQheGnMd2s7IHdZQuKNO5u2pSrMR5gImMjPOwNbx-RPvUvfdI5v77eXyRJ8vyTVh50Km-02IFDcPYdSdL57po4TMzIbcODe7Zt39rHC5tlcPepp972LY8OX2F8juGJD3ZdxzhSCI0Ml-bQWefa3tnbPbymvg8UomW0j7vpLEfRst9-F8m68JTO8uH9Npa1ScOiulXT_jDoDfp8bqXqlQz6CzboHRr09mXQHxUyf1eDfuO9lgxlAsnKO1cFyTCRUoK6lKKS56seWZTjwpR0GWlnCKVWCLtQBl3Kul2KxAhUIR0yC6yUZymZgTLwH5DPCYlpPhiqHpGzGvTNPsTtW1KS-niazs4rSfq3R__372fAvwEAAP__cY1_pw) and was arrested by local police on a firearm charge. He was carrying a 9mm ghost gun, a silencer, a U.S. passport, and four fake IDs, including one matching a New York City hostel registry. He also had a [three-page handwritten manifesto](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQxvGngW4NM6BiQXGN3V57pQEZd-eCYpQst29_8frrvuRLfsn_6z7dPSfeHp9-JVeWPKFCcwO8gZqi5_SejIxuIULSkhz0WlutugHl0y2xIz1DoBZ8jAZaG9veDD3Z3nRaG8nu0gBBAWgLqmnDsFgbfIiKUHWtMIoil3w035m38qQlvfOLjmbOq0zuWcp-Cv0hcBQ41lqbEObrEzhuVE-Boz8Kz4muOe_D9kOEh4pZHi7ulVPis-uFUY_Vc_pTy3-VL4e_AQAA__8saVNl) that included grievances with the US healthcare system, a document that spoke to the suspect's "motivation and mindset," officials said. Mangione grew up in Maryland, where [he attended an elite private school](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAURb9GOww80MGCYpvpZtstDchD3wZlAjju_P3G7be9NzknOV-P6WEp0r582g1NDWkCDooJYIJP3lJ8T6r1JiACyhaNuEmpJR9GaFejndODBeWG0TsxBiV86LlS4dajFly2ZC6aAMGFkFrwrndj0NpZ5zkCH_pGcfRUU-6-E-11xRDf6YW5m9PWRrPW-iyN_Gjg3sD9PM8upJ8dz3L9DdyPcs1rYvGghdhm94XSjqwc5YlzZcdOFf2KNtZ1thnZjIltR_aY22z886QYqQy3RvFlsxT_tPW_DC8DvwEAAP__pYZhPg) before graduating from the University of Pennsylvania with bachelor's and master's degrees in engineering. He has not been charged in Thompson’s murder.
## Merger Creates World's Largest Ad Agency
Global media giant Omnicom is set to acquire Interpublic Group in a stock-for-stock deal that will create the [world’s largest ad agency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D-vpSAQBfBPg90YGLj-KSi2sXvbbmkAB50Nwo0Pr_Hbb9z-1efkl5Pz52v-cpw4r7_dTrbGMqNEAwpByXlxnO7ZNIuNREi6Iat6rQctuxGbzcY-6lfQxnSj9pK6pVcmvgKa0cshamzYPppCJZXSg5Lty49xGLzziySU3UsYSQvXcrR_C-e6UUx3-dDRhrI3yW61vr-F_iVwEjhd19WG7MMTCpweWuCkUOAkR4FT2TOHskMt4M8bOFc63qdPHCAc5CrnFdwCbqUcbljZ5QoX1w0yuSPdgB14TolLBs7gcj5dgoM-lE9qt7qn5rDL-3oq310vjFx3x-n_1PrTdR-L_wIAAP__qqZw-w) with a combined valuation of nearly $30 billion. The merger comes as [the advertising experts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vgzAQQH8NbKA7GzAePHTJlq4dkY0Pcq0_IuME5d9X6d796T3pfV2Xq-XAaf-0kUzd8iJADB2KDmHxlsNrGVpvNiJBsiWDSspZwqRFezMIQCMMTo-rolmj0ugcTFp5HMAK37J521AgIMoZoR-d3ubZWeeBBExjMwB5rrn035lTvdEWXvlJpV9zbIO51Xo_GvnRiEsjLud59onO4yT6eQONuOSYeM2x41Sp3B8u8NpZ_6RS-eC0d5HKTqWzKeVHWilSqh1qrZSc2mL8_eQQ-JhUM8AeLYe_bv3vw9OI3wAAAP__orhgnA) behind the _Got Milk?_ and Mastercard’s _Priceless_ campaigns face increasing competition from sophisticated AI platforms that offer more targeted advertising solutions. Omnicom is the third-largest [advertising holding company](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7tuxCAQheGnwZ0tZvAFFxRp6DZtSgubwTsRmBVG6-zbR5s-9ZG-o__rttwcRz72T5fI1JAXlNi3gC3IxTuOr6VvvAlESKohA5NSWslxxuZu0A0qwDbInvQww6jXWa_zNI0QtkFv1LB5a4AgAZQG2Q3rHLRe3eoloRwH0UvyXHPpvjMf9U4hvvKTSrfl1ERzr_VxCvUh0Aq013V17ofz-V4F2rct0AIKtHIWaHM6eMup5cfeJio7ldb5J5XKJx97U4x_XBwjn-Mkerknx_HvqP4X_jT4GwAA__8PKVjQ) in the world by revenue, with reported revenue of $14.7 billion in 2023, followed by Interpublic at $10.9 billion. The new company will keep the Omnicom name and trade under the “OMC” ticker symbol on the New York Stock Exchange. Shares of [Interpublic jumped 10%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1ugzAURp8GNqLra2Pw4KFLtnTtiPxzndzKYGTcRHn7iu4dP33S0dH5ui03x5m3-6dbybZUFgRUg8BBwBId5_ei-mgTEZLsyYpJylmCNtg_bPBjAIfGuKSTmaIBDWGcSYGWQnjs2Z40gQKEkLOAy-hNmmfvfARC0GOngCK3Ui_fhbf2oJTf5Un1EsraZ_tobT86-dHhtcOr2zd6Hed1jto4ZOrwWtaNQ1kH3hrV_cdnDoOLT6qND97uw0TKBAgeEaIUQRgJEacQUKsUjZ_7auP-4pz50FOn4L46zn8C7b8gT4u_AQAA__-mkWFs) Monday, while Omnicom’s stock fell more than 6%.
## Penny Not Guilty in NY Subway Death
A Manhattan jury on Monday [found Daniel Penny not guilty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_u3CAQhJ9m3WEti_8WFGnoLm1KCx_LmYgDC3Nn-e0jp_9V04xmPn1_HsvDhhjS67d9s64-L4TUCUlC4uJsiNfSNU57ZmLVsJajUpPCYaZm026eFakBJTGrEdXqPPd-5c5Pz3GV3AR9r0mSKKWaJLb9OvtpWu3qkAmHHjpkF2ou7d8cUt3Yxyt_ubTP_G6i3mrdD1C_gAyQOc-z_Ry2ZmevuwBkjprLBWQSn8cdtoacgMx9C2QkARmcgYyzKXAUO6d0iVqCjeK52fLiQ7iS952d-OzOVgYy4zD1s1ID4ghkmqLdfoYYwzGM0OHrbUP8z1d_8vXV9C8AAP__BO1qpw) of criminally negligent homicide in the death of Jordan Neely, a homeless man who Penny placed in a chokehold onboard a New York City subway car last year. The case [drew national attention](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL8Gb1hwOI4zMHTxlq4dLcwd8aXEREDs-u-rdO_8pPek93Wdro4jr7dP9yBbQ5pAQSc1SK0mdByPqWvQBiIg05DVZ2MGo_oLNIsFmH2vjMI-aEOEiBdUdNZd6HrnERu2b5sGrbQ2g1btab6EYZjdjIpA9SfRKUKuKbf3xGtdKMQjbZRbnx5NtEutzyLMh4BRwLjvexvSz0p7eXMB46sIGNGtTFE-aV0PWTO7KO-vfMhMzi9U5EYZ2VdZXvPuDumX9E1Liii9K9Rki8-dY-TSn0Wnbg_H8a9e_7uxWfgNAAD__xrGZIs) due to racial implications and a video of Penny, a former Marine, placing Neely in a chokehold after Neely entered a train, shouting death threats while under the influence of a synthetic drug. Monday's decision followed [five days of deliberations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vgzAQBfBPYzYj-2z-ZPDQhS1dO6IDn4NT5xyBE8S3r6i6dvtJT3p6el_X8YoxRb594oNcCXkEBVZqkFqNHmM6Rlt5F4iATEVOd8b0RrUXqBaH4GmeVTsFG3oIF9sF26LudIO2MdpW0Z1tGrTS2vRa1c10CX0_4eQVgWobYRX5WPJa33PkslBIR37TWs_5USW3lPLchPkQMAgY9n2veZqZ9u3MBQwnBQyvTf7JI0dK8knMhwz5xV5yLvL2iqkccl7yNy05eekJyyLvefXIkonSIdeZUfeq65pqdf65x5Ti1nbCqtsDY_pdVP576O3gJwAA__9loWnO) after the jury deadlocked on the more serious manslaughter charge, leading the judge to dismiss it. The attorney for the [Neely family](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL8GOiN7DRgXLl6TLq-9Ei3skmzO2JFjBfH3p1x__WhGmq_rfEWJkm7_cedQtzyDhl4ZUEbPhBLPuW8pbMzAtuVgnLWT1aOH9h7QkTe-99OApvc8ruQA3WiGweFIwK2Ej82A0cbYyehuWPw2TQsupBn0ODS9ZpKaS_fIkuqdt3jmN5duzXsbw73W56ux_xq4NHA5jqNLfLwO5u8P0MBlibuKjMRFFca1Sk6KMAlH9eSUTvXmQrJW9ciFMKnEHE9lvHd-sG0J9DwkRnmNrun1bUeJv-X614l3gJ8AAAD__2GCYM4) said they will move forward with a lawsuit filed against Penny last week.

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: The Future of Work is Here
body:
Wages are going up in over 20 states, giving much needed relief to the middle class.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2voyy9-n4ewiq-kyd76rh3/)
---
# **The Future of Work is Here**
---
|
---
| | | | folks, In 2025, 23 states and 65 localities will raise their minimum wages, with Illinois, Delaware, and Rhode Island joining the $15-per-hour club. Meanwhile, states like California and New Jersey are leading the charge, pushing wages above $17 for certain workers, including in the fast-food industry. In King County, Washington, workers will see their pay rise to $20.29 an hour. These increases reflect the growing recognition that workers need more than just the bare minimum to survive in today’s economy.
**A Boost for Workers, Families, and Local Economies** Raising the minimum wage stimulates the economy. With more disposable income, workers spend more, which in turn boosts local economies and supports small businesses. In areas like California, where fast food workers are earning $20 an hour, workers are able to cover their living expenses and still have money left over to invest in their children’s education or save for the future. This ripple effect benefits everyone. Higher wages also improve overall health and productivity. With fewer workers stressed over finances, absenteeism due to illness drops, and productivity rises. Better wages mean better access to healthcare, fewer sick days, and a better quality of life for families. **The Political Landscape and Challenges** While many states are forging ahead with wage hikes, the federal government has been slow to act. The federal minimum wage has been stagnant at $7.25 per hour since 2009, largely due to opposition from Republican lawmakers. However, states like Missouri and Alaska—traditionally conservative—have passed initiatives to raise wages to $15, signaling that this issue has transcended party lines. Critics argue that wage increases lead to higher prices and job losses, particularly in service industries like restaurants. However, studies from the University of California, Berkeley, and the National Bureau of Economic Research have shown that job losses are minimal, and wage increases have had little impact on overall inflation. The Congressional Budget Office concluded that raising the federal minimum wage to $15 per hour would lift 900,000 people out of poverty, and would result in minimal job losses. **The Road Ahead** The momentum behind raising the minimum wage is reshaping the economic landscape. As more states and localities push for higher pay floors, millions of workers are being lifted into a more secure financial position. These increases are not just about survival—they are about empowerment. Workers are able to provide for their families, invest in their futures, and contribute to local economies in meaningful ways. [**_But there’s still more work to be done, especially at the federal level. As more states and cities continue to raise wages, the future of work in America is being rewritten. And with it, the path to the middle class is becoming clearer for more Americans than ever before. It’s time to raise wages, raise standards, and raise expectations for what’s possib_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2voyy9-n4ewir-kyd76rh4/) [**_l_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2voyy9-n4ewis-kyd76rh5/)** _e._**

# _Your_ Retirement Could Be Under Assault...
---
|
---
| | Think about it for just a moment... What would happen to your plans for retirement - everything you’ve worked so hard to build... If **_inflation rates skyrocketed_** back to post Covid levels? The **_stock market dropped 50%_** like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis? Global **_conflicts spiraled even further_** out of control? Social Security went **_belly up_** from a spending crisis? Or the **_dollar crashed_ due to _money printing_ or a _global de-dollarization_**?
---
| |
# **Have YOU considered any of these scenarios?**
---
| | Are you financially prepared to handle even a single one of them? If not, everything you’ve worked for could be at grave risk. In retirement, you could find yourself...
---
* Just scraping by instead of living the retirement you’ve always dreamed of.
* Forced back into the workforce, after an entire life of hard work and saving.
* Or you could wind up a financial burden to your family and loved ones.

---
Unfortunately, these are the scenarios many Americans are having to consider in today’s uncertain world. But burying your head in the sand is likely not an option.
---
| |

name: Amanda Chase
subject: What can you expect this Friday, Dec 13th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
3 days until election day in Senate District 10
| | | | WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT THIS FRIDAY
---
---
|
# 3 Days Until Election Day
---
|
# LOGISTICS DETAILS UPDATED
---
| Greetings!, The Senate District 10 Committee released the rules for Friday's Republican Mass Meeting last night. I've included a copy for those interested.
Here's the latest.
Only 3 days left until the Republican Mass Meeting. It will be held this coming Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road.
Registration is at the door and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote.
Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Our campaign will be shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location.
We are looking for volunteers outside of the district to volunteer for the day. If you have a 15 passenger van and would be willing to transport attendees from the parking areas to the voting location, please click[ here.](mailto:Britton@chaseforva.com) We also need door greeters and people with trucks.
There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Please see the map below for parking.
Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin.
Once voters are registered at the door, they will be given a wrist ban and asked to wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin.
Organizers have said you will want to eat before you come or bring something with you to eat while you wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin.
I've been advised there is no room for food trucks. So please plan accordingly. You may bring food and drinks into the gymnasium while you wait.
This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots:
Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely
Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50.1%.
If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50.1%, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place.
If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50.1%, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50.1%.
The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat.
Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat.
If you have any other questions about the Republican Mass Meeting please feel free to reply to this email and I will get organizers to answer them for you.
