Thank you for taking time out of your very busy life to commit to be apart of Friday's Republican Mass Meeting.
You have chosen to be apart of history. You are tasked with a very important decision to make. You are one of only hundreds of people who will choose who will be our next state senator and who will be our voice to Richmond in the Virginia General Assembly.
The choice rests on each of you who shows up this Friday. Thank you for accepting the call to civic duty when called on, even during the Christmas holidays.
While there are 7 candidates seeking the Republican nomination, I'm the only candidate running who has actually served in the position which we are seeking- Virginia State Senator.
During that 8 year period, I received many awards for legislative achievements, many which you will find in a recent mailer and one that will be made available at the Republican Mass Meeting.
HERE'S WHAT MY SUPPORTERS ARE SAYING ABOUT ME:
* EXPERIENCED
* KNOWLEDGEABLE
* TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE
* SOLID 8 YEAR CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD
* PROVEN VOICE OF THE PEOPLE
* ONLY CANDIDATE WHO HAS ACTUALLY SERVED IN THE VIRGINIA SENATE
* FIGHTER FOR THE PEOPLE
* EFFECTIVE
* BRAVE
* COURAGEOUS

The candidate who wins this Republican Mass will face our Democrat opponent on Tuesday, January 7.
The day after this General Election, the Senate will gavel in within hours of this newly elected senator being elected.
Remember. The General Election is Tuesday, January 7. Hours later on Wednesday, January 8 at noon, the Virginia Senate gavels in. There is no time for training.
Do you want to elect a Senator who is controlled and told how to vote by staff?
As we speak, Senate Democrats are still in session and meeting in committee to load up the docket with a plethora of legislation to kill, steal and destroy- including a bill to enshrine late term abortion into our Virginia Constitution.
Virginia is in the political war of our lifetime to defend freedom and prosperity. We can't afford to send in an inexperienced senator.
Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in?
I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Why?
8 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE AS A STATE SENATOR I've actually served for 8 years in the Virginia Senate as a Virginia State Senator. No other candidate can make that claim.
8 YEARS OF KNOWLEDGE SERVING AS A STATE SENATOR Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway?
I know how things work in the General Assembly.
There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days.
Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time.
If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled.
There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed.
TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do?
SOLID CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD YOU CAN TRUST I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years.
How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100%?
They can't.
PROVEN FIGHTER FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE PEOPLE Many of you have told me that you are supporting me because I'm a fighter. I've proven myself to you time and time again. You know you can trust me. I'm not a typical politician.
You say that I'm the voice of the people.
A HISTORY OF STANDING STRONG I have an 8 year plus history of standing strong for you during the gun grab of 2021, exposing the 2020 Presidential Election being stolen in 2020 and pushing back against tyrannical Covid mandates, like involuntary masking and Covid jabs.
I didn't just show up on the political scene a few months ago and ask to be your leader.
In order to change things for the better, you have to know how things work. I've done that. And I've been effective at flipping the political tables from top down to bottom up, putting the people in charge of their government. Thanks to my work, you can now watch committee meetings online and with the exception of this Special Election, you can now vote at your polling location instead of spending hours in cumbersome party election processes that suppress the vote and limit participation. I was the deciding vote that put an end to what we are doing on Friday. You should be able to conveniently vote at your local polling location and go home.
LOOK FORWARD TO WORKING WITH THE NEW SENATE LEADERSHIP
I look forward to working with the new Republican Senate leadership.
Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate Republican Senate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases.
Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so.
I had to do it. Although I voluntarily chose to leave the Republican Senate Caucus in 2019, I plan to return in 2025. The Senate now has good conservative leadership that I have worked with effectively in the past. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office.
ENDORSEMENTS I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, members of the Board of Supervisors in Amelia County and School Board members in Hanover County.
NOT A TYPICAL POLITICIAN I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity.
They can't buy me. I work for you- the people of Senate District 10.
MY CONSTITUENTS TRUST ME The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote.
We need a courageous, proven conservative leader with experience and knowledge to effectively serve Senate District 10 the day after they are sworn in. I have a conservative record you can trust, and I'm ready for battle day one.
For God & Country,

clean_body: 3 days until election day in Senate District 10 | | | | WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT THIS FRIDAY | 3 Days Until Election Day | LOGISTICS DETAILS UPDATED | Greetings!, The Senate District 10 Committee released the rules for Friday's Republican Mass Meeting last night. I've included a copy for those interested. Here's the latest. Only 3 days left until the Republican Mass Meeting. It will be held this coming Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road. Registration is at the door and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote. Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Our campaign will be shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location. We are looking for volunteers outside of the district to volunteer for the day. If you have a 15 passenger van and would be willing to transport attendees from the parking areas to the voting location, please clickmailto:Britton@chaseforva.com We also need door greeters and people with trucks. There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Please see the map below for parking. Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin. Once voters are registered at the door, they will be given a wrist ban and asked to wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. Organizers have said you will want to eat before you come or bring something with you to eat while you wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. I've been advised there is no room for food trucks. So please plan accordingly. You may bring food and drinks into the gymnasium while you wait. This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots: Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50.1%. If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50.1%, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place. If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50.1%, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50.1%. The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat. Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat. If you have any other questions about the Republican Mass Meeting please feel free to reply to this email and I will get organizers to answer them for you. | | Thank you for taking time out of your very busy life to commit to be apart of Friday's Republican Mass Meeting. You have chosen to be apart of history. You are tasked with a very important decision to make. You are one of only hundreds of people who will choose who will be our next state senator and who will be our voice to Richmond in the Virginia General Assembly. The choice rests on each of you who shows up this Friday. Thank you for accepting the call to civic duty when called on, even during the Christmas holidays. While there are 7 candidates seeking the Republican nomination, I'm the only candidate running who has actually served in the position which we are seeking- Virginia State Senator. During that 8 year period, I received many awards for legislative achievements, many which you will find in a recent mailer and one that will be made available at the Republican Mass Meeting. HERE'S WHAT MY SUPPORTERS ARE SAYING ABOUT ME: EXPERIENCED KNOWLEDGEABLE TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE SOLID 8 YEAR CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD PROVEN VOICE OF THE PEOPLE ONLY CANDIDATE WHO HAS ACTUALLY SERVED IN THE VIRGINIA SENATE FIGHTER FOR THE PEOPLE EFFECTIVE BRAVE COURAGEOUS The candidate who wins this Republican Mass will face our Democrat opponent on Tuesday, January 7. The day after this General Election, the Senate will gavel in within hours of this newly elected senator being elected. Remember. The General Election is Tuesday, January 7. Hours later on Wednesday, January 8 at noon, the Virginia Senate gavels in. There is no time for training. Do you want to elect a Senator who is controlled and told how to vote by staff? As we speak, Senate Democrats are still in session and meeting in committee to load up the docket with a plethora of legislation to kill, steal and destroy- including a bill to enshrine late term abortion into our Virginia Constitution. Virginia is in the political war of our lifetime to defend freedom and prosperity. We can't afford to send in an inexperienced senator. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in? I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Why? 8 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE AS A STATE SENATOR I've actually served for 8 years in the Virginia Senate as a Virginia State Senator. No other candidate can make that claim. 8 YEARS OF KNOWLEDGE SERVING AS A STATE SENATOR Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway? I know how things work in the General Assembly. There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days. Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled. There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed. TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do? SOLID CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD YOU CAN TRUST I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years. How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100%? They can't. PROVEN FIGHTER FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE PEOPLE Many of you have told me that you are supporting me because I'm a fighter. I've proven myself to you time and time again. You know you can trust me. I'm not a typical politician. You say that I'm the voice of the people. A HISTORY OF STANDING STRONG I have an 8 year plus history of standing strong for you during the gun grab of 2021, exposing the 2020 Presidential Election being stolen in 2020 and pushing back against tyrannical Covid mandates, like involuntary masking and Covid jabs. I didn't just show up on the political scene a few months ago and ask to be your leader. In order to change things for the better, you have to know how things work. I've done that. And I've been effective at flipping the political tables from top down to bottom up, putting the people in charge of their government. Thanks to my work, you can now watch committee meetings online and with the exception of this Special Election, you can now vote at your polling location instead of spending hours in cumbersome party election processes that suppress the vote and limit participation. I was the deciding vote that put an end to what we are doing on Friday. You should be able to conveniently vote at your local polling location and go home. LOOK FORWARD TO WORKING WITH THE NEW SENATE LEADERSHIP I look forward to working with the new Republican Senate leadership. Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate Republican Senate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases. Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so. I had to do it. Although I voluntarily chose to leave the Republican Senate Caucus in 2019, I plan to return in 2025. The Senate now has good conservative leadership that I have worked with effectively in the past. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office. ENDORSEMENTS I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, members of the Board of Supervisors in Amelia County and School Board members in Hanover County. NOT A TYPICAL POLITICIAN I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. They can't buy me. I work for you- the people of Senate District 10. MY CONSTITUENTS TRUST ME The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote. We need a courageous, proven conservative leader with experience and knowledge to effectively serve Senate District 10 the day after they are sworn in. I have a conservative record you can trust, and I'm ready for battle day one. For God & Country, | Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023 | | | | == | | == | PARKING | | | | == | | | | | | | | Miss one of my emails? | | == | | == | | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | | == | | == | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f15abf8e1aff435c8ac4c5cac6d9a1ec&_e=5VHHvsW7PtjwtjPkDCXpyTPdsRmBLIPMho22DQnFHUDqVYy7tLUUZvT0hPFaIUBaaivmmvz0OwUr7ZK-dCWlaGGlfzfEBT-ZNCl01x-Z-6EGfNWRfKEUjmj4yc9ATCOpmGLmO0Nvohy_JCMgfn23JIF1rUWGJnoGWrnaW3bDC-RHNZxlNBATz3Gw5xSYAAZZqGusAdTaFkVAgAOIkTNjX6PI6yhK7JJDc0x23NbFs8SrgR38kHPeh4GaEIis--LEHkZ1J89ow8s1OlBuZOkYw8sD4CGLGJHavV9BdM61SkjAJZGE8KpxMmewti0HV99iBSOFXTCB-_h1-BQNPclM9nKe-6g-j8TAQB2lF8xQ3uBAdX5_GMg4kz9UWZqZBvY-gwKu7ZRNKkDoFRPUbNNw9Q%3D%3D)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: History Facts
subject: Scholars say this was the worst year to be alive
body:
If you’re ever despairing about the state of the world, you can — at least, according to some scholars — be thankful it’s not the year 536 CE. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cn4bl50s2r4syvhffqard87n07wa8b7g18jv0ccqcmrl0wx893rplb4o8g55md0e2xwwxgrqfh6kgovfo0g57c83yw2zdh0yjjkya6oq8jk1d3zku4ez9y57cwh5bk806w8kst9w1zu0djw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa1fj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

---
# [Medieval scholars say 536 CE was the worst year to be alive.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa1fj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa1fj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa1fj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I f you’re ever despairing about the state of the world, you can — at least, according to some scholars — be thankful it’s not the year 536 CE. To be fair, it’s medieval scholars, not 21st-century ones, who [called](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa1fj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) 536 CE the worst year to be alive. But hear them out, because it sounds pretty bad. That year, a massive volcano erupted, historians believe, filling the air with volcanic ash. Of course, the majority of people affected by the disaster had no idea what was happening — they just knew it was very suddenly very dark for a very long time. The sun didn’t shine in Europe, the Middle East, and parts of Asia for 18 whole months — or as the Byzantine historian Procopius put it, “The sun gave forth its light without brightness, like the moon, during the whole year.”
---
That summer, temperatures dropped more than 30 degrees in parts of Europe and Asia (it even snowed in China), so crops failed, leading to widespread famine, starvation, and economic stagnation. Many people who were literate wrote about this at the time — the sun disappeared overnight, after all — but academics didn’t take the accounts seriously until the late 20th century. In 1983, a volcanic eruption was theorized to be the source of the darkness, and researchers examining tree rings in Ireland in the 1990s noted a severe temperature drop occurred in the sixth century. In 2018, researchers published a study pointing to a volcano as the likely culprit after analyzing ice cores drilled from glaciers.
Historian Michael McCormick [told _Science_](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa1fj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that 536 CE wasn’t just the worst year up until then, but “the beginning of one of the worst periods to be alive.” The climate still hadn’t recovered five years later when the first bubonic plague broke out, wiping out up to half the population of the Eastern Roman Empire. Two more eruptions in the 540s certainly didn’t help matters, either. The Late Antique Little Ice Age, as the period is known, lasted more than a century, clearing up between 660 CE and 680 CE, depending on the location.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa1fj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa1fj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The eruption of Mount Tambora caused a year with no summer.
When Indonesia’s Mount Tambora erupted in April 1815, the resulting sulfur dioxide, ash, and dust blocked the sunlight and [lowered](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa1fj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) global temperatures to the coldest in centuries. The following year, Europe and North America saw unusually chilly and wet conditions during summertime, leading 1816 to be known as the “year without a summer.” Even though the volcano erupted more than a year earlier, the volcanic ash was ejected into the upper atmosphere and carried around the planet by the jet stream, continuing to impact weather conditions.

clean_body: If you’re ever despairing about the state of the world, you can — at least, according to some scholars — be thankful it’s not the year 536 CE. | I f you’re ever despairing about the state of the world, you can — at least, according to some scholars — be thankful it’s not the year 536 CE. To be fair, it’s medieval scholars, not 21st-century ones, who 536 CE the worst year to be alive. But hear them out, because it sounds pretty bad. That year, a massive volcano erupted, historians believe, filling the air with volcanic ash. Of course, the majority of people affected by the disaster had no idea what was happening — they just knew it was very suddenly very dark for a very long time. The sun didn’t shine in Europe, the Middle East, and parts of Asia for 18 whole months — or as the Byzantine historian Procopius put it, “The sun gave forth its light without brightness, like the moon, during the whole year.” That summer, temperatures dropped more than 30 degrees in parts of Europe and Asia (it even snowed in China), so crops failed, leading to widespread famine, starvation, and economic stagnation. Many people who were literate wrote about this at the time — the sun disappeared overnight, after all — but academics didn’t take the accounts seriously until the late 20th century. In 1983, a volcanic eruption was theorized to be the source of the darkness, and researchers examining tree rings in Ireland in the 1990s noted a severe temperature drop occurred in the sixth century. In 2018, researchers published a study pointing to a volcano as the likely culprit after analyzing ice cores drilled from glaciers. Historian Michael McCormick that 536 CE wasn’t just the worst year up until then, but “the beginning of one of the worst periods to be alive.” The climate still hadn’t recovered five years later when the first bubonic plague broke out, wiping out up to half the population of the Eastern Roman Empire. Two more eruptions in the 540s certainly didn’t help matters, either. The Late Antique Little Ice Age, as the period is known, lasted more than a century, clearing up between 660 CE and 680 CE, depending on the location. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Days of darkness caused by the Krakatoa eruption in 1883 2.5 | | Year Constantinople was founded, marking the start of the Eastern Roman Empire 330 CE | Year Constantinople was founded, marking the start of the Eastern Roman Empire 330 CE | | Years since Yellowstone’s last eruption 70,000 | | Global box-office gross for the 2002 movie Ice Age $383,257,136 | Global box-office gross for the 2002 movie Ice Age $383,257,136 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The eruption of Mount Tambora caused a year with no summer. When Indonesia’s Mount Tambora erupted in April 1815, the resulting sulfur dioxide, ash, and dust blocked the sunlight and global temperatures to the coldest in centuries. The following year, Europe and North America saw unusually chilly and wet conditions during summertime, leading 1816 to be known as the “year without a summer.” Even though the volcano erupted more than a year earlier, the volcanic ash was ejected into the upper atmosphere and carried around the planet by the jet stream, continuing to impact weather conditions. Our service members make so many unseen sacrifices for our country all year long. But no time of year is more difficult than the holidays, and this year, **more than 200,000 of our military heroes are spending the holidays overseas.**
While deployed halfway around the world, military members miss the sound of their loved ones' voices. They miss the comfort of favorite holiday foods. And most of all, they miss out on crucial moments to make family memories. **But you can help connect service members to folks back home with care packages, holiday meals and calls with their loved ones.**
**[With so many of our heroes far from home this holiday season, we've set a goal to raise $75,000 via email and text message through Thursday to give them the care and comfort they deserve. Will you support the USO with a tax-deductible donation and help send a gift to our courageous service members?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/Dd9Kh-pX08cY/RHYvT3BIMy9wUVk2a0IyVkh1cGNqa1ljd1BMRVlyRjFiK2VwMnBDQVlKcE0wYVhZcEFlNGRuN1gxM1FnQ25qS3JyMUhKQVcxOUQxbk9qUmdrTG1HOW9la2hOM2d1N08wbnJHMmloeUVDeHM9S0/ZjRjUG1xaXlidDl0RjdPbi84YS9uN2tqMmhBUGRnbGQyTGNnVHZPclljRzU3SGpzNGg0MnRvNlk3ZE9TOTd4YllRTldtcHFNTitDRCt4V2xLOWdDN1VCVTJHRUQyV1I1S0)**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgsuju41h77qpnng8rllfqb45j33uc335s45v0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im0p72cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeej5cp0uipsohnbv67toaei8l1ri7osdl46ahfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im0p72cdh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2pqvgpk7m93kc6qbn8kq12b6s6q9ju2rtmv165o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im0p72cdh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3qrcf1enpqbpttc7i199id9al2bgo8vqp3ovoqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cpr6c5i60oh1k8gn48n24hjmcpj0slg69oj3c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaqvjubuls3qsl116rn7bpn35dskcf1d5h2j2s6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im0p72cdh2bs)_

America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: The Founders' Almanac
body:
Most Americans know very little about America’s founding.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zramf0sko6uf2lnueh77ukhqhm7g4qkqspvkov00_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im0p72cdh2bs)
---

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqnrkedtq5suenesibele0a3co9qn7bldnqgf778_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im0p72cdh2bs) Fellow Conservative,

Most Americans know very little about America's founding.

In today's public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we're dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That 's why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers. **

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I 'd like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage's _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

Please use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and stand up for our founding principles.

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2th94t9knbsdjalngvd7qn6th69g12072v6l0q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im0p72cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvv598otntmrn6fntmkm9j4i0cci399gkpq2qvt0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im0p72cdh2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zih2kr7nc7fqqdbq85v16e2mtm0lufvd38kbabc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im0p72cdh2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/10/2024
body:
Text messages from home and the fall of a dictator
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Today’s newsletter is a little different—and for good reason. Along with a roundup of important news you won’t want to miss, we’re spotlighting some incredible RMV Original commentaries from talented new writers. These pieces bring fresh perspectives on key issues, and we’re excited to share them with you. You’ll find the news summaries below, but the heart of today’s edition is all about the thought-provoking commentaries. Enjoy!
🗞️**In today's newsletter...** Salam Hindawi reflects on [Syria’s path to democracy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Lundberg and Heatherly call for [downsizing Colorado’s Administrative State](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and C.J. Garbo highlights [Castle Rock’s leadership on immigration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Davis and Hansen champion [local control for the Dolores River](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Laureen Boll critiques Douglas County’s [AP African American Studies curriculum](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Lawmakers continue to debate [$150M education cuts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), sparking concerns about potential harm to school districts already facing enrollment declines. Troublingly, disciplined judges are reappearing in municipal courts, raising alarms over [judicial accountability](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Denver Democrats prepare to [fill two Senate vacancies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in January. Meanwhile, the [alleged hate crime hoax case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) tied to Colorado Springs mayoral politics highlights a long history of legal trouble for the central figure, Derrick Bernard.
**🇺🇸 In National News...** [Daniel Penny’s acquittal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in a high-profile homicide case marks a significant legal victory. Lara Trump’s [resignation as RNC Co-Chair](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) fuels speculation about a potential Senate bid in Florida. In Syria, the U.S. and Israel conduct over 75 airstrikes following the [Assad regime’s collapse](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), aiming to prevent ISIS from exploiting the power vacuum. Meanwhile, the suspect in the UnitedHealthcare CEO’s killing, an "anit-capitalist" and former Ivy League graduate, has been [taken into custody](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, December 10, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Hindawi: Text messages from home and the fall of a dictator](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SALAM HINDAWI, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_In late November, I had received a Telegram text from my brother, based in Germany, saying there were skirmishes between Syrian opposition forces and the Assad army – the official, regular Syrian armed forces – on the outskirts of our hometown of Aleppo, near our long-abandoned farmhouse._
_He sounded jubilant as he relayed the news, as if Assad would be toppled tomorrow. For me, I was far more skeptical to the extent of sarcasm. Years of dormancy in the Syrian Revolution – kicked off in 2011 – had made people pessimistic and dismissive of any idea of regime-changing victory, such as that which took place in Egypt or Libya._
_“Bro...new frontlines seem to have been open. It looks different this time, maybe there’s more support...” he texted._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Heatherly& Lundberg: It is time to downsize the Administrative State in Colorado, too](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Kevin Lundberg and Charles Heatherly advocate for Colorado Republicans to align with Trump’s federal deregulation efforts, targeting the oversized Administrative State at both national and state levels.
* The commentary highlights expected opposition from progressive-dominated legislatures, emphasizing the role of Colorado’s laws and programs in obstructing federal deregulation.
* The authors urge Colorado Republicans to overcome internal defeatism and support reforms in key areas like energy, public education, and health care to mirror Trump’s transformative agenda.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Garbo: How Castle Rock is leading the charge on Denver’s migration crisis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Castle Rock emerges as a model in addressing Denver’s migration crisis by supporting firm immigration enforcement, aligning with Trump’s deportation initiatives.
* The town’s approach emphasizes that true compassion lies in upholding the rule of law to protect the vulnerable and deter exploitation by traffickers and cartels.
* The commentary highlights the dangers of open-border policies, linking them to rising human trafficking, narcotics issues, and overwhelmed social systems.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Davis& Hansen: Why we’re fighting for an NCA and against a National Monument](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Cody Davis and Sue Hansen argue that a National Conservation Area (NCA) designation for the Dolores River ensures local input and preserves community priorities, unlike a National Monument designation which shifts control to federal authorities.
* The push for an NCA has been a transparent and inclusive effort, involving public meetings, field tours, and stakeholder input from ranchers, miners, and residents to shape a community-driven solution.
* An NCA balances environmental preservation with safeguarding existing uses like grazing, recreation, and water rights, avoiding the restrictive and top-down mandates of a National Monument.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Boll: How should history be taught? A critical look at AP African American Studies in Douglas County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Laureen Boll argues that the AP African American Studies curriculum overemphasizes systemic oppression and victimization, framing history through a grievance-based lens that lacks balance and viewpoint diversity.
* The curriculum excludes influential figures like Thurgood Marshall and fails to incorporate diverse scholarly perspectives, such as economist Thomas Sowell’s critiques of systemic racism, raising questions about academic fairness.
* Boll advocates for a curriculum that fosters critical thinking and open inquiry, urging the Douglas County School Board to select materials that present multiple perspectives and avoid bias, ensuring students receive a comprehensive education.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Grand Junction punts again on homeless center to the ire of taxpayers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY LINDY BROWNING | LOCAL | DECEMBER 7** _Downtown residents and businesses continue to be frustrated by the Grand Junction City Council’s efforts to find a way to meet the needs of vulnerable homeless people while saying they want to protect the homeowners and businesses from the darker element that lives within the homeless population._ __
**[Russel: Trump won big, Republicans less so... Here’s the lessons for 2026](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY ROBERT RUSSEL | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 7** _Donald Trump’s impressive electoral victory is indeed a mandate for the man and his agenda. For Republicans in Congress, it was an underwhelming fizzle. With 10 or more House races slipping through their fingers, atop four senate races yet again blown by Mitch McConnell’s epic incompetence, one almost wonders how Republicans even got a majority at all._ _The answer is Donald Trump._
__
[**Daniel: A brighter future for Colorado will be lead through innovation, not big government**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY BOBBIE DANIEL | COMMENTARY |****DECEMBER 6** _Colorado faces a declining economic reality: high inflation, soaring gas prices, stagnant wages, rising unemployment and an increasingly unaffordable housing market._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** William Henry Harrison’s term was only**one month** whereas Franklin D. Roosevelt’s spent a groundbreaking **12 years** in office.

|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Being happy never goes out of style." — Lilly Pulitzer
|

It looks different this time, maybe there’s more support...” he texted. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Kevin Lundberg and Charles Heatherly advocate for Colorado Republicans to align with Trump’s federal deregulation efforts, targeting the oversized Administrative State at both national and state levels. The commentary highlights expected opposition from progressive-dominated legislatures, emphasizing the role of Colorado’s laws and programs in obstructing federal deregulation. The authors urge Colorado Republicans to overcome internal defeatism and support reforms in key areas like energy, public education, and health care to mirror Trump’s transformative agenda. | Castle Rock emerges as a model in addressing Denver’s migration crisis by supporting firm immigration enforcement, aligning with Trump’s deportation initiatives. The town’s approach emphasizes that true compassion lies in upholding the rule of law to protect the vulnerable and deter exploitation by traffickers and cartels. The commentary highlights the dangers of open-border policies, linking them to rising human trafficking, narcotics issues, and overwhelmed social systems. | Cody Davis and Sue Hansen argue that a National Conservation Area (NCA) designation for the Dolores River ensures local input and preserves community priorities, unlike a National Monument designation which shifts control to federal authorities. The push for an NCA has been a transparent and inclusive effort, involving public meetings, field tours, and stakeholder input from ranchers, miners, and residents to shape a community-driven solution. An NCA balances environmental preservation with safeguarding existing uses like grazing, recreation, and water rights, avoiding the restrictive and top-down mandates of a National Monument. | Laureen Boll argues that the AP African American Studies curriculum overemphasizes systemic oppression and victimization, framing history through a grievance-based lens that lacks balance and viewpoint diversity. The curriculum excludes influential figures like Thurgood Marshall and fails to incorporate diverse scholarly perspectives, such as economist Thomas Sowell’s critiques of systemic racism, raising questions about academic fairness. Boll advocates for a curriculum that fosters critical thinking and open inquiry, urging the Douglas County School Board to select materials that present multiple perspectives and avoid bias, ensuring students receive a comprehensive education. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ LINDY BROWNING | LOCAL | DECEMBER 7 Downtown residents and businesses continue to be frustrated by the Grand Junction City Council’s efforts to find a way to meet the needs of vulnerable homeless people while saying they want to protect the homeowners and businesses from the darker element that lives within the homeless population. ROBERT RUSSEL | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 7 Donald Trump’s impressive electoral victory is indeed a mandate for the man and his agenda. For Republicans in Congress, it was an underwhelming fizzle. With 10 or more House races slipping through their fingers, atop four senate races yet again blown by Mitch McConnell’s epic incompetence, one almost wonders how Republicans even got a majority at all. The answer is Donald Trump. BOBBIE DANIEL | COMMENTARY |DECEMBER 6 Colorado faces a declining economic reality: high inflation, soaring gas prices, stagnant wages, rising unemployment and an increasingly unaffordable housing market. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🤔 DID YOU KNOW? William Henry Harrison’s term was onlyone month whereas Franklin D. Roosevelt’s spent a groundbreaking 12 years in office. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Being happy never goes out of style." — Lilly Pulitzer | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Discover the Facts: Socialism and Capitalism Explained
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8aoe6fccatjqmu76jeodbrj3vbn2kqsjuulrcb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im4pr4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmpp3jo0anui4o16sddrfiv9soags3m3f5o8t06o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im4pr4clh2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5havv1b7e25rvh00tfjvjt782h9uteri55a75vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im4pr4clh2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: I’ve made my decision!
body:
In uncertain times, we deserve leadership we can trust. That’s why I’ve decided to run for Prince George’s County Executive, again. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67583c40f3c9786248adbd63&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rushernbaker.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D675757928ea3b0608cc42d94%26ss_email_id%3D67583c40f3c9786248adbd63%26ss_campaign_name%3DI%25E2%2580%2599ve%2Bmade%2Bmy%2Bdecision%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-12-10T13%253A04%253A27Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_675757928ea3b0608cc42d94&l=en-US&s=pS9vS7k8eZmE4i4RyCb3GCFy0ig%3D)
---
| | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67583c40f3c9786248adbd63&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_675757928ea3b0608cc42d94&l=en-US&s=xnOMhcp2U9UPrgOWEbqv5Vs5hJk%3D)
---
**Prince Georgians,** In uncertain times, we deserve leadership we can trust. [**That’s why I’ve decided to run for Prince George’s County Executive, again.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67583c40f3c9786248adbd63&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_675757928ea3b0608cc42d94&l=en-US&s=xnOMhcp2U9UPrgOWEbqv5Vs5hJk%3D) As your County Executive from 2010 to 2018, I worked tirelessly to uplift Prince George’s County, and together, we accomplished remarkable progress. [**During my administration, Prince George’s led the state is job creation five years in a row.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67583c40f3c9786248adbd63&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_675757928ea3b0608cc42d94&l=en-US&s=xnOMhcp2U9UPrgOWEbqv5Vs5hJk%3D) We created over 6,000 jobs, trained more than 40,000 residents for emerging industries, and facilitated an unprecedented $10 billion in economic development. By raising the county’s commercial tax base, we secured critical revenues to invest in our schools, infrastructure, and essential community programs.[**We also made our County safer;** **overall crime dropped by 50%, and violent crime was reduced by 58%**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67583c40f3c9786248adbd63&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_675757928ea3b0608cc42d94&l=en-US&s=xnOMhcp2U9UPrgOWEbqv5Vs5hJk%3D), thanks to the successful implementation of the Transforming Neighborhood Initiative (TNI). TNI was a groundbreaking community-centered policing strategy that brought law enforcement, residents, and local organizations together to address the root causes of crime and create safer, stronger communities.Prince George’s County thrived under our leadership, but there is still more work to be done. [**I’m eager to finish what we started—together.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67583c40f3c9786248adbd63&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_675757928ea3b0608cc42d94&l=en-US&s=xnOMhcp2U9UPrgOWEbqv5Vs5hJk%3D) I believe that when people come together, great things happen. With your support, we can continue to make Prince George’s County a place where all families thrive.To make this campaign a success, I’m asking for your help to ensure our message reaches every corner of the county. Your contribution will help us move Prince George’s County forward and build a brighter future for all.[**Your support means the world to me and will make all the difference in this important effort.** ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67583c40f3c9786248adbd63&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_675757928ea3b0608cc42d94&l=en-US&s=xnOMhcp2U9UPrgOWEbqv5Vs5hJk%3D)Thank you for standing with me. Together, we can continue to uplift Prince George’s County.
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67583c40f3c9786248adbd63&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_675757928ea3b0608cc42d94&l=en-US&s=xnOMhcp2U9UPrgOWEbqv5Vs5hJk%3D)
---
Thank you for your support,
---
|
---
Rushern L. Baker, III

name: Jennifer Jenkins
subject: We must continue applying pressure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Educated
body:
| | | [](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=eeae367b855349c0b2c46bb36e3ad1f2&_e=wyWEk_MlaA448uXhF3cjnaAt6JxTRGOQoSMx-C5IVzmO-Iyb834N7SU1_8mNVcl4V2xXsG3v927NYmSSyI-7rihbnHlFU6W1URe1jLkb7QVJzvpQIAsNMcwT7XSmB2NlHeXi8qirTbV9tkplIELkd4ZNqfKF1VXp9OzvwE0h8_rCWJbWZqwvNF_1UKQcOhD184fezqg6XkHcd2E7ClSJ76kPGA7Iq5Dd0lws8pWHEd8k07xLUgLJaOWrIQicJrtqUwLS_N56uLmvMQJBSdKIOT8NGwWnppnBpVYycuZ2gbXTP6qh1QcmMdnz_ro9xVH5KkOcColT87ma8mKGXhfmde6ro6sM5mR6yGd7BFRIY0BSJAwnLoWCdEKgYpekhxqv8-_SaaIInbOdLY0UK0L5uhvImfZoHwKFQjdXeZTv9iFW-oUxY_Xr5sAiHE8-AC2k) Peter, Last week, Moms for Liberty emailed their supporters touting their 2024 victories. But all they could muster was that they won 46 races nationwide. **They operated in 48 states in 2024, which means they won less than one race per state they did work in.** Meanwhile, Educated We Stand mainly spent our energies in Florida and Michigan **and we won 21 races in those two states alone!** We know this is all a fundraising ploy by Moms for Liberty to try and motivate their donors, but here’s the truth: Moms for Liberty is facing true pushback for the first time and it’s resulting in fewer victories for them and more victories for us. We were able to win 21 races with less than a year in existence and we can do so much more in 2025 and beyond so long as we have your continued support. [**Will you pitch in to Educated We Stand to help us continue applying pressure to extremists across the country?**](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=eeae367b855349c0b2c46bb36e3ad1f2&_e=wyWEk_MlaA448uXhF3cjnaAt6JxTRGOQoSMx-C5IVzmO-Iyb834N7SU1_8mNVcl4V2xXsG3v927NYmSSyI-7rihbnHlFU6W1URe1jLkb7QVJzvpQIAsNMcwT7XSmB2NlHeXi8qirTbV9tkplIELkd4ZNqfKF1VXp9OzvwE0h8_rCWJbWZqwvNF_1UKQcOhD184fezqg6XkHcd2E7ClSJ76kPGA7Iq5Dd0lws8pWHEd8k07xLUgLJaOWrIQicJrtqUwLS_N56uLmvMQJBSdKIOfNdGyHFaj8geCqHECe8OaUsw4TcK6Bj3xW09OxFJBdyqb3wlU4ZD6M3Y7K9on_3doJ-YAALNonEj8gZSCdsQ_jGAz_kKfBFOuwiOIxUB_hulmS1QS1A8ybUL5j0thg42Dmm4_JyBZH7NKetHBpaO_l0l7h49JHMG9W0vIxYPNoQ) We’re effectively fighting back against these radical candidates, but there’s still a lot of work to do. Moms for Liberty is building up chapter membership nationwide and recruiting chapter presidents and chairs to run for office with a ton of financial backing. **[We need to be prepared to take on this challenge year after year. So please, if you make a donation to any movement today, make sure it’s to Educated We Stand to help us continue the fight against Moms for Liberty and extremists in our clean_body: | | | Peter, Last week, Moms for Liberty emailed their supporters touting their 2024 victories. But all they could muster was that they won 46 races nationwide. They operated in 48 states in 2024, which means they won less than one race per state they did work in. Meanwhile, Educated We Stand mainly spent our energies in Florida and Michigan and we won 21 races in those two states alone! We know this is all a fundraising ploy by Moms for Liberty to try and motivate their donors, but here’s the truth: Moms for Liberty is facing true pushback for the first time and it’s resulting in fewer victories for them and more victories for us. We were able to win 21 races with less than a year in existence and we can do so much more in 2025 and beyond so long as we have your continued support. We’re effectively fighting back against these radical candidates, but there’s still a lot of work to do. Moms for Liberty is building up chapter membership nationwide and recruiting chapter presidents and chairs to run for office with a ton of financial backing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | All the best, Jennifer Jenkins ** Paid for by Educated. We Stand. **

name: GOP Outreach Team
subject: YOU Can Shape Our Future.
body:
Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, The American People sent a resounding, clear message this election: _**they’re done with failed, radical, liberal policies**_. As a result, Republicans now have control of the White House, the Senate, and the House! 🦅🇺🇸 **This victory is YOUR victory – and now it’s time to ensure the government you entrusted is working for YOU.** You made your voice heard at the ballot box, but the fight to protect and strengthen America’s future doesn’t stop there. **What happens next depends on what YOU decide.** [**_We’re inviting you to participate in our “Republican Roadmap Survey” – your chance to tell us exactly what you want Republicans to prioritize now that we have the power to lead our nation. >>>_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3pfnnbvihe00aedu5cp4j1q4ajljojqro84o37o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3imcor4cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj55vbn44o9adi9jbn73tb32ngln2n3ajsq66an8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3imcor4cjh2bs)
---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkkks3cikjahjc7qao8bp2lr44cum6pme65ltsn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3imcor4cjh2bs)
---
| | From defending conservative values to securing our borders, strengthening the economy, and building a bright future for our children and grandchildren, **this is your opportunity to make your voice heard****AGAIN****and shape the Republican agenda.** _Why is this survey so important?_ Republicans control all 3 chambers because of YOU. Now it’s time to prioritize the policies we fight for. Whether it’s cutting taxes, promoting energy independence, or tackling inflation, we need to know what matters most to you. **When Republicans listen to the grassroots, we win – for America.** But here’s the truth: We can’t do this without your support. [**_Will you help us turn your priorities into reality? name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: The plan to get rid of lemon politicians
body:
Peter, Do you find yourself looking at your ballot and saying... “ugh...not him. Not her. Really??” This is a shared experience f
|
---
| Peter, Do you find yourself looking at your ballot and saying... “ugh...not him. Not her. Really??” This is a shared experience for us New Jersey voters. And unlike most of the country, with our even and odd year elections, we get to be disappointed on a yearly basis. Are you continually having to vote for ‘the lesser of two evils’ or choose a candidate who promises the world and then goes on to be a disappointing, do-nothing, corrupt, run-of-the-mill politician? I’m guessing you’re reading this and nodding. “Yes, yes, and yes!” I call these politicians “lemons” – which I think is generous, to be honest. And I’m sick of feeling stuck electing them. Where do many of these “lemons” make the initial cut to end up on our November ballots? Primary elections. When I learned that an average of only 22% (meaning sometimes it’s less!) of common sense New Jerseyans vote in our primaries, I gasped. But it also made a lot of sense. We the people aren’t making these choices. It’s the elites and the party leaders. Their interests aren’t necessarily ours and that is reflected in who’s ending up on the ballot. So here at Common Sense Club, we’re taking action. Because that’s what we do. Introducing our latest project (drumroll please...)...
---
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/1ebb59cf11241aa791b190713f5fe108/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnEVzzQ7eRERE8xB1DtGBlnR3WcfMxP_eWuGpoOu8733Dm4BQlILSGgK404MxDyzQWHHFUVAkBZXVK2X-1vVcCxouromWvYJg-lpegeXssR2zgEaFBjkewihLi-Scp0VmSFVq8-NPj79ZPfE-THOY559ibDnFN-PuICDd47Ko5mYVnXRj-AuR6gLHGYbBlgIb7LoGWynsSraO6ZdKoag_4zMc35b5CbAVYlM=)
---
| | [Check out One Less Lemon online now >>](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/a22f6d3173246ec1687fe0f07dcf8d99/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW4vmF4Q7kRDRXEStQ_RBQ-PMMD4zE_97Y4WrgrbvnnsedwJCUQnKGojgTg_P88ECjTVTDAUlUlBVv1IvDFzftYAzcU217BVE09fyCixn3wu2FtCo0CDHQ5zkWZmei6zMDakqbX786Qk3q2e3j7MC5vmnGFtGu5txdxCR7nFZ1DCzik6aG_5CpLrIcYZhsKVAjl3HsZXCrmXrmH6lFIrmMz7H8W2Zn7M7Ylc=)
---
| The goal of One Less Lemon is pretty straightforward: Elect fewer lemons and put strong, common sense candidates in office instead. How will we go about that? 1) By recruiting common sense candidates, 2) **targeting and persuading** common sense voters who are currently MIA to vote for common sense candidates, and 3) GOTV – **getting our folks to get out and vote** (and vote early!) in general _and_ primary elections. We’ve got to get that 22% up a _lot_ higher. One Less Lemon will be powered by the Common Sense Majority taking [ACTION](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/6d690ccf07540a2d564b1df053b9de1e/eJyVkLEOgjAQht_lZgICsnQjhBACMhidDYFLbIS2aQ8RCe9uUeOkg-vd93-X_2YgFLWgvAUGN7oHQQgOaGy44igokYLq5rkNoq0f-g50XFwyLQcFbP4a_gDrOAyijQM0KbTIYR8nRV5lpzKvCkuqWtsb_3vSXZyXsCw_xdhzSq_WbYCRHnBt1HLbio66s_yZSBnmeeM4ulJgh8Z02EvhNrL3bF_POmqlULTvBxQ4vUzLAzl2Y7c=) starting today. We have a big job ahead of us to turn the tide in 2025 and we need you. There are five actions we’re asking you to consider:
1. [Commit to voting in New Jersey’s 2025 primary AND general elections](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/b59cc10ceb8f7310167a0f6749f4a6a5/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnEXzq4M3kRDRPESdQ3SgpXV3WcfMxP_eWuGpoOvM8z7DOxMQikpQ1kAEd3p4ng8WaKyZYigokYKq-rX1wsD1XQs4E9dUy15BNH0Nr8Ay9r1tYAGNCg1yPMRJnpXpucjK3JCq0ubGn55ws3p2-zgrYJ5_irFltLsZdwcR6R6XRg0zreikueEvRKqLHGcYBlsK5Nh1HFsp7Fq2junrGEelFIrm84Acx7dpfgI9fWO8)
2. [Tell us about a good candidate](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/b59cc10ceb8f7310167a0f6749f4a6a5/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnEXzq4M3kRDRPESdQ3SgpXV3WcfMxP_eWuGpoOvM8z7DOxMQikpQ1kAEd3p4ng8WaKyZYigokYKq-rX1wsD1XQs4E9dUy15BNH0Nr8Ay9r1tYAGNCg1yPMRJnpXpucjK3JCq0ubGn55ws3p2-zgrYJ5_irFltLsZdwcR6R6XRg0zreikueEvRKqLHGcYBlsK5Nh1HFsp7Fq2junrGEelFIrm84Acx7dpfgI9fWO8)
3. [Run for office yourself](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/b59cc10ceb8f7310167a0f6749f4a6a5/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnEXzq4M3kRDRPESdQ3SgpXV3WcfMxP_eWuGpoOvM8z7DOxMQikpQ1kAEd3p4ng8WaKyZYigokYKq-rX1wsD1XQs4E9dUy15BNH0Nr8Ay9r1tYAGNCg1yPMRJnpXpucjK3JCq0ubGn55ws3p2-zgrYJ5_irFltLsZdwcR6R6XRg0zreikueEvRKqLHGcYBlsK5Nh1HFsp7Fq2junrGEelFIrm84Acx7dpfgI9fWO8)
4. [Volunteer (door knocking, phone banking, texting, all that good stuff!)](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/b59cc10ceb8f7310167a0f6749f4a6a5/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnEXzq4M3kRDRPESdQ3SgpXV3WcfMxP_eWuGpoOvM8z7DOxMQikpQ1kAEd3p4ng8WaKyZYigokYKq-rX1wsD1XQs4E9dUy15BNH0Nr8Ay9r1tYAGNCg1yPMRJnpXpucjK3JCq0ubGn55ws3p2-zgrYJ5_irFltLsZdwcR6R6XRg0zreikueEvRKqLHGcYBlsK5Nh1HFsp7Fq2junrGEelFIrm84Acx7dpfgI9fWO8)
5. [Give](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/bb36947baafb0bf47ad26a784983ca89/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCVzzQhvESKieYi6dInFHWpRd5d1jD7wv7d9UJeCrjPP-wzvXIFQcUWZgBhOdGEsBA8sVtJIVLTQinj12LJoEoSBB41UdWp1byC-fg2_gfs4ZNOxB3Q26JD1ar7IszLdFVmZO9Jw62786Yk-nmQ5zwoYhp9ibCUlR-fuICbb472RkK4VbWzj-AOR6WLfF1pxwlFHVhocVbr12Uzvg4phzegkVi1Ptk7HjUElXr_I8fyUDjd5j2cB)

The Common Sense Majority is already on the rise. One Less Lemon will channel the power of our newly awake majority to start saving our state from Left Wing Lunacy – one less lemon at a time :) (The clever lines really write themselves with this one...!) More to come... For New Jersey,
---
|
---
| President
Common Sense Club [Share this newsletter on social media!](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/2ac9132ec1af5dc6840742f1bffc5b26/eJyNkLFuwkAMht_Fc46UpHTIhhBCUYChojO6Xlw49eKzLk5VQHl3TFsxtVIlT_bn75d9AUGyJHULFXzKuShKyCCh8-yRZBFJrPuaFrPHaTnNIHh6X6U4MFSXX5fvwK1dFuVTBnJiVGT3PF809Xa1X9fbRkm2STP-6Zk93D3Lzbxewzj-KcbOy_JD3T1Ukga8XdR6vUpeUlD-KMJ9lecudl2kHrVcGF4nMR1yOaLhYMlINAcUk3xr4psJqKThGLx45y31ueZYZqT250kNnr7TxitLI3FK)
---
| Did you catch our previous email? If not, you can read it here now: We know (by “we,” I mean common sense New Jerseyans, not Hollywood, coastal elites or the mainstream media) that woke extremism is one major reason the Left lost big last Tuesday night. Taxpayer funding of sex-change surgeries for prison inmates. Pushing a sexual agenda on kindergartners. Biological men beating up women in athletics. It’s this type of woke extremism that so many common sense New Jerseyans rejected on Tuesday when Trump got closer to winning New Jersey than any Republican since 1992. Why? Because common sense is that a criminal’s gender transition (or really anyone’s) shouldn’t be the financial responsibility of the taxpayer. Common sense is that children should be children and that indoctrinating them with sexually explicit materials is abusive behavior. And that women shouldn’t be losing medals and scholarships to biological men – who were usually mediocre athletes at best before deciding to compete against women. That’s the “patriarchy” the Left should be worried about. So as we look to 2025 and saving New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy in offices from top to bottom, have candidates on the Left learned anything? Will they be moving from wokism towards common sense to, if nothing else, save their political rears? If you look at gubernatorial candidate Sean Spiller, it’s clear they won’t. Sean Spiller, the President of the New Jersey Education Association (NJEA) has been the center of some controversy for funneling NJEA resources (i.e., teacher dues) to his political campaign. But that’s just the beginning. A few days ago, “Drag Queen Entertainment” posted this video of their presence and “Banned Book Story Time” at... the NJEA Convention. This is on top of convention calls for “queering the curriculum.” The convention theme – “Learning. Equity. Justice.” should have told us all we needed to know. The message at this convention for New Jersey educators? Pushing a sexual agenda on children is not only welcomed, but encouraged. This is grooming, plain and simple. And NJ educators shouldn’t have this agenda forced on them either, especially at a time when our students are struggling and they need to be focused on core academic subjects. This is all going on under President Spiller’s lead and it has his fingerprints all over it. He has all but said he’s running to force his NJEA agenda on the entire state of New Jersey. And let’s just call this like it is – crazy, and dangerous. If the commentary from media elites and leftist insiders is any indicator, Spiller won’t be alone in continuing to push a woke agenda. But unfortunately for them, my hunch is that common sense New Jerseyans aren’t going to take it in 2025 either. So what do we do? It’s simple. 1) Identify more members of the Common Sense Majority. 2) Recruit common sense candidates for the ballot at every level. 3) Get the Common Sense Majority out to vote in the Primary and the General. It might be a simple strategy, but it’s not going to be easy. We need all of us working together to grab back that megaphone and save our state. Here at the Common Sense Club, we want you to feel like this is your home. The place where you aren’t alone in saying “that’s nuts!” and the place where you can do something about the lunacy you see around you. So as you celebrate, make plans to get back in the fight with us because 2025 is just around the corner... Let’s go, Common Sense friends! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/24139656/a79088e7160096a8) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

That’s why it’s also vital that Americans Deep Six the Deep State before they have a chance to deep-six Trump's agenda in the Middle East. **[And we would love to send you the _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ today as a thank you for your support of $25 or more.](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=8tbue3cmifzzk9w0kyt6li2q32qhvgd4r5lbr49scac68bow49n0rq401b0isxffo6od746rhhz89j960buymz0az6ebysc6dlxo88tsl5xiug3k59if4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4fv&__onlt=h "And we would love to send you the Blueprint for the Trump Administration today as a thank you for your support of $25 or more.")** You have the chance to join us in restoring American might and glory both in the Middle East and throughout the world, all while keeping our homeland safe. **Our book,_Reasserting American Power in the Middle East_ , covers all of these issues and much more:**

# [Antifa & BLM's Jan 6 - From the journalist that witnessed it all](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=152849984&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyODQ5OTg0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzM4Mzc3ODEsImV4cCI6MTczNjQyOTc4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zs54eP6cit6lITeVKrn5JsdMIMo1eZnXKmQkIojNBYg)
### It was baptism by pepper spray...
Dec 10
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=152849984&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyODQ5OTg0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMzgzNzc4MSwiZXhwIjoxNzM2NDI5NzgxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1-1jZNcnYZKWirjUO2QMSNmIzuRJuGJp6a8igku5bo0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
