| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/antifa-and-blms-jan-6-from-the-journalist?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[](https://substack.com/redirect/a1a47df0-5f41-44d4-bb1d-4938e47bf339?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[Looking back on my experience](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** covering the widespread civil unrest of 2020 while working as the video director at Daily Caller, it feels like a dream or, more accurately, a nightmare. In many ways it was.
The entire country was spun up into hysteria, hypnotized by fear and existential angst: the 2020 election combined with draconian lockdowns **[made the protests a release for anyone who had been cooped up for months](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and was looking for meaning beyond their next Uber Eats meal or their upcoming work call on Zoom. And that's if they were lucky. If they were not so lucky they still had to show up for work wearing a mask, or they had their businesses shuttered because the government said so.
[Grab your copy now](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Our institutional media and politics did nothing to help. They made it all worse. In my book, **[RIOT DIET](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , I chronicle how powerful media outlets like CNN broadcast hysterical exaggerations of Trump's actions while downplaying the riots that took place in cities across the country on Memorial Day weekend, 2020. I was two blocks up from St. John's Church during the now infamous Trump Bible photo op on Memorial Day Monday. As I state in the chapter, "BAPTISM BY PEPPER SPRAY":
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_A CNN live shot showed me in the center of the screen, cell phone in hand. My eyes darted nervously between outraged protesters and a momentarily calm line of law enforcement who stood behind riot shields that said, "MILITARY POLICE."_
_At the bottom of the broadcast, the chyron, a technical term for the text that makes up the headline on news programs, read, "PROTESTERS NEAR WHITE HOUSE TEAR-GASSED, SHOT WITH RUBBER BULLETS SO TRUMP CAN HAVE CHURCH PHOTO OP."_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/27e08356-0a37-4efe-a278-9934833db1db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_According to CNN, Trump issued a direct order to tear gas the crowd in front of the White House so that he could take photos holding a Bible in front of St. John 's Church. Trump was accused of performing the publicity stunt as a show of solidarity after the church was vandalized and nearly set on fire during the previous weekend of rioting._
**÷ ÷÷**
_Over a year later, an inspector general investigation called this headline into question._
_" The US Park Police did not clear racial injustice protesters from Lafayette Park to allow for then-President Donald Trump's march to St. John's Church last June, but instead did so to allow a contractor to install a fence safely around the White House, according to a new Inspector General Report," CNN itself wrote._
[Get your copy now](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_The "tear gas" canisters were actually smoke grenades, still unpleasant to inhale but a far stretch from the highly caustic chlorine-based compound known colloquially as "tear gas" and technically as "CS gas." Furthermore, "rubber bullets" were not used. Park Police officers used "pepper balls," which are fired from what is essentially a paintball gun, and then shatter into a peppery powder on impact._
_We would learn how much stronger the chlorine-based CS gas was when we traveled to Portland in less than two months. And as someone who has been shot by dozens of pepper balls and a handful of rubber bullets, I can also say that the difference is not a mere technicality. Pepper balls certainly sting and can lacerate the skin --even take out an eye though cops aren't supposed to aim for the face--but the rubber bullets pack a much stronger wallop by far. The Park Police definitely exercised excessive force in clearing what were by all accounts peaceful protesters in Lafayette ahead of the curfew that afternoon, but the claim of "tear gas" and "rubber bullets" was a blatant exaggeration that mirrored Trump's tendency to lie through his porcelain teeth. CNN's reporting was akin to throwing stones inside of a glass house, and it set the stage for a long summer of journalism geared to make the Trump administration look as evil as possible, while details that equated to a more nuanced truth were tossed into the back seat._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Get the book here
Later in the story, I recount how politicians like Bill De Blasio made it nearly impossible for religious services to worship in their churches, mosques, and temples, but gave protesters a pass in America's cultural hub. Here's an excerpt from my New York chapter, "AMERICA'S ARCH OF CONSTANTINE":
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_This relaxed attitude toward the BLM protests came from the mayor of New York City, self-described socialist Bill de Blasio. Ten days prior, he announced plans for bright yellow BLM murals --the same style as the mural Mayor Bowser painted in BLM Plaza in DC--spanning entire city blocks in each of the city's five boroughs. Since the start of the summer, de Blasio repeatedly signaled his support for BLM demonstrators' right to assemble in large gatherings, despite the global pandemic. On June 15, he banned the city-hired COVID contact tracers from asking individuals if they had attended any Black Lives Matter protests. When asked at a press conference why religious services were not exempt from the COVID ban on large gatherings, the mayor replied, "When you see... an entire nation simultaneously grappling with an extraordinary crisis seated in four hundred years of racism, I'm sorry--that is not the same as the understandably aggrieved store owner or the devout religious person who wants to go back to services."_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5b65d77a-1338-4a65-b395-1805621cc370?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Apparently, the police gave the occupied protest concessions not afforded to other segments of the population; much like the cops who never interfered with Gatsby 's ostentatious and alcohol-fueled parties during the height of prohibition because politicians enjoyed the parties themselves._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Get the book here
I also recount how I witnessed Kyle Rittenhouse shoot Joseph Rosenbaum in Kenosha Wisconsin, and was subsequently named both a key witness and a victim. I had my words taken out of context to serve a political narrative rather than the objective facts. Then I was able to correct the record thanks in large part to my Jarhead boss, Geoffrey Ingersoll. But I'll leave that to the reader to learn when they reach chapter 7 in my book (you can also see a dramatic representation of me putting my boss Geoff in a chokehold in the illustration for Chapter 1).
With the so-called "Summer of Love" (and the January 6 riot that was labeled an "insurrection" for which I was a witness with the camera rolling) in the rearview, it is important that we heal from it all and move on. And that's coming from a guy who got dragged through the mud for stating what I saw after I was dumb enough to chase a 17-year old with an AR-15. Oh yeah, and I got called a "rioter who punched a door" by _The New York Times_ , then battled for not one, not two, but maybe three corrections from the Ol' Gray Lady, the alleged Paper of Record, _The New York Times_. I have Geoff to thank for a few of those corrections, and my lawyer to thank for the third correction that may or may not have occurred. But to hear more you'll have to wait for the release of _RIOT DIET 2_ in early 2025.
For now I know this: If we want to benefit in any way as an American people under Trump's second term, our politicians and media professionals would serve us well if they focus more on the facts at hand rather than the perceived politics of those involved. Get over the personal animus that spurs a reflexive _Orange Man Bad_ response. This is America, and individual opinions are one thing. The voice of the people is another. I didn't vote for El Trumpo, but the voters have spoken. It's time to reject the feigned outrage and wake up.
[Grab your copy now](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Pick up "RIOT DIET" today for yourself or as a gift for a loved one:**
Full Color Pulp Nonfiction Edition:
[https://www.amazon.com/RIOT-DIET-Radical-Through-America/dp/B0DM5Y9STF](https://substack.com/redirect/2b0a3d1b-c848-4c05-bbba-2753c8b65b7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Black and White Version
[https://www.amazon.com/RIOT-DIET-Radical-Through-America/dp/B0DM5V2YG1](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2ce-d88e-4727-827d-c07282899fb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Read more from Richie _**[on his Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/66fc2fec-3851-4f96-a92c-d86c9faf8436?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "McGinniss' Gonzo Gazette"**_
* * *

And as someone who has been shot by dozens of pepper balls and a handful of rubber bullets, I can also say that the difference is not a mere technicality. Pepper balls certainly sting and can lacerate the skin --even take out an eye though cops aren't supposed to aim for the face--but the rubber bullets pack a much stronger wallop by far. The Park Police definitely exercised excessive force in clearing what were by all accounts peaceful protesters in Lafayette ahead of the curfew that afternoon, but the claim of "tear gas" and "rubber bullets" was a blatant exaggeration that mirrored Trump's tendency to lie through his porcelain teeth. CNN's reporting was akin to throwing stones inside of a glass house, and it set the stage for a long summer of journalism geared to make the Trump administration look as evil as possible, while details that equated to a more nuanced truth were tossed into the back seat. | | ---|---|--- Get the book here Later in the story, I recount how politicians like Bill De Blasio made it nearly impossible for religious services to worship in their churches, mosques, and temples, but gave protesters a pass in America's cultural hub. Here's an excerpt from my New York chapter, "AMERICA'S ARCH OF CONSTANTINE": | | ---|---|--- This relaxed attitude toward the BLM protests came from the mayor of New York City, self-described socialist Bill de Blasio. Ten days prior, he announced plans for bright yellow BLM murals --the same style as the mural Mayor Bowser painted in BLM Plaza in DC--spanning entire city blocks in each of the city's five boroughs. Since the start of the summer, de Blasio repeatedly signaled his support for BLM demonstrators' right to assemble in large gatherings, despite the global pandemic. On June 15, he banned the city-hired COVID contact tracers from asking individuals if they had attended any Black Lives Matter protests. When asked at a press conference why religious services were not exempt from the COVID ban on large gatherings, the mayor replied, "When you see... an entire nation simultaneously grappling with an extraordinary crisis seated in four hundred years of racism, I'm sorry--that is not the same as the understandably aggrieved store owner or the devout religious person who wants to go back to services." | | ---|---|--- Apparently, the police gave the occupied protest concessions not afforded to other segments of the population; much like the cops who never interfered with Gatsby 's ostentatious and alcohol-fueled parties during the height of prohibition because politicians enjoyed the parties themselves. | | ---|---|--- Get the book here I also recount how I witnessed Kyle Rittenhouse shoot Joseph Rosenbaum in Kenosha Wisconsin, and was subsequently named both a key witness and a victim. I had my words taken out of context to serve a political narrative rather than the objective facts. Then I was able to correct the record thanks in large part to my Jarhead boss, Geoffrey Ingersoll. But I'll leave that to the reader to learn when they reach chapter 7 in my book (you can also see a dramatic representation of me putting my boss Geoff in a chokehold in the illustration for Chapter 1). With the so-called "Summer of Love" (and the January 6 riot that was labeled an "insurrection" for which I was a witness with the camera rolling) in the rearview, it is important that we heal from it all and move on. And that's coming from a guy who got dragged through the mud for stating what I saw after I was dumb enough to chase a 17-year old with an AR-15. Oh yeah, and I got called a "rioter who punched a door" by The New York Times , then battled for not one, not two, but maybe three corrections from the Ol' Gray Lady, the alleged Paper of Record, The New York Times. I have Geoff to thank for a few of those corrections, and my lawyer to thank for the third correction that may or may not have occurred. But to hear more you'll have to wait for the release of RIOT DIET 2 in early 2025. For now I know this: If we want to benefit in any way as an American people under Trump's second term, our politicians and media professionals would serve us well if they focus more on the facts at hand rather than the perceived politics of those involved. Get over the personal animus that spurs a reflexive Orange Man Bad response. This is America, and individual opinions are one thing. The voice of the people is another. I didn't vote for El Trumpo, but the voters have spoken. It's time to reject the feigned outrage and wake up. Pick up "RIOT DIET" today for yourself or as a gift for a loved one: Full Color Pulp Nonfiction Edition: Black and White Version Read more from Richie "McGinniss' Gonzo Gazette" | A guest post by| McGinniss is a DC-based independent journalist with over a decade of experience working for media outlets across the political spectrum. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Middle East Forum
subject: Blueprint for the Trump Administration
body:
Syria Changes Everything for Trump
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=ws88e7twpl46wfe0f24dt3o8aykyxv0hu8orfrsfopjclj8uxjus3tqdlnw6fbg00i3tauf5yymjwwi952lntsq9d0llvthzxdyk6wf3gmooj0232yq74yp0j12q34tkleiap1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4no&__onlt=h) [Mark as Spam](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88ml9xj53p549vqyepw3w5fkr1epfsh39c6zrsow4pjcpeqtiei0pmq7asp3yepdnwh4wdpzawwtzz3jqkm4urto24l2repb&__stmp=soa4no&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88ml9xj53p549vqyepw3w5fkr1epfsh39c6zrsow4pjcpeqtiei0pmq7asp3yepdnwh4wdpzawwtzz3jqkm4urto24l2repb&__stmp=soa4no&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=5943t5amcg1bwcp34zabdjf67hsc60wskg6aq1ahvfknhp6bhw6ak18cl7f4xuwdrbsuw3tdrasd52p7wk3yrdwlfl2ue4en3u6mkkz4fily1vcpzli6ktu0po&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4no&__onlt=h "Headline") Fellow Concerned American: Dynamics in the Middle East are fluid. In fact, they’re changing by the minute in Syria and world leaders are looking to President-Elect Trump for guidance as we saw in Paris! Rather than ensure he hits the ground running, D.C. insiders are doing all they can to stymie him; putting up dangerous obstacles in his path. Some are scared that Trump will restore America's might in this world. **Simply put, they don't want a strong and powerful America.** [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=5943t5amcg1bwcp34zabdjf67hsc60wsl5el0d46ehtnhfv3oyrgm8udcc0sz47f07u9cis5cfbsmn2xbnt59ezbxifa8v4mg2jgumun7jev5mrlye99fdic5c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4no&__onlt=h "Blueprint for the Trump Administration")**But we do.** That's why we've released a _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ that safeguards American values, enhances national security, and strengthens global alliances. And we want to give this to you as a thank you for your support. **[If you want to learn how the Trump administration can effectively confront Iranian aggression, Islamism, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict while restoring America's greatness, then get your copy today!](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=5943t5amcg1bwcp34zabdjf67hsc60wsl63rtud2x00bpfjehk72uz3bkxkgrkstor5bc667iu4kijerd87x1vaasn61hrhxyz9o3t3etmqgdhf8m5wqqohmx8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4no&__onlt=h "If you want to learn how the Trump administration can effectively confront Iranian aggression, Islamism, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict while restoring America's greatness, then get your copy today!")** Our mission at the Middle East Forum is simple – to promote American interests in the Middle East and protect Western values from Middle Eastern threats. Because we know that protecting our border and increasing deportations of those here illegally is tied directly to what’s happening in the Middle East. That’s why it’s also vital that Americans Deep Six the Deep State before they have a chance to deep-six Trump's agenda in the Middle East. **[And we would love to send you the _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ today as a thank you for your support of $25 or more.](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=5943t5amcg1bwcp34zabdjf67hsc60wsl6phkmpkp4w2hgour9kmd1aa6tj88eb5ayf5brim26wtvwu9f4k0fmbzmburuoyir7wfazb9cz16qt6sjuhukjfh1k&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4no&__onlt=h "And we would love to send you the Blueprint for the Trump Administration today as a thank you for your support of $25 or more.")** You have the chance to join us in restoring American might and glory both in the Middle East and throughout the world, all while keeping our homeland safe. **Our book,_Reasserting American Power in the Middle East_ , covers all of these issues and much more:**
* Establishing a “Commission on Islamism” to survey American Islamist movements and establish new approaches for disrupting and thwarting Islamist ideological networks.
* Enhancing Israel’s security by providing it with the material and diplomatic support necessary to defeat Iran’s proxies.
* Enforcing transparency in foreign funding of American universities and curtailing campus extremism.

**It’s time to Make America Safe Again, but that can’t happen unless we deep-six the deep state before they deep-six Trump's agenda in the Middle East.** **[Learn how and get your copy of the _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ today.](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=5943t5amcg1bwcp34zabdjf67hsc60wsl6aor20g593spgd7kxbuls9yqphy1yjg0gsxabyo7h006783h1asx1cy53gf59q77din9gmcllzu12vbwi6zvuert0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4no&__onlt=h "Learn how and get your copy of the Blueprint for the Trump Administration today.")** Please use this Blueprint to increase your expertise and knowledge into what it will take to safeguard America’s might and glory. Keeping America Safe, Gregg Roman
Director and COO
Middle East Forum | | [GET YOUR REPORT](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=5943t5amcg1bwcp34zabdjf67hsc60wsl6kehfzbjpyfhh5jtjsd7ggwy9flgt6up241zloqpvruefjjikqioedwlu76e65u0o7eh0i89o9fzzik89te43clj4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4no&__onlt=h "GET YOUR REPORT")
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88ml9xj53p549vqyepw3w5fkr1epfsh39c6zrsow4pjcpeqtiei0pmq7asp3yepdnwh4wdpzawwtzz3jqkm4urto24l2repb&__stmp=soa4no&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=17x45vzpk5bvq1l47a1yycbz52irqxq3iluaj8zz4w22lvs5rlv5vcantuh8zs7vphwydi7jz47mcsp443qyeabarff443npoy8uieqvgyyqt6bhwdfm96bu87pnf4subal5qaulc9wnx66cvba2604chq3op1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4no&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=27y6m76p6vg8uo9ni1n5wu0tfoi8bcb7hnscoy84lbg6wesrnbkz2d52cmw166jnapfypvbswobhr5nwalnfdx5o6e0itbmxxavz6golp7v9jqes9sjc1ju6v4anmoll4i8srxgo17j8dih9f9d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soa4no&__onlt=h)

name: A.G. Holder
subject: “I never lose. I either win or learn.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
I am confident in the NDRC’s strategy but that doesn’t preclude us from pausing to reflect and learn.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98449212/516705903/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllODljMWMzLWY4YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wpSR5AXdGv9crLtTMiVApo52SkCSRIvkgsc0S9DwSK4=&emci=e65876cc-6db6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9e89c1c3-f8b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, The time for sadness is officially over. It’s time to get to work. Over the last few weeks, I’ve been anchoring my actions and conversations around a quote from a personal hero of mine — the brilliant and principled leader, Nelson Mandela. He once said, “I never lose. I either win or learn.” Like you, I am deeply troubled that Donald Trump was reelected as president of the United States. So as we head into a second Trump administration and a Republican-led government — if we reflect on President Mandela’s quote — we have an obligation to learn. At the same time, we should not lose sight of the important gains made at the state level. When we asked you to be the cavalry, you stepped up. When we asked you to dig deep and give everything you could to protect democracy, you doubled down. **Leaders like _you_ are the most important piece of this movement for fair maps. So as I revisit President Mandela’s quote, I’m hoping to learn from _you_. ** [**I would be grateful if you’d share your thoughts on this election cycle with me. What should I be learning from you and your community? What answers are you still searching for? And if you have a question about the 2024 results or where we go from here, I’d be happy to share my perspectives.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98449213/516705904/-1283250075?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_AGSurvey_email_20241210-NDRC-Tier1-AGSurvey_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20241210-NDRC-Tier1-AGSurvey_&utm_campaign=AGSurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllODljMWMzLWY4YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wpSR5AXdGv9crLtTMiVApo52SkCSRIvkgsc0S9DwSK4=&emci=e65876cc-6db6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9e89c1c3-f8b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045) I am confident in the NDRC’s strategy and our plans to protect fair maps, combat ongoing gerrymandering, and prepare for upcoming redistricting battles — and I hope you are, too. We’ve already seen these efforts pay off. But that doesn’t preclude us from pausing to reflect, and to learn. I look forward to reading your responses over the next couple of days. I’ll answer some questions here over email, and I’ll work to absorb all the lessons you’re learning across the country. There’s no team I’d rather be working alongside as we head into this next phase. We, more than any generation in history, are in control of our own destiny. We are the stewards of our democracy. And we have it in our power to shape where the journey goes next. clean_body: I am confident in the NDRC’s strategy but that doesn’t preclude us from pausing to reflect and learn. | Peter, The time for sadness is officially over. It’s time to get to work. Over the last few weeks, I’ve been anchoring my actions and conversations around a quote from a personal hero of mine — the brilliant and principled leader, Nelson Mandela. He once said, “I never lose. I either win or learn.” Like you, I am deeply troubled that Donald Trump was reelected as president of the United States. So as we head into a second Trump administration and a Republican-led government — if we reflect on President Mandela’s quote — we have an obligation to learn. At the same time, we should not lose sight of the important gains made at the state level. When we asked you to be the cavalry, you stepped up. When we asked you to dig deep and give everything you could to protect democracy, you doubled down. Leaders like you are the most important piece of this movement for fair maps. So as I revisit President Mandela’s quote, I’m hoping to learn from you. I am confident in the NDRC’s strategy and our plans to protect fair maps, combat ongoing gerrymandering, and prepare for upcoming redistricting battles — and I hope you are, too. We’ve already seen these efforts pay off. But that doesn’t preclude us from pausing to reflect, and to learn. I look forward to reading your responses over the next couple of days. I’ll answer some questions here over email, and I’ll work to absorb all the lessons you’re learning across the country. There’s no team I’d rather be working alongside as we head into this next phase. We, more than any generation in history, are in control of our own destiny. We are the stewards of our democracy. And we have it in our power to shape where the journey goes next. Thank you, Eric H. name: Amanda Chase
subject: Decisions are made by those who show up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Showing Up is Half the Battle
| | | | There's no time like the present and no substitute for being present
---
---
|
# SHOWING UP IS HALF THE BATTLE
---
|
# If it's important to you, you'll make a way, if not- you'll make an excuse.
---
| |
---
Life is busy. We can always think of an excuse why we can or cannot do something. I'm asking you now to commit. Be apart of something that is bigger than any one person.
And to be fair, the date and time of this Republican Mass Meeting is not convenient for most people. Friday the 13th? In the evening? During the Christmas holidays? I'm going to say it.
This election is being orchestrated to suppress the vote so that only the hard core committed voters will show up and vote. You know. The party people. And trust me. They don't want me back in there. I was the deciding vote that put the nail in the coffin and made these party processes illegal effective this past July 1. The only reason they're getting away with it this time is because there was an exception made for Special Elections.
They could have chosen a firehouse primary but they didn't. Everyone could have voted in their home county and simply left after voting.
Remember that. And then be determined to do whatever it takes to show up. Overcome every legitimate excuse you have to not be there and show up anyway so that we can continue to return the power to the people.
Now you know why I voted to end these party processes and now they are illegal, with the exception of Special Elections. It's voter suppression and this election will be determined by those who show up Friday.
Be determined. Show up to Friday's Republican Mass Meeting no matter what. You can choose to be apart of history...or not.
What role will you play? What will you do to let people know about voting on Friday? Will you recruit people to go with you?
Anyone is able to participate. They just need to be a registered voter. Then show up with your driver's license between 4:30 and 6:30pm.
You are one of only hundreds of people who will choose who will be our next state senator and who will be our voice to Richmond in the Virginia General Assembly.
The choice rests on each of you who shows up this Friday. Thank you for accepting the call to civic duty when called on, even during the Christmas holidays.
While there are 7 candidates seeking the Republican nomination, I'm the only candidate running who has actually served in the position which we are seeking- Virginia State Senator.
During that 8 year period, I received many awards for legislative achievements, many which you will find in a recent mailer and one that will be made available at the Republican Mass Meeting.
HERE'S WHAT MY SUPPORTERS ARE SAYING ABOUT ME:
* EXPERIENCED
* KNOWLEDGEABLE
* TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE
* SOLID 8 YEAR CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD
* PROVEN VOICE OF THE PEOPLE
* ONLY CANDIDATE WHO HAS ACTUALLY SERVED IN THE VIRGINIA SENATE
* FIGHTER FOR THE PEOPLE
* EFFECTIVE
* BRAVE
* COURAGEOUS

The candidate who wins this Republican Mass will face our Democrat opponent on Tuesday, January 7.
The day after this General Election, the Senate will gavel in within hours of this newly elected Republican nominee being elected.
Remember. The General Election is Tuesday, January 7. Hours later on Wednesday, January 8 at noon, the Virginia Senate gavels in. The Virginia State Senator who wins this seat will literally report for duty within hours of being elected. There is no time for training.
Do you want to elect a Senator who is controlled and told how to vote by staff?
As we speak, Senate Democrats are still in session and meeting in committee to load up the docket with a plethora of legislation to kill, steal and destroy- including a bill to enshrine late term abortion into our Virginia Constitution.
Virginia is in the political war of our lifetime to defend freedom and prosperity. We can't afford to send in an inexperienced senator.
Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in?
I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Why?
8 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE AS A STATE SENATOR I've actually served for 8 years in the Virginia Senate as a Virginia State Senator. No other candidate can make that claim.
8 YEARS OF KNOWLEDGE SERVING AS A STATE SENATOR Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway?
I know how things work in the General Assembly.
There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days.
Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time.
If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled.
There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed.
TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do?
SOLID CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD YOU CAN TRUST I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years.
How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100%?
They can't.
PROVEN FIGHTER FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE PEOPLE Many of you have told me that you are supporting me because I'm a fighter. I've proven myself to you time and time again. You know you can trust me. I'm not a typical politician.
You say that I'm the voice of the people.
A HISTORY OF STANDING STRONG I have an 8 year plus history of standing strong for you during the gun grab of 2021, exposing the 2020 Presidential Election being stolen in 2020 and pushing back against tyrannical Covid mandates, like involuntary masking and Covid jabs.
I didn't just show up on the political scene a few months ago and ask to be your leader.
In order to change things for the better, you have to know how things work. I've done that. And I've been effective at flipping the political tables from top down to bottom up, putting the people in charge of their government. Thanks to my work, you can now watch committee meetings online and with the exception of this Special Election, you can now vote at your polling location instead of spending hours in cumbersome party election processes that suppress the vote and limit participation. I was the deciding vote that put an end to what we are doing on Friday. You should be able to conveniently vote at your local polling location and go home.
LOOK FORWARD TO WORKING WITH THE NEW SENATE LEADERSHIP
I look forward to working with the new Republican Senate leadership.
Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate Republican Senate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases.
Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so.
I had to do it. Although I voluntarily chose to leave the Republican Senate Caucus in 2019, I plan to return in 2025. The Senate now has good conservative leadership that I have worked with effectively in the past. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office.
ENDORSEMENTS I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, NRA board member Denny Fusaro, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, elected members of the Board of Supervisors in both Amelia County and Hanover Counties, and the Chair of the Hanover School Board.
NOT A TYPICAL POLITICIAN I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity.
They can't buy me. I work for you- the people of Senate District 10.
MY CONSTITUENTS TRUST ME The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote.
We need a courageous, proven conservative leader with experience and knowledge to effectively serve Senate District 10 the day after they are sworn in. I have a conservative record you can trust, and I'm ready for battle day one.
For God & Country,

clean_body: Showing Up is Half the Battle | | | | There's no time like the present and no substitute for being present | SHOWING UP IS HALF THE BATTLE | If it's important to you, you'll make a way, if not- you'll make an excuse. | | Life is busy. We can always think of an excuse why we can or cannot do something. I'm asking you now to commit. Be apart of something that is bigger than any one person. And to be fair, the date and time of this Republican Mass Meeting is not convenient for most people. Friday the 13th? In the evening? During the Christmas holidays? I'm going to say it. This election is being orchestrated to suppress the vote so that only the hard core committed voters will show up and vote. You know. The party people. And trust me. They don't want me back in there. I was the deciding vote that put the nail in the coffin and made these party processes illegal effective this past July 1. The only reason they're getting away with it this time is because there was an exception made for Special Elections. They could have chosen a firehouse primary but they didn't. Everyone could have voted in their home county and simply left after voting. Remember that. And then be determined to do whatever it takes to show up. Overcome every legitimate excuse you have to not be there and show up anyway so that we can continue to return the power to the people. Now you know why I voted to end these party processes and now they are illegal, with the exception of Special Elections. It's voter suppression and this election will be determined by those who show up Friday. Be determined. Show up to Friday's Republican Mass Meeting no matter what. You can choose to be apart of history...or not. What role will you play? What will you do to let people know about voting on Friday? Will you recruit people to go with you? Anyone is able to participate. They just need to be a registered voter. Then show up with your driver's license between 4:30 and 6:30pm. You are one of only hundreds of people who will choose who will be our next state senator and who will be our voice to Richmond in the Virginia General Assembly. The choice rests on each of you who shows up this Friday. Thank you for accepting the call to civic duty when called on, even during the Christmas holidays. While there are 7 candidates seeking the Republican nomination, I'm the only candidate running who has actually served in the position which we are seeking- Virginia State Senator. During that 8 year period, I received many awards for legislative achievements, many which you will find in a recent mailer and one that will be made available at the Republican Mass Meeting. HERE'S WHAT MY SUPPORTERS ARE SAYING ABOUT ME: EXPERIENCED KNOWLEDGEABLE TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE SOLID 8 YEAR CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD PROVEN VOICE OF THE PEOPLE ONLY CANDIDATE WHO HAS ACTUALLY SERVED IN THE VIRGINIA SENATE FIGHTER FOR THE PEOPLE EFFECTIVE BRAVE COURAGEOUS The candidate who wins this Republican Mass will face our Democrat opponent on Tuesday, January 7. The day after this General Election, the Senate will gavel in within hours of this newly elected Republican nominee being elected. Remember. The General Election is Tuesday, January 7. Hours later on Wednesday, January 8 at noon, the Virginia Senate gavels in. The Virginia State Senator who wins this seat will literally report for duty within hours of being elected. There is no time for training. Do you want to elect a Senator who is controlled and told how to vote by staff? As we speak, Senate Democrats are still in session and meeting in committee to load up the docket with a plethora of legislation to kill, steal and destroy- including a bill to enshrine late term abortion into our Virginia Constitution. Virginia is in the political war of our lifetime to defend freedom and prosperity. We can't afford to send in an inexperienced senator. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in? I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Why? 8 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE AS A STATE SENATOR I've actually served for 8 years in the Virginia Senate as a Virginia State Senator. No other candidate can make that claim. 8 YEARS OF KNOWLEDGE SERVING AS A STATE SENATOR Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway? I know how things work in the General Assembly. There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days. Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled. There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed. TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do? SOLID CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD YOU CAN TRUST I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years. How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100%? They can't. PROVEN FIGHTER FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE PEOPLE Many of you have told me that you are supporting me because I'm a fighter. I've proven myself to you time and time again. You know you can trust me. I'm not a typical politician. You say that I'm the voice of the people. A HISTORY OF STANDING STRONG I have an 8 year plus history of standing strong for you during the gun grab of 2021, exposing the 2020 Presidential Election being stolen in 2020 and pushing back against tyrannical Covid mandates, like involuntary masking and Covid jabs. I didn't just show up on the political scene a few months ago and ask to be your leader. In order to change things for the better, you have to know how things work. I've done that. And I've been effective at flipping the political tables from top down to bottom up, putting the people in charge of their government. Thanks to my work, you can now watch committee meetings online and with the exception of this Special Election, you can now vote at your polling location instead of spending hours in cumbersome party election processes that suppress the vote and limit participation. I was the deciding vote that put an end to what we are doing on Friday. You should be able to conveniently vote at your local polling location and go home. LOOK FORWARD TO WORKING WITH THE NEW SENATE LEADERSHIP I look forward to working with the new Republican Senate leadership. Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate Republican Senate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases. Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so. I had to do it. Although I voluntarily chose to leave the Republican Senate Caucus in 2019, I plan to return in 2025. The Senate now has good conservative leadership that I have worked with effectively in the past. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office. ENDORSEMENTS I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, NRA board member Denny Fusaro, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, elected members of the Board of Supervisors in both Amelia County and Hanover Counties, and the Chair of the Hanover School Board. NOT A TYPICAL POLITICIAN I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. They can't buy me. I work for you- the people of Senate District 10. MY CONSTITUENTS TRUST ME The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote. We need a courageous, proven conservative leader with experience and knowledge to effectively serve Senate District 10 the day after they are sworn in. I have a conservative record you can trust, and I'm ready for battle day one. name: GOP Outreach Team
subject: YOU Can Shape Our Future.
body:
Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, The American People sent a resounding, clear message this election: _**they’re done with failed, radical, liberal policies**_. As a result, Republicans now have control of the White House, the Senate, and the House! 🦅🇺🇸 **This victory is YOUR victory – and now it’s time to ensure the government you entrusted is working for YOU.** You made your voice heard at the ballot box, but the fight to protect and strengthen America’s future doesn’t stop there. **What happens next depends on what YOU decide.** [**_We’re inviting you to participate in our “Republican Roadmap Survey” – your chance to tell us exactly what you want Republicans to prioritize now that we have the power to lead our nation. >>>_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za9l5q84dtfshnppm8ijpmlj3n6kcae6ill1aoig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3imaob6c9h2bs)

---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi9gf3lfogmtnt00mggui9noltl2n2t4sf6284io_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3imaob6c9h2bs)
---
| | From defending conservative values to securing our borders, strengthening the economy, and building a bright future for our children and grandchildren, **this is your opportunity to make your voice heard****AGAIN****and shape the Republican agenda.** _Why is this survey so important?_ Republicans control all 3 chambers because of YOU. Now it’s time to prioritize the policies we fight for. Whether it’s cutting taxes, promoting energy independence, or tackling inflation, we need to know what matters most to you. **When Republicans listen to the grassroots, we win – for America.** But here’s the truth: We can’t do this without your support. [**_Will you help us turn your priorities into reality? By taking our survey and then donating today, you can help us ensure the Republican agenda you voted for is enacted. >>>_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zia4s2shh9v2i6qsgrq787a8q2q348aq5b85vs7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3imaob6c9h2bs)

---

GOP Outreach Team P.S. The survey only takes a few minutes, but your impact will last for years. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
2025 Legislative Plan - Part One | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9af50cc5b28b/n41kepo7ku-12723413?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2768612223&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

**Matthew 22:37** _Jesus replied, "You must love the Lord your God with all your heart, all your soul, and all your mind."_

2024 is almost over and as we get busy with the most wonderful time of the year, the enormity of what was accomplished this year is simply unprecedented politically. However, we know that ETERNALLY, 2024 is numbered just as God does with all things. I pray that **joy** and **love** are a blessing upon you during the remaining days of 2024 and I truly have **hope** and **peace** for our country's future.
* * *
As we prepare for 2025 both politically and on the legislative front, I am extremely appreciative of all the volunteers and staff that made 2024 such a success. We have many leaders who have stepped up and not only been elected into positions of responsibility, but are actively work for you, the people, of the Republican Party. An Encouraging Reflection on 2024 1\. **Leadership Rising** : Truly servant leaders have shown themselves to be humble and competent at inspiring action and organizing efforts. Their communication, proactive measures, and driven action turned a critical election year into a historical success. The governing body has prepared the plans, opened up communication, and thus yielded amazing results even in the face of those who would make excuses and be distractions. 2\. **Grassroots National Credibility** : Across our many active county parties, the story was the same: a focus on resources and engagement to support the grassroots efforts. As we look at the entire state, we stood tall at the national level and created national political influence and partnerships!! 3\. **Financial Stability** : The party’s fundraising has many streams of revenue now and the fundraising apparatus is accelerating. For all the naysayers and those who have tried to dry up donations, the grassroots and growing coalitions of the Nebraska GOP have stabilized the basic operations, and now we are providing many layers of support to candidates. 4\. **HISTORICAL VICTORIES** : Notable and record breaking numbers for President Trump in Nebraska as we were 10th in the nation for percentage of voters with a little over 60% supporting his _America First_ mandate. We endorsed dozens of candidates effectively, and showed significant ability to coalesce as a grassroots presence, and rallying at every opportunity to further our principles and even go nationwide to elect President Trump. Our local leaders & directors working with Trump Force 47 and the election integrity component showed a level of a proactive election mindset not seen in Nebraska Republican politics. So, now we must pivot from campaign season to legislative opportunities. We must be the voice of the people and utilize the **2025 Legislative Plan** to build relationships to the Unicameral Senators producing effective solutions for ALL Nebraskans. Over the next few emails, I want to highlight key areas of Legislative focus so Republicans voice to their Senators urging bold and formative results.
**NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY
LEGISLATIVE PLAN FOR NEBRASKA
109th Legislature, 1st Regular Session, 2025**

Nebraskans deserve an engaged and purposeful Unicameral. They seek representation from those who have sought their vote and campaign dollars promising to be their constituencies voice. Republican voters desire principles and policies FIRST instead of politics and personalities that stand in the way of a better and brighter future. We have full confidence in the potential of Nebraskans to be insightful and produce for their families seeking a life filled with peace, prosperity, and opportunity. When the Republican platform is advocated for and our Constitutional rights are protected, ALL of Nebraska WINS!

First off, we must discuss the Rules which the Unicameral governs by. Next, we have a national mandate to secure our elections. We must denounce our current election system and be purposeful in finding solutions to promote a constitutional government of, by, and for the people in Nebraska.

_MODERNIZE NEBRASKA LEGISLATIVE RULES TO REFLECT
“WE THE PEOPLE”_ The integrity of the Nebraska Unicameral has been eroded by outdated rules that do not promote best practices for legislation and the needs of its citizens. It is way overdue for legislators to change their procedural rules to make the legislative process fairer and more efficient.
* **Lower the Cloture Vote Threshold**
* Advocate for lowering the cloture vote threshold in the Nebraska Legislature to facilitate smoother passage of key legislative initiatives, ensuring that important bills are not indefinitely stalled by minority obstruction. **Change the cloture vote requirement to 3/5's (30)**. The number to override a Governor or a minority group in the legislature should be the same.
* **Require open and transparent senator votes when electing legislative committee chairs.**
* Implying that secrecy is needed to protect "deal-making" erodes the integrity of the institution and completely erodes the trust of constituents.

_MAKE OUR ELECTIONS SECURE BY MAKING IT HARD TO CHEAT_ The foundation of our self-governance is liberty, and the core expression of the people’s liberty is the ability to cast their ballots in free and fair elections. Every eligible Nebraska voter should have the opportunity to cast one ballot, at one time, that is counted once. Anything that fails this simple test is a failure of the system, and people committing voter fraud must be held accountable.
* Winner Take All legislation must be passed.
* Strengthen Voter ID laws
* Drastically reduce mail-in voting policies which encourage fraud
* Allow citizens at the county level to determine how their votes are tabulated
* Improve chain of custody processes
* Require all local political subdivision elections be held on even year election cycles
* Adopt ballot security measures to ensure that no counterfeit ballot is counted
* Increase voter confidence in elections by more transparent accessibility to ballots, voter rolls, changes in voter rolls, and cast vote records.

We will have more Legislative Plan to promote and much work to do. In the next Coffee letter we will discuss taxes and education!
We will have preparations and planning to accomplish.

**We have to Make Nebraska Great Again**.

The truth shall set us free.

With much blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood
---

subject: GOP Senator Probes FBI Response To Alleged Iranian Hack On Trump Ally Kash Patel
body:
Trump Train News

GOP Senator Probes FBI Response To Alleged Iranian Hack On Trump Ally
Kash Patel
https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg15b44lgrcsl006r5ad1n79ips219kn7n66dg18_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3imeoj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kugn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnk9g64ob7khh6f834sujjfc3lkpqj7d1heup7b83ieup3adjlkcp39dd2ekr70ttjmpqjb8bnmmi33cdl6sqj2dd4m9q37d5k6eqq1d1m6qqqfctlk5p7atdgemi33cdkumjb8djgmmg78cbl66rq49fg

https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z500kaphlsum4p7t3hgru81n968jriqlied12ceg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t1e9qnbc3he9q39ctjmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9gmf932cug69pt76uo7b9jl6eq32ttiemg74tti6kr7b8pi6iqq4t9me1rr7djl6mgnfdd466oradpl64qq9cjk6eqb8ctlk2q3cdllkuprb8bielqr0td466or9td6mgr71dd0egonacdnk8gq48bi4bh28pr6cpgeapr2c9ie49fg

In a letter sent Monday, Republican North Carolina Sen. Thom Tillis
pressed the FBI to explain revelations that Iranian hackers targeted

**Christ is the final victor, and he will come again...**
**Follow Kathy Barnette through the book of Revelation in a chapter-by-chapter study that will help you understand what it meant to the people at the time it was written, and what it means to Christians today.**
Even in John's day, many Christians wanted to know when Christ would come again--when the plan of salvation would be accomplished. Throughout the book of Revelation, in all of its confusing images and prophecies, God's stunning faithfulness and love is on full display as he offers up every chance for sinners to claim redemption and join him forever.

body:
We need an immediate surge of support to defend Kash before it's too late.

| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztmfe2nli6mtmbjd9r93n7br73g35sr8o5t063pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im9o32c3h2bs)
---
The Radical Left's petition to REMOVE Kash Patel from President Trump's Cabinet has reached **THOUSANDS of signatures** in just a **FEW HOURS.**

body:
We are still in shock that the Biden Justice Department went as far as to launch legal challenges against Virginia and Alabama for attempting to remove non-citizens from their voter rolls.

| |
---
| | | We are still in shock that the Biden Justice Department went as far as to launch legal challenges against Virginia and Alabama for attempting to remove non-citizens from their voter rolls.

_What a disgrace._

House Republicans believe that it's our sworn duty to make sure 1) only American citizens vote in our elections 2) a valid photo ID is presented at the ballot box, and 3) American elections remain free and fair.

**_[So I'm calling on YOU, the American People, to take an official stance and demand proof of citizenship for voters nationwide.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z75ma5o1fphid3ojegt5os5ojia6dn74sm8uqij0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im9o36cph2bs "So I’m calling on YOU, the American People, to take an official stance and demand proof of citizenship for voters nationwide.")_**

subject: Thank President Biden for his leadership >>>>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Folks, with Election Day behind us, we've reached the beginning of the end of President Biden's Presidency.**

So we’re sending a HUGE Thank you letter to Biden for all of his service to our country.

[**We need 20,000 good Democrats to sign it with us — read below and sign the letter »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85326?t=6&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85327?t=7&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85327?t=8&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx)
---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: Thank you.

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

You capped prices on prescription drugs.

You protected good-paying union jobs.

You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: _You will go down as a truly GREAT American President._

**I respect your decision to step aside from the race, and I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do.**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. It's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85327?t=9&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85327?t=10&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18173%2E878179%2EDfHiIx)

name: Steve
subject: Take an official stance: Demand proof of citizenship for voters nationwide.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We are still in shock that the Biden Justice Department went as far as to launch legal challenges against Virginia and Alabama for attempting to remove non-citizens from their voter rolls.

| |
---
| | | We are still in shock that the Biden Justice Department went as far as to launch legal challenges against Virginia and Alabama for attempting to remove non-citizens from their voter rolls.

_What a disgrace._

House Republicans believe that it's our sworn duty to make sure 1) only American citizens vote in our elections 2) a valid photo ID is presented at the ballot box, and 3) American elections remain free and fair.

**_[So I'm calling on YOU, the American People, to take an official stance and demand proof of citizenship for voters nationwide.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0hfpjp0gg6negoccbfj8s1o50b46c9ht7la05p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im9p74cth2bs "So I’m calling on YOU, the American People, to take an official stance and demand proof of citizenship for voters nationwide.")_**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION ->
REQUIRE PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zo2m5u6svhtqrdkjpotoq633bjsfa5febv6rk1bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im9p74cth2bs "SIGN THE PETITION → REQUIRE PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP")
---

We have less than one month before the 119th Congress so I'm urgently requesting your support.

**_[Will you step up and join me by signing the petition today?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ze1sn65reje3vf2khkp2lmbudjri3nnpmdkr5fv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im9p74cth2bs "Will you step up and join me by signing the petition today?")_**

For America,

**Steve Scalise**
Majority Leader

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zr0f7e91mnubqqcdco56ppj1eb6et03j5jjiiq00_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im9p74cth2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztf4ir6lu3dlaei87u1dq0tgfkgmu1f0ie4cj7k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c3im9p74cth2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Santa Claus... The AMAZING Real Life Story
body:
It is almost Christmas! I decided to record a 7 minute video about the truth regarding Santa Claus. I tell the story that you were probably not told
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9721.1.37cfbc2cdd35217e5ec0aa5549039736) |
---
**It is almost Christmas!** I decided to record a _7 minute video_ about the truth regarding **Santa Claus**. I tell the story that you were probably not told growing up. It is an AMAZING story... Watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RZdSPvHtK4U](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9722.1.c021111a263b149dc958b71ebcd09361) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ WATCH: The Truth About Santa Claus ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9723.1.f75ac08c6b748e68de9eebc0a2a1c619)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9724.1.f7fa63a0b77c66f53b18276b7e18e62e)
---
You are invited to come _meet_ and _hear_ from [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9725.1.63252d04a50f3efb32546af5568f65c9) on Thursday, March 6 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9726.1.73f7bf16dd7775c98e8b4c089b51fd00) in Tulsa, OK. In October, we had **Eric** at **Sheridan** and it was an incredible event. You can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/livetrump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9727.1.a92761294b8c96284efafd47bd1c5608) However, this March will be even better because **President Trump** will already be in the **White House** and we will hear _exclusive insights_ from **Eric** of what is taking place in the **Trump administration**. There will also be other guests at this event that we will announce as we get closer. Seating is **VERY** limited for this event. Please [RSVP](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9728.1.e295c54367d50f9e16af5cc1bfd0f69b) here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9729.1.c3e7fe6744cea49a51d0d402fc6e151f) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: Eric Trump | Tulsa, OK ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9730.1.8bc01f195b92fdb555e16d7f54d0d64e)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9731.1.8b05282efbacc93736fe6b5a5cc75816)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9732.1.b1cffe1d497eb82fab8f312dc3ace8ef), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9733.1.2023947d51a32791b8b9015926e299ae). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9734.1.e367f99541f41a1054ae9135e79a0e2d)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9735.1.95be1e4032f26b2097b338922753d8d6) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church** -Sunday, December 22 @10am: **Sheridan Christmas Concert** -Sunday, January 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9736.1.6620117eacd283b4896dcd9c236f446d): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9737.1.ed1812b4ed114c18dc8824651859f6a2)
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9738.1.c09fc63c4068faffd4a4e894a279e7ae)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9739.1.af9e9da25488eeca35bbced3c3f878ca), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9740.1.be9ed91f7acd84f00d6c1e531b66b298), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9741.1.4cd338709f20ecfc135950aa6b8aaa3e)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9742.1.193ca0878d3ceecccff441a8d61dbd4c), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9743.1.cc93ccd820fc37484ee1708b1083868f), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9744.1.7c0ffb3067dfca3be1f1c3d61474293b), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9745.1.77806b3cd1fe03917b10ff47d9b51534), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9746.1.21c88b24e42fbcc84eea51ae0698509e), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9747.1.8a3e6b91ae2c1d8f8a5b74e6d5c8c061), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9748.1.3dd8be5c0f683fd68dc90eac8ed2d993), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9749.1.fa4e91eec720b858629d3ff147f9dccb), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9750.1.c823888233ab101656fc2250d751e79a) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!
---
---
©2024 Jackson Lahmeyer | Tulsa, OK
---
| [Web Version](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9751.1.fcb3a8433624efe08139979eb774c3dc&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODUxMDk2MzgtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtNGNkNTY5MjdlNTE2MTc1ZjY1M2MyZDVhMGRlZjllNzc2NTBlNjE0OSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMTgwNzIyNTYifQ== "Web Version") [Preferences](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9752.1.cef60c9dfb2072db2157ba201c4f685d&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODUxMDk2MzgtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtNGNkNTY5MjdlNTE2MTc1ZjY1M2MyZDVhMGRlZjllNzc2NTBlNjE0OSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMTgwNzIyNTYifQ== "Preferences") [Forward](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18072256.9753.1.46052f254c80ef03af0f05efd8703dd1&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODUxMDk2MzgtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtNGNkNTY5MjdlNTE2MTc1ZjY1M2MyZDVhMGRlZjllNzc2NTBlNjE0OSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMTgwNzIyNTYifQ== "Forward") [Unsubscribe](https://gem.godaddy.com/opt_out?pact=18072256-185109638-13583593210-4cd56927e516175f653c2d5a0def9e77650e6149 "Unsubscribe")

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: Honor to work beside you in 2024!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
####
# Thank You!
---
| As we reflect on 2024, we’re proud to share some of our biggest victories at Solidarity Strategies. Your partnership helped make these achievements possible!
### Congressional Wins
* Darren Soto – Re-elected in Florida’s 8th Congressional District (FL-09)
* Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC) – Re-elected in New York’s 14th Congressional District (NY-14)
* Gabe Vásquez – Elected in New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District (NM-02)
* Lauren Gillen – Defeated Anthony D’Esposito in New York’s 4th Congressional District (NY-04)
* Pat Ryan – Defeated Alison Esposito in New York’s 18th Congressional District (NY-18)
* George Whiteside – Defeated Mike Garcia in California’s 27th Congressional District (CA-27)
* Adam Gray – Defeated John Duarte to flip California’s 13th Congressional District (CA-13)

### Senate Wins
* Tammy Baldwin – Re-elected to the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin
* Ruben Gallego – Elected as Arizona’s first Latino Senator

### City Council Wins
* Vanessa Fuentes – Re-elected in Austin City Council District 2
* Capt. Steve Friedman – Elected to the Islamorada Village Council in Florida

In each of these pivotal races, we played a critical role in engaging Latino voters and ensuring their voices supported Democratic progressive values. As one of the nation’s largest Latino-owned and operated consulting firms, we’re proud to have contributed to these historic wins and plan to continue building a more inclusive and representative democracy. Here’s to another year of solidarity, progress, and partnership in 2025!
Warmly,
The Solidarity Strategies Team

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: On Daniel Penny – there are no ‘ex-Marines’
body:
Christine Flowers | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Christine Flowers_ : There are no ‘ex-Marines’_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3cefac5cd&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| “Eighty-three years ago, our national innocence was shattered...

... for those who ran to recruiting stations the moment they heard about the tragedy in Oahu, and for their families, and now their descendants who remember the stories as I do, it was the moment when America said: 'We have this. We are doing this. We are coming, now...'"

"I see a distinct connection between Daniel Penny, the young man who is on trial for killing a deranged ex-felon who terrorized passengers in the New York subway by screaming that he didn’t care if he went back to jail, and the men of December 7th..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=214081dbbc&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|
## About Christine Flowers:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=69cb0bfed9&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Christine is a lifelong Philadelphian, who has a deep attachment to the region. She has been practicing immigration law for over twenty-five years with a specialization in asylum and refugee law, after having taught high school French and Spanish at area schools. In addition to her legal practice, Christine is a syndicated columnist whose opinion pieces appear in newspapers across the country, as well as a regular participant in local radio and television programs that focus on current affairs. A graduate of Merion Mercy Academy, Bryn Mawr College and Villanova Law School, her local roots run deep. This can best be expressed by the fact that her mood is directly related to how well the Eagles, Flyers, Sixers and Phillies are playing at any given moment. Christine is an aunt to one human, two Black Labs and a bearded dragon.
---
|
---
| We at [_Broad + Liberty_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f6a7d65e72&e=b7b3eddce2) are proud to present Christine's writings, and to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government.

Read more columns on [w](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d7c0dcf5fa&e=b7b3eddce2)[ww.broadandliberty.com](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=12c34fef54&e=b7b3eddce2) — updated daily and as news breaks.

subject: SWEEP the tax "arm" or...
body:
| Hi Peter, _WHAT is she doing?_ You're in the rice and soup aisle at the grocery store when... You see a lady with her arm _shoulder deep_ in the soups, sweeping everything she can reach off the shelf into her cart. You think, _"What on earth would possess her to shop like that?"_ A store clerk politely asks what she's doing. You hear her say, _"I'm not sure what I want, so I'm getting everything."_ THIS is what many taxpayers do with [**their tax strategy**](https://financeinsights.net/8p2jf5b7YSwlM4aHvK8OxTG51xV?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). They cast a wide net and _hope_ they save money on their taxes. It doesn't make sense at the grocery store... and it doesn't make sense on your tax plan. SAVVY investors, like you, don't rely on a catch-all strategy. EVER! Instead, they: Make sure they know every practical tax strategy available to them [**BEFORE important deadlines like Dec 31, 2024**](https://financeinsights.net/8p2jf5b7YSwlM4aHvK8OxTG51xV?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Discover crucial opportunities often missed by the "Average Joe" investor. And more importantly... They NEVER let their hard-earned dollars slip through their fingers because they're "not sure." Good news! You now have access to this **FREE GUIDE:** [**Discover 5 Strategies You Can Use Now to Lower Your Taxes...Before Dec 31, 2024**](https://financeinsights.net/8p2jf5b7YSwlM4aHvK8OxTG51xV?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Inside, you'll find:
* The costly "domino effect" that can result from tax law changes (and what to do)
* Specific tax-saving opportunities to consider BEFORE income tax rates increase
* The Dec. 31 tax "bunching" strategy used by many high income earners

You have an **important** decision to make. Will you cast a wide net and hope your current tax strategy catches all the available opportunities? OR Will you act NOW and not let potential tax savings slip away? Will you look back on today and think, _"I received the tax guide at the perfect time. I found tax savings that I would have missed. I almost gave the government too much money, but instead, I took action and saved money that would have otherwise been lost to me forever."?_ **READ NOW** : [**Discover 5 Strategies You Can Use Now to Lower Your Taxes...Before Dec 31, 2024**](https://financeinsights.net/8p2jf5b7YSwlM4aHvK8OxTG51xV?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

Sincerely,

name: Team TFVC
subject: TFVC Tuesday: Showdown in the Texas House
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjMyMDkzMjc1MTkxNzc3NTU5JmM9aDhzNyZlPTAmYj0xMzk0ODcwODc1JmQ9dzVuNWExYg==._NG0_wmjClEhICQdYA9XutxtGtROK5n6amVP3RuYylg)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| On Saturday, members of the Texas House Republican Caucus met privately to decide who they would endorse to serve as **the new Speaker of the House**. The significance of this decision and its impact on TFVC’s mission cannot be overstated; the Speaker **sets the tone for the entire Legislative Session** by appointing Committee members, who are ultimately empowered to move or stall legislation that comes before them. While 2023 was a very successful year for medical liberty, it did not come without its hurdles in the House as all too frequently, legislation moved swiftly through the Senate **only to die on the House vine**. **These patterns must end, and Representative David Cook has signaled that he is ready to change the dynamics if elected as Speaker. ** ****In fact, he is now the candidate endorsed by the Texas House Republican Caucus to lead the chamber. However, Representative Dustin Burrows, also a Republican, has mounted a campaign against him and there are at least two Democrat Representatives who have also entered the Speaker race. As of this moment,**no candidate has enough committed votes to constitute a majority** , which is the threshold to meet on January 14 when the House gavels in and conducts a floor vote for this position. It is worth mentioning that neither Cook nor Burrows responded when our Political Director asked for a statement about how they plan to defend vaccine choice as Speaker, but **a vast majority of the Representatives and Representative-elects who were recommended by TFVC during the 2024 election cycle have endorsed Cook**.

---
---
| |
---
| TFVC in the News

---
| |

subject: Official J6 Pardon Petition
body:
