Peter – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=aecbd93854494ad9ad841dfc69618c42&_e=3RfnwkOJHEwNYMfwnFIKnOeRG_LQc8SktIkoXV7OIVr-M-7X5CgZtRExynm75lxgt61jJf9k56L486V0s3pptxUVgAA4I7Qa5sILAzZWyVZ5jb9WAJnMvd4MoFE01_-7D2Uv6SCDcbbYbLMvbJ9hu22rUlwqdDXS23YlT-1rctPw2r87PkIQU0nu0uSq1vSwdrSlJBBSGfjoHcwFccA1y8hSg4ad7bI1_Cm5wl6tDTD4Qt3T_Fs0YT-s519fNqZm2KQUCizTwiEp77KjpEOm_4Qn_bAKiOyLUTs3P4pJsOF9JTkn2JwP5O_dUy6nVdQ81xIj-XK7UvrWNaNC-9S92NbUTIVgZJ1SUGhFF2L8EjG2RicSQ3OFz239VoEJzOW4rTViGjGnDJef4sx7_wFJ5Vj0bvUu223a_xeDFsC3ilY%3D)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=aecbd93854494ad9ad841dfc69618c42&_e=3RfnwkOJHEwNYMfwnFIKnOeRG_LQc8SktIkoXV7OIVr-M-7X5CgZtRExynm75lxgt61jJf9k56L486V0s3pptxUVgAA4I7Qa5sILAzZWyVZ5jb9WAJnMvd4MoFE01_-7D2Uv6SCDcbbYbLMvbJ9hu22rUlwqdDXS23YlT-1rctPw2r87PkIQU0nu0uSq1vSwdrSlJBBSGfjoHcwFccA1y8hSg4ad7bI1_Cm5wl6tDTD4Qt3T_Fs0YT-s519fNqZmZJQj4Uxz65gWux02iCf6mZ8PC5EJua4aM0AJwPgAbSFpSIpubnh1S_MbEYBp6uZVVEMgwwy8UeVqVDOE8Fqvhb3oO2iXtmTb3PGTf2QbuUsgBX3ZLzyQkLwpAhpdAtqbJo3DEDrCFIRrMlcT5YD2OAEUYg5hdi34Ci4urcL9jsQ%3D)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Peter — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=aecbd93854494ad9ad841dfc69618c42&_e=3RfnwkOJHEwNYMfwnFIKnOeRG_LQc8SktIkoXV7OIVr-M-7X5CgZtRExynm75lxgt61jJf9k56L486V0s3pptxUVgAA4I7Qa5sILAzZWyVZ5jb9WAJnMvd4MoFE01_-7D2Uv6SCDcbbYbLMvbJ9hu22rUlwqdDXS23YlT-1rctPw2r87PkIQU0nu0uSq1vSwdrSlJBBSGfjoHcwFccA1y8hSg4ad7bI1_Cm5wl6tDTD4Qt3T_Fs0YT-s519fNqZmfiSOdIKLDCs6-EsmGL_QNIYisnJqAbs_nA2w78HLw2DmqpgdmC38UaClvEcBIcAjeYxmrrJBWYWad0LQUdZoACLUVbkSAxq43f-RV7rjqYJdVjvDNZQoZ9IV8HT-tRICvkQ52dkfVEqufpTKN97-cxQYSYKsI6e4B4V8AmY63p8%3D)_**_** _._**
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=aecbd93854494ad9ad841dfc69618c42&_e=3RfnwkOJHEwNYMfwnFIKnOeRG_LQc8SktIkoXV7OIVr-M-7X5CgZtRExynm75lxgt61jJf9k56L486V0s3pptxUVgAA4I7Qa5sILAzZWyVZ5jb9WAJnMvd4MoFE01_-7D2Uv6SCDcbbYbLMvbJ9hu22rUlwqdDXS23YlT-1rctPw2r87PkIQU0nu0uSq1vSwdrSlJBBSGfjoHcwFccA1y8hSg4ad7bI1_Cm5wl6tDTD4Qt3T_Fs0YT-s519fNqZmFs4BeNnZvuUYAQdz3bBE_ms52O4Wo3v7oyCf0MLUVgpNIWQXovIbl83Z0zf2ofBvsqP6w-rxj6c4gVZOqtdZLKrof22m6mdMpBZ33UG-mJQmcZFPeU9f9Xyk2W_lRE5ScUhhjmyQ_7gRCgWjjKePncHMrZMvShiMADFSlA69DjI%3D)
Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!
_Yours Sincerely,_
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=aecbd93854494ad9ad841dfc69618c42&_e=3RfnwkOJHEwNYMfwnFIKnOeRG_LQc8SktIkoXV7OIVr-M-7X5CgZtRExynm75lxgt61jJf9k56L486V0s3pptxUVgAA4I7Qa5sILAzZWyVZ5jb9WAJnMvd4MoFE01_-7D2Uv6SCDcbbYbLMvbJ9hu22rUlwqdDXS23YlT-1rctPw2r87PkIQU0nu0uSq1vSwdrSlJBBSGfjoHcwFccA1y8hSg4ad7bI1_Cm5wl6tDTD4Qt3T_Fs0YT-s519fNqZmqwRVsyCjoPLfI_wCUUfYOSCJ8bDNlo-xJO4FhjmF2Ln656zADl5vynhUEVJRiV16nypRZS0P3qqDfGL222CZIFKfwS_8KifJAAFpqWp-2a3LHFBZxft-9kOLWelhSIqk5FHDFu5C_9Sojyh97oKRmvjPvIMisAkm9CzO7btvITE%3D)

name: John McGuire For Congress
subject: McGuire State Senate Letter of Resignation/ US Congress Swearing in Ceremony
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia
body:
McGuire achives huge VA05 Vote Record
| | | | [View as Webpage](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I5YYk64Qj-KIIE89FrB-9Wxy6lS-PdRB93qyV3Z9D228iHsr2ldXCT-M-nthcUEd-fuIZBzzOTme3MbUrbc-0djM9h3rn6ySuOqXI8mZv8JVsZbGH38-dOinB3yPJVxvA8mYAhMLETtuO7KS_wIybg==&c=5_rycrzkX7_h5SkGpIBMgEOR_VrPwCrFoVngf_MXpwtoGPgfxVgx2g==&ch=zxMgFwLZVzQpxbMAi8vEYbgNNjPZo16tnZpFciL6PYz2JcFae2XH1g==)

| [Please Contribute Here](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I5YYk64Qj-KIIE89FrB-9Wxy6lS-PdRB93qyV3Z9D228iHsr2ldXCYh-yKN1qCejYsRCt-002w9rfTaBljd7hmr0G9ovzBpVkVOYDdN6jkclma4eso-lq7VVY1lVCt29t9v8nwy6KgEYLdfi9Rsvfgk0ANvZXmLWCHNZ72JR5WKtuIXwqXscSndse7daVkwnzO_t5bSGpsDIFWd-ag7Exha4fGpg10akD74zd9a7e4mV7zoZCcMScQ==&c=5_rycrzkX7_h5SkGpIBMgEOR_VrPwCrFoVngf_MXpwtoGPgfxVgx2g==&ch=zxMgFwLZVzQpxbMAi8vEYbgNNjPZo16tnZpFciL6PYz2JcFae2XH1g==)
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
Friends,

Through the grace of God, it has been the privilege of a lifetime to serve my community as a Virginia State Senator. I could not have done any of this without my best friend and wife Tracy McGuire. Archer McGiffin, my legislative aide, has done an incredible job helping me with constituent services and legislation in the House and the Senate. Thank you for your trust in me to represent and fight for your values in the General Assembly. It has been an honor working together with many new friends and talented professionals in the House of Delegates and State Senate to solve problems for we the people. What they taught me about working with others to help constituents will transfer to the House of Representatives.

My team and I have had much success working as a team with constituents, fellow legislators, Governor Glenn Youngkin, and others to solve 5 year, 20 year, 30 year problems and more for fellow Virginians. It was a huge honor when Governor Glenn Youngkin named me Landing Team Chairman for there Secretary of Defense and Veteran Affairs.

My favorite accomplishment in the General Assembly was helping a Vietnam Purple Heart Veteran who had 26 US Marines die in his hands in Vietnam get his American Flag/ Flag pole returned after a 20 year battle that ended unsuccessfully at the US Supreme Court [click here.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I5YYk64Qj-KIIE89FrB-9Wxy6lS-PdRB93qyV3Z9D228iHsr2ldXCT-M-nthcUEdIKDLXHqPMMSPnjujDi3S0BZm_bHbK5L2RwjsaNW674SkMs9gJTRxOwM6-YORrq96wezUMNxssFc_cvml44J0Kr_TLdsIo4AAj3hN5_wH8w9-xBN8jr7BP_Mapt8h5d4R_qC7DxceopJ_lwfICr9pC_-p7cOzBzvlksM6mU5tVo00-Nh_uLbW9_O2Ce-BxcggTcCDEbm-ZG8CNrJegKa0PCUkpS_Bc1CoLAf2y_jZ8VjV4gvnz7OYfNzmduX4bWGWhx_Oq63pNZAFEcJIjE80lStJHGqLqZz8uqMnWWvuaQJFErSgnYeFTAnzi3vG0qYmG9xNjr6PTxTB4up3Hsc7kzjxpfRdGhlI3qktJe6bF5xuMIgdd3UDy5G5j4pYLESt&c=5_rycrzkX7_h5SkGpIBMgEOR_VrPwCrFoVngf_MXpwtoGPgfxVgx2g==&ch=zxMgFwLZVzQpxbMAi8vEYbgNNjPZo16tnZpFciL6PYz2JcFae2XH1g==) A bill that has saved many lives, is my bill that gave school nurses training and put narcan and naloxone in every elementary school, middle school, and High School in Virginia [click here.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I5YYk64Qj-KIIE89FrB-9Wxy6lS-PdRB93qyV3Z9D228iHsr2ldXCT-M-nthcUEd8A1u_YnrzyF4UDZzVYgkMbrS-Rvz3PKAVp9orFdC_FSk_kyOkj_ioxK9q3yoj8U71wOaImu0XSk27G5zafYQ0PUOLYwNQip0Bt4Frdi7QidxMbMGKp9dgiykupNric7FWkJZXa9lypGSmsM1dNemQekTqDa8LQnf&c=5_rycrzkX7_h5SkGpIBMgEOR_VrPwCrFoVngf_MXpwtoGPgfxVgx2g==&ch=zxMgFwLZVzQpxbMAi8vEYbgNNjPZo16tnZpFciL6PYz2JcFae2XH1g==)

We received a policy maker of the year award, a legislator of the year award, we staunchly protected our 2nd Amendment rights, we passed a pro-life bill this year, and this year again we received the highest award for conservatism in Virginia, the Champion of Limited Government Award.

Each year my team and I were able to pass bills where every democrat and every republican voted yes. It really is amazing what we can achieve when we put our differences aside, treat others with respect, and work as a team. In doing so, we can sometimes turn a no into a yes and the impossible to possible.

My team and I have been working with leadership and this morning I submitted my letter of resignation from the Virginia State Senate to Senator Louise Lucas, effective just before I get sworn into Congress the morning of January 3rd.

My party, the Republican Party, has already scheduled a nomination process to identify my replacement, scheduled for this Friday 13, December. Many know, I have a reputation, with the help my consultant Sean Brown, of helping fellow Republicans campaign and win all over Virginia. It is my hope voters this Friday will choose a strong candidate who loves We The People, has a reputation of working with others as a team with respect, and someone who has never wavered on our core Republican values. As you know, Governor Glenn Youngkin often says and exemplifies we can disagree without bring disagreeable.

Many know we decided to run for Congress after receiving countless complaints around the 5th Congressional District about our current congressman for his disrespect towards fellow constituents. We have a country to save. We do not have time for that nonsense. It took awhile, I answered the call, and we had a spirited race. We The People of the 5th District have spoken!

Now I look forward to my next chapter in representing you and my larger community in Congress VA 05, a district that includes almost all of State Senate District 10. On January 3rd, I will become the first Congressman in history to live in Goochland County.

[Click here to RSVP and get details on my swearing in ceremony to Congress scheduled for January 3rd.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I5YYk64Qj-KIIE89FrB-9Wxy6lS-PdRB93qyV3Z9D228iHsr2ldXCT-M-nthcUEdwc-j39XRQznpmOjAJyfYcWlYBtUwlUoYbacFoNL9hKJtp30Qse35Xals8s0kv1ONkHvstJkZ8kYLVSz31RgDJMNSUsPsFPN5HQqkU5OVX_UmCxHmfeguiyTF2A9R3ef2ks-u_A7tqb8Xl-Xqp0pQP_TvX3fG72UTjERkYXhnTcXaXfTng8IJjQ==&c=5_rycrzkX7_h5SkGpIBMgEOR_VrPwCrFoVngf_MXpwtoGPgfxVgx2g==&ch=zxMgFwLZVzQpxbMAi8vEYbgNNjPZo16tnZpFciL6PYz2JcFae2XH1g==)

On November 5th, through the grace of God, Trump won, we won the US Senate and the House, and John McGuire received the most votes ever in Virginia's 5th district! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. We have much work to do. I am looking forward to serving you in VA 05 as a member in the 119th Congress!
| |
---
| For God and Country,
---
|
---
State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria
Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL [Business Owner](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I5YYk64Qj-KIIE89FrB-9Wxy6lS-PdRB93qyV3Z9D228iHsr2ldXCY7GNDkKbYzvcy_29Ejc_KYHdlofcoD4pJcAzpf5f8i6YHNJyfztBPSr_Uw9dEN3wSwRg0FkS89faTB1I6tFxNajtumidvIUEQ==&c=5_rycrzkX7_h5SkGpIBMgEOR_VrPwCrFoVngf_MXpwtoGPgfxVgx2g==&ch=zxMgFwLZVzQpxbMAi8vEYbgNNjPZo16tnZpFciL6PYz2JcFae2XH1g==)

clean_body: McGuire achives huge VA05 Vote Record | | | | == | == | | | | | | Friends, Through the grace of God, it has been the privilege of a lifetime to serve my community as a Virginia State Senator. I could not have done any of this without my best friend and wife Tracy McGuire. Archer McGiffin, my legislative aide, has done an incredible job helping me with constituent services and legislation in the House and the Senate. Thank you for your trust in me to represent and fight for your values in the General Assembly. It has been an honor working together with many new friends and talented professionals in the House of Delegates and State Senate to solve problems for we the people. What they taught me about working with others to help constituents will transfer to the House of Representatives. My team and I have had much success working as a team with constituents, fellow legislators, Governor Glenn Youngkin, and others to solve 5 year, 20 year, 30 year problems and more for fellow Virginians. It was a huge honor when Governor Glenn Youngkin named me Landing Team Chairman for there Secretary of Defense and Veteran Affairs. My favorite accomplishment in the General Assembly was helping a Vietnam Purple Heart Veteran who had 26 US Marines die in his hands in Vietnam get his American Flag/ Flag pole returned after a 20 year battle that ended unsuccessfully at the US Supreme Court == A bill that has saved many lives, is my bill that gave school nurses training and put narcan and naloxone in every elementary school, middle school, and High School in Virginia == We received a policy maker of the year award, a legislator of the year award, we staunchly protected our 2nd Amendment rights, we passed a pro-life bill this year, and this year again we received the highest award for conservatism in Virginia, the Champion of Limited Government Award. Each year my team and I were able to pass bills where every democrat and every republican voted yes. It really is amazing what we can achieve when we put our differences aside, treat others with respect, and work as a team. In doing so, we can sometimes turn a no into a yes and the impossible to possible. My team and I have been working with leadership and this morning I submitted my letter of resignation from the Virginia State Senate to Senator Louise Lucas, effective just before I get sworn into Congress the morning of January 3rd. My party, the Republican Party, has already scheduled a nomination process to identify my replacement, scheduled for this Friday 13, December. Many know, I have a reputation, with the help my consultant Sean Brown, of helping fellow Republicans campaign and win all over Virginia. It is my hope voters this Friday will choose a strong candidate who loves We The People, has a reputation of working with others as a team with respect, and someone who has never wavered on our core Republican values. As you know, Governor Glenn Youngkin often says and exemplifies we can disagree without bring disagreeable. Many know we decided to run for Congress after receiving countless complaints around the 5th Congressional District about our current congressman for his disrespect towards fellow constituents. We have a country to save. We do not have time for that nonsense. It took awhile, I answered the call, and we had a spirited race. We The People of the 5th District have spoken! Now I look forward to my next chapter in representing you and my larger community in Congress VA 05, a district that includes almost all of State Senate District 10. On January 3rd, I will become the first Congressman in history to live in Goochland County. == On November 5th, through the grace of God, Trump won, we won the US Senate and the House, and John McGuire received the most votes ever in Virginia's 5th district! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. We have much work to do. I am looking forward to serving you in VA 05 as a member in the 119th Congress! | | | For God and Country, | State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed -Mark Levin Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America 1st The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | | == | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242 | Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 US | | | | | | |

Most Americans know very little about America's founding.

In today's public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we're dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That 's why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers. **

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I 'd like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage's _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

name: Liz Urban
subject: This will remind you of the babies you’re saving
body:
As we celebrate the miracle of Christ’s birth, we’re reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=e7fad1636e714192a522683361114cc9&_t=SnXohxTr5hBgbCn0Kt7p4dx63vjvFNFGb1cDNBgBJUJjYUIACkIqURE-elOrs0IdQGTqalpz1_369vd82lPgZzVR8RJC5n7w5FbRAhX1OUi1Df5kLBH-ClJz0KZdbEO6)_
---
[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e7fad1636e714192a522683361114cc9&_e=nksq4o9Rkl7yBUPKO7xvNQ3jHjLqhWzyejOucAbRh_AenCvwvMeU9jPUKHujACm1OWesfYlIiCwe9T7G73hQt2BCcrE0hUu3oUhGGXoBopJWAAEbAWuXkhhpOGB-QvcQwHRMatNSBVslsCHYJD1yP64SC917jN2zn2uIuCMTMJ0ERzhlxXgT_ZoMpOM8BWRT9yn8pFSd3iUfR1jyO9pLa6ur7mG4wb0uWUps8Nvm5Hthlqhx1jcZpDPvR9cEOcdm1c7hyWtUFMVccRx16qp1t4PwHs_PaNXmGrXLjcMybe_7npRmJYYViDGWNd3fwsvdT4T6OVOY0HjF1XYUgyxjnx7es8uftywds7-LEbuTW6Q%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

As we celebrate the miracle of Christ's birth, we're reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine. Yet, thousands of preborn children are at risk every day. Many women facing unplanned pregnancies feel alone and fearful, but your support can offer them hope.

This Christmas, you can help spread the truth that **children are blessings, not burdens.** We're looking for caring, pro-life people like you to step forward and donate $100 or more to give preborn children at risk of abortion their very first Christmas.

What better gift can you give this Christmas than the gift of life itself?

And, when you give a gift of $100 or more today, we'll send you a beautiful etched glass Christmas mug for free as our heartfelt thanks for your support. Each time you hold this mug, you will be reminded of the children who will experience their first Christmas because of you. clean_body: As we celebrate the miracle of Christ’s birth, we’re reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Friend of Life, As we celebrate the miracle of Christ's birth, we're reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine. Yet, thousands of preborn children are at risk every day. Many women facing unplanned pregnancies feel alone and fearful, but your support can offer them hope. This Christmas, you can help spread the truth that children are blessings, not burdens. We're looking for caring, pro-life people like you to step forward and donate $100 or more to give preborn children at risk of abortion their very first Christmas. What better gift can you give this Christmas than the gift of life itself? And, when you give a gift of $100 or more today, we'll send you a beautiful etched glass Christmas mug for free as our heartfelt thanks for your support. Each time you hold this mug, you will be reminded of the children who will experience their first Christmas because of you. Please stand with us for life this Christmas. Every donation helps reach those who need to hear that life is precious. Your generosity will help change hearts and save lives currently at risk this Christmas season. Click below to make your gift and secure your exclusive mug in time for Christmas. For Life, Liz Urban Donor Service Manager 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 .

name: Andy Kim

body:
I want to thank you for placing your trust in me to be New Jersey’s next Senator.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98471655/516763106/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTlhZDJjZi0wZmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lq7RkZjFH-fatoCHFHTxyyke0RzaNFshGw-G2yJhPL4=&emci=257ebde1-5ab6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=ae9ad2cf-0fb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=26261389)

| | Yesterday, I was sworn in to the U.S. Senate – and it was a moment of gratitude for me. **I first want to thank you for placing your trust in me to be New Jersey's next Senator.** Whether you supported our campaign by donating, volunteering, voting, or spreading the word about our movement, I am humbled and grateful for your support. **Whether you voted for me or not, you're my boss, I'm here to serve you in the Senate.** We have a long road ahead of us, but I know we can still make progress on the issues that matter most. I thank you not just for being with me on this journey, but for being with me on the journey ahead. And I thank you for the incredible honor – for this Jersey kid who never thought he'd be able to say this – to be _New Jersey's United States Senator_. Thank you again, _Andy_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98471656/516763107/-1197072038?refcode=2024-12-10-senate&recurring=&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ae9ad2cf-0fb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTlhZDJjZi0wZmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lq7RkZjFH-fatoCHFHTxyyke0RzaNFshGw-G2yJhPL4=) |

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c396f7fdb41e4be4b6b5a23a342c1071&_e=axlXi2BW4nakasepZU6SY5sWgXzGCQI-BQZcw53JIcDSKqQ0hKCLgk39hVJKX-WP1G1Nvge07CMsHFjOz1O2Ur3kCjRYaXla2CjFvclN27QQLerz-2kwiQfjbjL4YcfAzuB-WK4PA8rjX-bh3Aisbd1YUgIgEcnhGhzFbY4d_THWDwsvJefhTA7sc0IZyru4Y7YeTT6T1jVMWVn4zN0A5ggdczG13mXmvYTiSfvd6K1YpQtVEtPM3gEyBSkXbhQ6WueNpVn-f6r4pDj4mDmFKuaixqroup87BNp5AU5XGaxaya87SQelipkRwGCUOiwRTnhH9_tU9cwdbMKN_JvYLFF0Wvvmqhre4Yydm1n8o99a-WoHEXeJH59x-Ll8m-jr56cDDvpG9xI2zef5fybmnQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c396f7fdb41e4be4b6b5a23a342c1071&_e=axlXi2BW4nakasepZU6SY5sWgXzGCQI-BQZcw53JIcDSKqQ0hKCLgk39hVJKX-WP1G1Nvge07CMsHFjOz1O2Ur3kCjRYaXla2CjFvclN27QQLerz-2kwiQfjbjL4YcfAzuB-WK4PA8rjX-bh3Aisbd1YUgIgEcnhGhzFbY4d_THWDwsvJefhTA7sc0IZyru4Y7YeTT6T1jVMWVn4zN0A5ggdczG13mXmvYTiSfvd6K1YpQtVEtPM3gEyBSkXbhQ6Ppgio08ugAzjX08XhmXWAxtVUCWWMVJAQ1wzmZq66eDqixPny7DoaI8JQKLPrh_LuKGnEdFTqGVhDbExPgA8GJhqaTcFYKcBDNaBdEgeOSG1kJa-VLB9WHuUX1eqkP1MOZNyEVoMc29I4AU1VEcFLQ%3D%3D)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c396f7fdb41e4be4b6b5a23a342c1071&_e=axlXi2BW4nakasepZU6SY5sWgXzGCQI-BQZcw53JIcDSKqQ0hKCLgk39hVJKX-WP1G1Nvge07CMsHFjOz1O2Ur3kCjRYaXla2CjFvclN27QQLerz-2kwiQfjbjL4YcfAzuB-WK4PA8rjX-bh3Aisbd1YUgIgEcnhGhzFbY4d_THWDwsvJefhTA7sc0IZyru4Y7YeTT6T1jVMWVn4zN0A5ggdczG13mXmvYTiSfvd6K1YpQtVEtPM3gEyBSkXbhQ6JNGqEkp5y3gQxZPqB1JE9CC1PEpQDKxNb2CSVpGSUvTy58q2WWosBGi_c1LCxHYWC7OyjOOmWRjQhB45oNYvKwbDpqfHtDABsVPfoNlEUM7OOA_l7Qa61XbYSHm8-svOaPFJyWlRsgDWAxHGo4a-cQ%3D%3D)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

Look, I know the easy option is X’ing out of emails like these. But the truth is that they’re an important part of our campaign strategy.
Much of our fundraising relies on what supporters like you give through the emails you get from me and my team. So, when fewer people are opening and reading these emails, our fundraising dips as a result.
That means less raised and less invested in our campaign in critical early months like these. And with Republicans feeling emboldened about their odds after our razor-thin victory, we need to be firing on all cylinders to keep this seat out of their hands.
**[So, if I can still count you as part of our grassroots team, can you chip in $10 or more right now? I’d be so grateful to have you in this fight with us. 🙏](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98472902/516766432/1921673955?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.10_GettingMyEmails_B1_F1_S1_C1_70DA_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzAyNGUzOS0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLlSfirS5ZJhmcyrqSJ0vKYRF4mAhZjZ5Aj4wJ3vvoo=)**

name: FWD: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Urgent re: saving our health care – need your opinion, NOT money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | [**Thousands of Democrats have already taken my Save Our Health Care Survey and shared their feedback with me – _but I still don’t see your response._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473649/516768993/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) [_**It’s absolutely critical I reach 25,000 responses before midnight to get an accurate sample size and ensure Democrats have the feedback we need to strengthen our strategy. Will you take a moment to record your response right away? It would mean so much to me. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473650/516768994/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) \-------- Original Message --------- | GALLUP:
[**Approval of the Affordable Care Act is near “HIGH POINT”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473651/516768995/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219)

_The poll also found that an increasing number of Americans believe it is the government’s responsibility to ensure all Americans have healthcare coverage._
---
[_**I just launched my Save Our Health Care survey – and I’ve selected you to be one of the FIRST to share your insights and help devise Democrats’ plan to STOP Donald Trump’s attempts to destroy our health care. I need 25,000 responses to build an accurate sample size with reliable results – will you please take 3 minutes to fill out my survey before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473652/516768996/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219)
[**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473653/516768997/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) Trump tried and failed more than 60 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act – which 50 MILLION Americans rely on for direct coverage and which protects 140 MILLION Americans with preexisting conditions.
[**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473654/516768998/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) Folks like YOU hosted 10,000 events to help people share their personal stories across the country – and we STOPPED him.
[**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473655/516768999/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) Democrats need to step up ASAP to BLOCK his plans once again.
Right now, Democrats are organizing to Save Our Health Care – and we’re relying on your insight to help us devise an unbeatable strategy. [_**That’s why I’ve selected you to be one of the first Democrats to complete my survey and share your thoughts. I need 25,000 responses before midnight to ensure reliable results and build a foolproof plan to stop Trump again. Please, I’m counting on your insight more than you could know. Will you submit your feedback before midnight? It will only take 3 minutes. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473656/516769000/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) **[NAME:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473657/516769001/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) **dpwillis67@gmail.com

Here’s what would happen if Republicans get their way on health care:
* 50 million Americans directly covered by the Affordable Care Act would lose health insurance immediately.
* 140 million Americans with pre-existing conditions could be denied coverage.
* Young adults would no longer be able to stay on their family plans until age 26.
* Prescription drug prices would skyrocket.

I’ll be honest.
**[Passing the Affordable Care Act into law was the happiest day of official life.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473660/516769031/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219)**
Because I knew it would save lives and make Americans happier and healthier.
Now, with the open enrollment period starting, millions of Americans are choosing their health care provider – we need to ensure that the health care they chose today is with them throughout 2025.
[_**With so much at stake, I’m asking you one final time. Together, Democrats STOPPED Trump’s disastrous plans to crush our health care during his first term. We can do it again – but only if grassroots supporters like you step up and share your insight. I need 25,000 responses to build a large enough sample size to ensure accurate results. Will you take 3 minutes to share your feedback and help us Save Our Health Care from Donald Trump and Republicans? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98473661/516769032/-487728681?source=20241210_em_pet_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdlYjBjNi0xMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGjmK8jKK7GBOIPr9sZZE6U-G9YOp72GfnRXOa587g=&emci=bfb3822b-64b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b17eb0c6-10b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219)
I’m looking forward to reading your responses.
Thank you,
Nancy

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 -

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e9559f8ce37f4d628c45b91db1e7f656&_e=75lSVFIWIu72NVoods_M8zNPA98tsWcqcT6YGPtC8NG9AgD1gNI2qqwvFAK984bQiCCf-5odwnkTA2KjvldUmdJtwZQaaQ2jssy7qRac5vXNjf0JZHG3oUNEL1nlB6mMj9DZlGVzMEIEd3-B01rTdgHzp5G7OQvA9Z72cNmBFPXK944cCN6ytnykFTH9hZIaGpRQ4f7RkRVmMpY9FxUw_mNR21Djo4eOeIOe7d3xtTTuUO5dupVQR_b8xQDbTBz-k9THhVoP1DmZTSllWfytSY-Wv3IGMtX4p51-myk6nVSrn4vnxqlJPiGWN-IrZtNb2w8p-wvWY29TSqg39Fw8sjhh83O9GiuBp2eV_NaSu7IOtxmw1var2SC4JKAuIYM3rtjURA2Bm7DNLCFAvTo8XX-eX7V6jfLXMzPp9_KO-MsotXmo7zyvzrw48UMTA9aU)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e9559f8ce37f4d628c45b91db1e7f656&_e=75lSVFIWIu72NVoods_M8zNPA98tsWcqcT6YGPtC8NG9AgD1gNI2qqwvFAK984bQiCCf-5odwnkTA2KjvldUmdJtwZQaaQ2jssy7qRac5vXNjf0JZHG3oUNEL1nlB6mMj9DZlGVzMEIEd3-B01rTdgHzp5G7OQvA9Z72cNmBFPXK944cCN6ytnykFTH9hZIaGpRQ4f7RkRVmMpY9FxUw_mNR21Djo4eOeIOe7d3xtTTuUO5dupVQR_b8xQDbTBz-k9THhVoP1DmZTSllWfytSUlxA8yhStizLQb8fJTDCKw8Nu480D72RVe2zoCcPlHeeIxHANBpoKYRULdEd8fRMWcABkEHGzJ12J1MCn3t3HbHXTsnJ_5EOMu74JrLqVpEJLN8dJei4C0ZP2RdbKRM6LqMTI1p-h51q0yYvqRIWGHVwUAyTVRyrsbnICdgUCra) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e9559f8ce37f4d628c45b91db1e7f656&_e=75lSVFIWIu72NVoods_M8zNPA98tsWcqcT6YGPtC8NG9AgD1gNI2qqwvFAK984bQiCCf-5odwnkTA2KjvldUmdJtwZQaaQ2jssy7qRac5vXNjf0JZHG3oUNEL1nlB6mMj9DZlGVzMEIEd3-B01rTdgHzp5G7OQvA9Z72cNmBFPXK944cCN6ytnykFTH9hZIaGpRQ4f7RkRVmMpY9FxUw_mNR21Djo4eOeIOe7d3xtTTuUO5dupVQR_b8xQDbTBz-k9THhVoP1DmZTSllWfytSa9igd1s5OEt7bsV6lKmtGBZoAi8h0TPWDvmHxfR8kfS8uzzTQDqx5KLKzJBk8AhcJxxwEfXVbrd20Zy_2l28J5QCg0Eyze6nRcsS0Fcgv76fQAEMgMDEVCf81ddLTEZaHcIzAWTvPhO-Ai8RuPPdhgTCJMXK5z-FH6WZ50F99X5)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
Following our historic Republican victory.

[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

By sending President Trump back to the White House, flipping the
Senate, and defending our House majority, voters like you delivered a
clear message:

You asked us to clean house in Washington so that _your_ government
would once again work for _you_ – the _PEOPLE_.

But there are those on the Left who – despite such a historic
mandate from voters – would still have you believe that putting our
country and _American_ citizens first is “extreme.”

THAT’S WHY I MARCHED RIGHT INTO THE BELLY OF THE BEAST ON _CNN_
FOLLOWING THE ELECTION TO COMBAT THEIR LIES AND FALSE NARRATIVES ABOUT
VOTERS LIKE YOU, FRIEND.

[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

_I went on air to PROVE that the American people demanded change –
and that no matter how hard they might try, the Democrats cannot deny
the voice of the people. _

But to fully prosecute my case against the Left’s continued lies and
smears, I’m counting on grassroots Americans like you to share YOUR
top priorities as we prepare to fight for you on DAY ONE of the new
Congress.

SO PLEASE, TAKE THE PEOPLE’S AGENDA SURVEY AS YOUR REPUBLICAN
ELECTED OFFICIALS COME TOGETHER TO PUT AMERICA ON TRACK FOR A BRIGHT
NEW FUTURE.
[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

TAKE THE SURVEY
[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Thank you – and let’s get to work and save our country.

[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Jim Jordan

TAKE THE SURVEY
[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

name: Lila Rose
subject: Defund Planned Parenthood Petition
body:
Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=e3b2697403934972b21effb5151f30b6&_t=iu_EX9N9ZhX7WoWJ0UcAbf6X2KCvUBkMhy8WP11zILFvKF73kPNThWSTtuN0ABnhkcdX2rJOeP_obxEa8-wqHTKsoAFBDkWdSQzTPJL7kHrwqNh4l7fFbgu2BAaNo1cc)_
---
[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=e3b2697403934972b21effb5151f30b6&_e=Y26GUnLUnyxBEsr1qLV9no7E9Vc3XqTmTQiJqIiv_chQCc9k2NTpwdhe-siYrCK7a7PFmL7ZeNMr6bgBzPQfULIz6RS5pO23k1K51YcYnDIs1pEwJ9qFUM22YcefzYNdMnKPYP6kRZz9CQ0gkSiD9Y9ukDkgf3VX2LkcdQ99pd7P6K34xmsfbWA42JQ4UW-Xfw4mM1EEeokQSR6zmUAGC6Iho-FfI38Au9IN3pY5SL1feoFhhknpG920cyNMGkKhe_Lw2Gkp2j5YAKssNx3mC0g4ZnhZohlaFcIb8BX2ce5B2almuBLtVNvS_H_XKsxn-b4DZFCdBS4HveCszMoaWmnhSD8CcvNGH1QaAw5m_9-PdIyliVrF3c3NN9gvJyMKYcJA4iwBxLMzaaJvghzfgw%3D%3D)
#
Dear Friend,

Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood. This means that by the time you finish reading this email, another innocent life will be gone.

Despite the Supreme Court ruling in the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , Planned Parenthood continues to receive taxpayer funding, effectively subsidizing the intentional killing of preborn children. Since 2000, nearly $10.7 billion of taxpayers' money has funded their life-ending work.

Contrast this with the nearly 3,000 Pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide dedicated to supporting expectant mothers. Planned Parenthood only operates about 600 facilities and primarily offers one service: abortion. Alarmingly, they perform 62 abortions for every prenatal care service they provide, and prenatal care services are down 80% since 2010.

As a pro-life individual, I know you don't want your hard-earned tax dollars to support an organization that prioritizes abortion.

That's why I'm urging you to join us to demand an end to this taxpayer-funded ongoing tragedy. A new Congress and president will be chosen this November, and they need to hear from us _now_ that America does NOT support funding Planned Parenthood.

Make your voice heard. Sign our petition before midnight to demand an end to this grave misuse of your taxes. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=e3b2697403934972b21effb5151f30b6&_e=Y26GUnLUnyxBEsr1qLV9no7E9Vc3XqTmTQiJqIiv_chQCc9k2NTpwdhe-siYrCK7a7PFmL7ZeNMr6bgBzPQfULIz6RS5pO23k1K51YcYnDIs1pEwJ9qFUM22YcefzYNdMnKPYP6kRZz9CQ0gkSiD9Y9ukDkgf3VX2LkcdQ99pd7P6K34xmsfbWA42JQ4UW-Xfw4mM1EEeokQSR6zmUAGC6Iho-FfI38Au9IN3pY5SL13I4sLBvTwY0jjC5sF3otlHaFoMbe8Bsdm0wQSzNQK3A1223RqW9AM_zahQH8tLQKT9hAMYXVejj_WqvSQ8OYfprTzurplSuDYOeQNSIYPwj_IQDWZ4saq00-PJoopLqdh58abHwxcruhVGfs-69dmu-AbC3Mw7Q4prSzy2aoQwA%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing with us for the protection of future generations!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=e3b2697403934972b21effb5151f30b6&_e=Y26GUnLUnyxBEsr1qLV9no7E9Vc3XqTmTQiJqIiv_chQCc9k2NTpwdhe-siYrCK7a7PFmL7ZeNMr6bgBzPQfULIz6RS5pO23k1K51YcYnDIs1pEwJ9qFUM22YcefzYNdMnKPYP6kRZz9CQ0gkSiD9Y9ukDkgf3VX2LkcdQ99pd7P6K34xmsfbWA42JQ4UW-Xfw4mM1EEeokQSR6zmUAGC6Iho-FfI38Au9IN3pY5SL1sOdJqaB61VmQ0bkFdKNkGKflQe3VIDW-zgKEjYCiyxsAYo91lHhY8atnqP0Yf4LXMdhWOIIhs9ptlUcumy5FGByp_vfSh00YEZGXE6eVfDeZqDArxS5B-e5MEN16UYO9gmqhwdsKFtFmbFgv830MHKW8IH_dHvMaE_x5en7Ru8A%3D%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Stand up for our founding principles
body:
Most Americans know very little about America’s founding.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa2015e610e84addb6c78b8e345eac14&_e=qdNIdd3cBY8y-lh8qAVAmgIaeQKFoVokoKvkkJcXi155XN1k68CnKivmohsGXhRDQwmpt5s5FTFCjygfPZoFX3LkEH4q3iBibkroiRC1dtHvO-yRnRRfqi40mtDMpq_rw96tcL62Jmgh48J_zrstfL9ZfwRPlt3GhKE2zh4aVRiIOQjIseIJZ2SJaSkTCGoqkrWgx1SODyKXhJVphNu8Nl4nN6cHhAdsEjQ6OiXbGn9G--Zxwn74tvs1udVO74klnGHbnw49pS15aNw1wMfKN6OtdA17SoK26aY-O6VJsWMpCuJ7qVzfPZ-1_ygqyMrbNFuRaKkChWKJIdUo3kp5ohIBZ4I0g7uKUAVZCyd6iNLm8R6rdQZ82StIMnQoafIe1dFkuHKIZ4SKCtveUq8VVg%3D%3D)
---

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa2015e610e84addb6c78b8e345eac14&_e=qdNIdd3cBY8y-lh8qAVAmgIaeQKFoVokoKvkkJcXi155XN1k68CnKivmohsGXhRDQwmpt5s5FTFCjygfPZoFX3LkEH4q3iBibkroiRC1dtHvO-yRnRRfqi40mtDMpq_rw96tcL62Jmgh48J_zrstfL9ZfwRPlt3GhKE2zh4aVRiIOQjIseIJZ2SJaSkTCGoqkrWgx1SODyKXhJVphNu8Nl4nN6cHhAdsEjQ6OiXbGn-YbBwfBvQTmh6AnV9Rxs94_Q-xC1yG9RVhTWkIU6Iu8TTZbpJcRaMZPO9XpDRnPG9TlvtwOwHmMdOiNdckUL1yOsAVst7B3H6RN20fLIYGWcJckesfhTQtqHdP_Pk7VTRms7IFGDcLE-1-YI5cT0bgihd2ySRdb3SJsGnNjQkpDA%3D%3D) Fellow Conservative,

Most Americans know very little about America's founding.

In today's public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we're dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That 's why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers. **

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I 'd like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage's _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/get-your-free-founders-almanac-ebook/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa2015e610e84addb6c78b8e345eac14&_e=qdNIdd3cBY8y-lh8qAVAmgIaeQKFoVokoKvkkJcXi155XN1k68CnKivmohsGXhRDQwmpt5s5FTFCjygfPZoFX3LkEH4q3iBibkroiRC1dtHvO-yRnRRfqi40mtDMpq_rw96tcL62Jmgh48J_zrstfL9ZfwRPlt3GhKE2zh4aVRiIOQjIseIJZ2SJaSkTCGoqkrWgx1SODyKXhJVphNu8Nl4nN6cHhAdsEjQ6OiXbGn-CcOgRbpE3IoysTtRshRrwlHQH2UPH7Ae-yuwtiQRYe60S6aFNhxP4RsxinMxJX8rHJa2aYD1ptdq7mHlHQNwkPQ1hDz1LK9cP5el7MRlW7SzXhLwvfvzAJjMwkQuWwRttlOhYIHzeOykYKHGLy9w-La9dIS1T1fa3oTTQr4Dw0w%3D%3D)**

Please use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and stand up for our founding principles.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs_mrPxW6N
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as
someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os_mrPxW6N

Take it
from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole
life...

Take it
from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole
life...

Fellow
Conservative,
Please --
for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone
who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
You are
absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into
your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms
children.
You may
remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best,
Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.
But today
when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the
Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

And the
result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about
what you can and cannot say...
...and
they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean"
ideas.
Today you
have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are
turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly
values we love.
Today,
I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first
children's television show that actively fights back against the
groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical
values that made America great.
And it's
only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you.

Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.
This
ground-breaking live-action television show captivates
children...
...but
more importantly, it builds their character at the same time.
Imagine a
children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a
greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.
Courage,
honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a
biblical and traditional lens.
Imagine a
children's show that brings families together instead of driving
them apart.
Now
imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible.
Because I
can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding
Supporter.
Season
One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled
episodes planned.
And each
episode costs around $70,000 to produce.
I know
that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it
would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio.
And
obviously we won't work through Hollywood.
Hollywood
has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and
hijack our children.
We
parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to
rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture.
That's
why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to
help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.
Whether
you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything
higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are
needed and greatly appreciated.
As your
special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the
$35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses.
For example, if your Founding Supporter Gift is $50 you will
receive:
** All
ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family
to enjoy FREE on DVD.
** And a
FREE copy of my children's book: Pride Comes Before the Fall
which teaches children to be humble before God instead of
prideful.
It was my
honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write Pride Comes
Before the Fall with the great team at Brave Books -- the same
God-focused conservative team that's bringing Adventures with
Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life.
Maybe
you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News,
Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets.
Unabashed
conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson,
Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave
Book to stop the Hollywood groomers.
Supported
by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild
our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our
country was founded upon.
Now I
know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the
next ten minutes.
But I
hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter
of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.
Hollywood
groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we
rebuild from the ashes.
And it
starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with
faith and family -- not filth.
Thank you
for joining us as a Founding Supporter.

Sincerely,

Kirk
Cameron

DONATE

Brave
Books
13618
Poplar Cir, Suite 302
Conroe,
TX 77304

Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great. And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your Founding Supporter Gift is $50 you will receive: All ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And a FREE copy of my children's book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. Sincerely, Kirk Cameron DONATE Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-76928337638-echo3-1537DB4B733BF5F112DFCEC80DD48EE9@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount/Conservative Connect----

name: Team NPPEF
subject: “I came for the tacos, and I leave with a voice.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
Our work is making a direct and clear difference, and we wanted to share one example of that with you today: | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98475945/516775010/223756894?refcode=EM_F_241211voice_N_NPPEF_90DO_7_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3MzQ4NGIzLTE0YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ObquGGdzLF20lpq1QQzhSRAy938ZD-FF04T_JzEs18=)
---
| | Friend,

Consistent voter engagement has never been more important. That is why we are committed to year-round voter registration and civic education to ensure that our democracy is reflective of EVERYONE in PA.

**Our work is making a direct and clear difference. We wanted to share one example of that with you today:**

New PA Project Education Fund hosted a Party at the Polls event in Harrisburg ahead of the November 5th General Election. Our staff met a young woman (pictured below) who said she was already registered to vote, but previously thought she was unable to participate in the election due to having a felony. Our staff checked her registration status and let her know she was able to vote, and then helped her make a plan to get her to her polling location on Election Day!

She told us, _**“Indeed, this was the right shirt to wear today. I came for the tacos, and I leave with a voice.”**_
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98475947/516775012/223756894?refcode=EM_F_241211voice_N_NPPEF_90DO_7_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3MzQ4NGIzLTE0YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ObquGGdzLF20lpq1QQzhSRAy938ZD-FF04T_JzEs18=)

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Sen. Mike Padden joins the team & Inauguration update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Great news for our Eastern Washington constituents. | | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,
I’m delighted to announce that Senator Mike Padden will be officially joining my Eastern Washington Congressional Office as Senior Advisor.
Mike’s illustrious career in public service started with the College Republicans while he was at Gonzaga with Fred Flintstone ;) and has included distinguished stints in the House and Senate and as a local judge. In addition to being a great friend, perhaps my favorite thing about Mike is that he notably cast the first ever electoral college vote for Ronald Reagan.
I’m extremely pleased that Mike will be able to help advise on policy and assist us in serving constituents across Eastern Washington.
Thank you, Sen. Padden – let’s get to work!
---
|
---
| **Inauguration Update**
It’s great that so many of you have expressed an interest in attending the Presidential Inauguration on January 20th. Here is where things stand. I learned this week that my office will receive approximately 200 tickets. So far, we have received about 400 ticket requests, but I am energetically in discussions with other Congressional colleagues about receiving a portion of their tickets. So, hopefully we will have more.
We hope to begin notifying the first batch of ticket recipients next week. Those who receive tickets will need to provide photo ID and pick them up in person in Washington D.C. on Sunday January 19th.
I have also been informed that both Sen. Patty Murray and Sen. Maria Cantwell have been provided with Inauguration tickets and that Washington state residents can also apply on their official web sites.
I don’t control tickets to any of the Inauguration balls, but for those who come out to DC, I plan to attend the Texas “Black Tie & Boots Ball” on Sunday January 19th. Tickets for the ball can be purchased [here](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=d887cad80a&e=5a45b9550e). Also, on Tuesday January 21st, I will be leading a tour of the Capitol for constituents which starts at the Library of Congress at 10 am.
---
|
---
| **The ‘Other Elections’ – how Congress chooses Committee Chairs**
Have you every wondered how the majority party in Congress decides who gets to chair each committee?
Well, there have been a whole other set of elections going on behind the scenes right now where senior members of the Republican Conference are campaigning to be appointed to these positions which come with both a lot of power and a great deal of responsibility.
The article [here](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=7b5f8dc9bb&e=5a45b9550e) is an interesting read about a side of politics that is very important, but also one that not many folks know about.
---
|
---
| **In Eastern Washington**
---
| We are still some weeks away from the swearing-in ceremony on January 3, but I’ve enjoyed meeting with groups in our community over these past days.
I was an enthusiastic advocate for higher education in the Washington State Senate, and I hope to continue that support while serving in Congress.
Last week it was great to talk with WSU President Kirk Schulz and WSU Spokane Chancellor Daryll DeWald. Go Cougs!
I also met with Community Colleges of Spokane Chancellor Kevin Brockbank. Community colleges play an important role including in workforce development and providing education opportunities for non-traditional students and veterans.
Later in the week I visited Whitworth University and heard from President Scott McQuilkin about new developments on their beautiful campus.
---
| Other visits were to the new world-class cross country course under construction in Spokane Valley, a partnership between the City of Spokane Valley and Spokane Sports that will be great for kids as well as providing a big economic boost to our area.
I also enjoyed meeting with Dan Wilson of the United Steel Workers Local 338 to discuss supporting the aluminum industry in Spokane Valley.
I stopped in at the Washington State Water Resources Association Annual Conference, and joined a virtual meeting with the Washington Public Utility Districts Association which represents five public utility districts in the Fifth District.
It’s been great getting started with building early relationships in our community and I’m looking forward to traveling around the Fifth District more as we get our Congressional office team in place.
-Michael
---
|
---
| Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203
---
| | | | | | | | You can [update your preferences](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&e=5a45b9550e&c=5d95745647) or [unsubscribe](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&t=b&e=5a45b9550e&c=5d95745647)
---
|
---
|

---

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T865ddc14-a9de-4867-80ab-555831c64a0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter – we need to help Sen. Schumer lead the Senate again. For at least the next two years, Senate Republicans are going to try and ram any Project 2025 policy they can into law. We know Americans like you are EXHAUSTED that Republicans will not stand up to Trump or our democracy. But in 2026, Republicans will have more Senate seats to defend. Democrats will be on the offensive — and to flip the Senate back into our control, we have to lay the groundwork NOW. [Team Blue Amp: will you make a donation of ANY AMOUNT to help Senator Schumer and Senate Democrats lead the charge into taking back control of Congress and our country?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T832d9b69-f76d-4f3e-ad02-6025340de7fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00aa96ea-6a24-488d-a12a-921657a7f7e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

name: GOP Outreach Team
subject: YOU Can Shape Our Future.
body:
Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, The American People sent a resounding, clear message this election: _**they’re done with failed, radical, liberal policies**_. As a result, Republicans now have control of the White House, the Senate, and the House! 🦅🇺🇸 **This victory is YOUR victory – and now it’s time to ensure the government you entrusted is working for YOU.** You made your voice heard at the ballot box, but the fight to protect and strengthen America’s future doesn’t stop there. **What happens next depends on what YOU decide.** [**_We’re inviting you to participate in our “Republican Roadmap Survey” – your chance to tell us exactly what you want Republicans to prioritize now that we have the power to lead our nation. >>>_**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkLFupDAURb_GdEa2MTAULla7olnNFtukRI_nB-OMwZZtGM3fR5MoH5DqNldHR-ftOl3Bebev_2Ajc8c0pTzF4F1xGNw-5RtE4oEvR5mUUJpLxaWYZGWNHbCDriIj-6a56EF3Q3UzVoAFVITUXxZE6HFWMMMipBYNzEPlzIsjlRSya0Xb1b1qUF9aQqAFhW6ZFuAplfpOFDHsa6KcE8Vj9g5hrzFslTe3UmJmzS-mRqbGTHgkqh9uT2RfD6bG92DpCSm5fS1hZ2pMAewGkecjnfTkic6Tl_NrY4iABV60ZjzKNhVkzZ-_v_8r_q1bJWPjw3nvctczLdYNnP-0KT8Jdxr1EQAA__8qGHq9)
---
| | [ ](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkLFupDAURb_GdEa2MTAULla7olnNFtukRI_nB-OMwZZtGM3fR5MoH5DqNldHR-ftOl3Bebev_2Ajc8c0pTzF4F1xGNw-5RtE4oEvR5mUUJpLxaWYZGWNHbCDriIj-6a56EF3Q3UzVoAFVITUXxZE6HFWMMMipBYNzEPlzIsjlRSya0Xb1b1qUF9aQqAFhW6ZFuAplfpOFDHsa6KcE8Vj9g5hrzFslTe3UmJmzS-mRqbGTHgkqh9uT2RfD6bG92DpCSm5fS1hZ2pMAewGkecjnfTkic6Tl_NrY4iABV60ZjzKNhVkzZ-_v_8r_q1bJWPjw3nvctczLdYNnP-0KT8Jdxr1EQAA__8qGHq9)
---
| | | [ TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkLFupDAURb_GdEa2MTAULla7olnNFtukRI_nB-OMwZZtGM3fR5MoH5DqNldHR-ftOl3Bebev_2Ajc8c0pTzF4F1xGNw-5RtE4oEvR5mUUJpLxaWYZGWNHbCDriIj-6a56EF3Q3UzVoAFVITUXxZE6HFWMMMipBYNzEPlzIsjlRSya0Xb1b1qUF9aQqAFhW6ZFuAplfpOFDHsa6KcE8Vj9g5hrzFslTe3UmJmzS-mRqbGTHgkqh9uT2RfD6bG92DpCSm5fS1hZ2pMAewGkecjnfTkic6Tl_NrY4iABV60ZjzKNhVkzZ-_v_8r_q1bJWPjw3nvctczLdYNnP-0KT8Jdxr1EQAA__8qGHq9)
---
| | From defending conservative values to securing our borders, strengthening the economy, and building a bright future for our children and grandchildren, **this is your opportunity to make your voice heard****AGAIN****and shape the Republican agenda.** _Why is this survey so important?_ Republicans control all 3 chambers because of YOU. Now it’s time to prioritize the policies we fight for. Whether it’s cutting taxes, promoting energy independence, or tackling inflation, we need to know what matters most to you. **When Republicans listen to the grassroots, we win – for America.** But here’s the truth: We can’t do this without your support. clean_body: Take the Republican Roadmap Survey Take the Republican Roadmap Survey | | | | | | Friend, The American People sent a resounding, clear message this election: they’re done with failed, radical, liberal policies. As a result, Republicans now have control of the White House, the Senate, and the House! 🦅🇺🇸 This victory is YOUR victory – and now it’s time to ensure the government you entrusted is working for YOU. You made your voice heard at the ballot box, but the fight to protect and strengthen America’s future doesn’t stop there. What happens next depends on what YOU decide. | | | | | | | From defending conservative values to securing our borders, strengthening the economy, and building a bright future for our children and grandchildren, this is your opportunity to make your voice heardAGAINand shape the Republican agenda. Why is this survey so important? Republicans control all 3 chambers because of YOU. Now it’s time to prioritize the policies we fight for. Whether it’s cutting taxes, promoting energy independence, or tackling inflation, we need to know what matters most to you. When Republicans listen to the grassroots, we win – for America. But here’s the truth: We can’t do this without your support. | | | | | Together, we’ve achieved something historic. Now, let’s ensure we use this power wisely – for your family, your community, and our great nation. Thank you for your leadership, GOP Outreach Team P.S. The survey only takes a few minutes, but your impact will last for years. | | | | | * | | Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The harassment and hate are nothing new
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
From attacks by the right-wing news media, to random threats of violence, to Donald Trump himself
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1403%2E791427%2EGvsbOJ)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3012?t=2&akid=1403%2E791427%2EGvsbOJ)
Friend — Ever since I first decided to run for office I have dealt with the hate and harassment that comes with being a Muslim woman in public life.
From attacks by the right-wing news media, to random threats of violence, to Donald Trump himself, who once told me to “go back” to where I came from.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3013?t=3&akid=1403%2E791427%2EGvsbOJ)
So this latest attack is nothing new — but that doesn’t make it okay. This thinly-veiled threat from a state senator and soon-to-be MAGA congressman is meant to intimidate me, my colleagues, and Muslim-Americans who look like me. But Mr. Fine is mistaken. **We’re not backing down.**
I won’t give an inch in the fight for justice for all because we have a big, wonderful movement of folks of all backgrounds on our side. I hope I can count on your support as we push back against the emboldened hate of the far-right.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
* * *

**Don’t close this email just yet? 🙏**
Even though Trump is set to take the White House, it doesn’t mean we can give up on our fight for the working class. Ilhan needs all the help she can get as we gear up for the new Congress. **[Please, make a contribution today and help us keep up the fight for our progressive agenda for the people >>](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec24.I7B4JF&refcode=em241210-1-gm&t=4&akid=1403%2E791427%2EGvsbOJ)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec24.I7B4JF&refcode=em241210-1-gm&t=5&akid=1403%2E791427%2EGvsbOJ)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=1403%2E791427%2EGvsbOJ)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=1403%2E791427%2EGvsbOJ)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=8&akid=1403%2E791427%2EGvsbOJ)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=1403_791427_GvsbOJ&akid=1403%2E791427%2EGvsbOJ)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: MAGA Victory Prize
subject: You’ll want to tell your kids and grandkids about this!

name: Byron Donalds
subject: “I’m going to have to stop you there”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
Fake News ABC almost shut off the cameras

| | | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2GoWMeFRe2PmpAQFc68m7w~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2GoWMeFRe2PmpAQFc68m7w~~/AARclAA~~~)
|
---
I was on Fake News ABC when _**chaos**_ erupted.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds and I NEED you to read this because without you, I wouldn’t have stood a chance against Trump-Deranged Martha Raddatz.
Before I had time to thank her for having me on her show, she started INSULTING President Trump, our MAGA House Majority, and questioning EVERYTHING we plan to do at the southern border.
Here are the FACTS I laid out plain and simple:
FACT: Biden-Harris broke our border ON PURPOSE.
FACT: The Biden-Harris open border destroyed communities & got Americans killed.
FACT: Trump has a mandate to secure the border & deport illegals.
Suddenly, before I could even finish, she tried to shut me down saying: “ _I’m going to have to stop you there._ ”
My Mom taught me to always mind my manners, so I calmly explained to her that on DAY ONE of Trump’s Administration, we’re going to get the southern border under control, and ended it there.
But if it weren’t for the generous support of folks like you, ABC would’ve continued to get away with spinning the truth with no repercussions, and I have YOU to thank for keeping me in the fight.
With the inauguration almost here, we HAVE to keep up the momentum, so, please, if you can, could you chip in today to my _**[Fake News Offensive Fund](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2GoWMeFRe2PmpAQFc68m7w~~/AARclAA~~~)**_ to help me stay in the fight?_**[]()**__**[]()**_

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2GoWMeFRe2PmpAQFc68m7w~~/AARclAA~~~)
|
---
Thank you and God Bless,
Byron Donalds _**[]()**__**[]()**_

Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

| | |

| | Friend, The American People sent a resounding, clear message this election: _**they’re done with failed, radical, liberal policies**_. As a result, Republicans now have control of the White House, the Senate, and the House! 🦅🇺🇸 **This victory is YOUR victory – and now it’s time to ensure the government you entrusted is working for YOU.** You made your voice heard at the ballot box, but the fight to protect and strengthen America’s future doesn’t stop there. **What happens next depends on what YOU decide.** [**_We’re inviting you to participate in our “Republican Roadmap Survey” – your chance to tell us exactly what you want Republicans to prioritize now that we have the power to lead our nation. >>>_**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkLFuszAURp_GbEb2xYAZPPzSL6QO6ZKhI7qxDbkVYMs2RHn7Kmr7AJ2-7XxH5-MyXZBW2pd33LyhnKeUpxhWKmQD7RMmnu8Y-XyUCQQoLoFLMcnKmRaknnXljeybRrdKNaK6m7ntlLjpTnRt5-RgsRFgB7DO2XkQLVZkXhwJUsgelNA1CgtS60FINdx075gSR3RYfE17JuezDSH-KOU6pKVazb2UmFnzj8HIYMzeHsnXD9qTd7UNG4PxMzj_xJRoX0rYGYwpoNsw8nyk0z958ufJy_m9MUS0BV-0ZjzKNhXLmv9v1yv_da2ScfFB60q565kSy4a0vq6q8pdqp4GvAAAA__9KVXeg)
