Now it’s time to prioritize the policies we fight for. Whether it’s cutting taxes, promoting energy independence, or tackling inflation, we need to know what matters most to you. **When Republicans listen to the grassroots, we win – for America.** But here’s the truth: We can’t do this without your support. I was on Fake News ABC when _**chaos**_ erupted.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds and I NEED you to read this because without you, I wouldn’t have stood a chance against Trump-Deranged Martha Raddatz.
Before I had time to thank her for having me on her show, she started INSULTING President Trump, our MAGA House Majority, and questioning EVERYTHING we plan to do at the southern border.
Here are the FACTS I laid out plain and simple:
FACT: Biden-Harris broke our border ON PURPOSE.
FACT: The Biden-Harris open border destroyed communities & got Americans killed.
FACT: Trump has a mandate to secure the border & deport illegals.
Suddenly, before I could even finish, she tried to shut me down saying: “ _I’m going to have to stop you there._ ”
My Mom taught me to always mind my manners, so I calmly explained to her that on DAY ONE of Trump’s Administration, we’re going to get the southern border under control, and ended it there.
But if it weren’t for the generous support of folks like you, ABC would’ve continued to get away with spinning the truth with no repercussions, and I have YOU to thank for keeping me in the fight.
With the inauguration almost here, we HAVE to keep up the momentum, so, please, if you can, could you chip in today to my _**[Fake News Offensive Fund](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d5af8bf357243eaafc1a0ebab31c6e2&_e=nmVvHu1yvvtY1XsaEC_-yx6c8Zh3aMs89k3SHOGvJj8uDG5Ckg0XDndnVeGNbxA9Zj47N28l6_l78byROojWl549ZKa8zex9E11hibUFl9XQ8h7PVhjd6JjP01YZkXgOia5UCdp_OxoJm9vaoBhZRDvNUNTNMf6hm29-YwK4AkFbxwKzq3DdoqjsiDdckmGlL8wchCIE-LPkwRJeaSVa1EVeDJeIFggRVlYHvJGm-fXA6i3ZtDdHEpc0lfh5IH7o3MPN2ki-UiFcCBSA--XtTpmCN_buiswXvruohDpbTGgUh_7PiiCD0cJ9Ij0s3qzHOQT_0kcBGqGtirzoKZGp7oKNhsbJ-Pm5o5niMS_jneRD4Bkgov7-_XsGGkDUO_wtJFbcG8Mwl6hP9OmWXPURfkG_oIRliUl8DVp0-p1ZSl2BaIkAeDBV8ZsU9OmSmaxQ)**_ to help me stay in the fight?_****__****_

clean_body: Fake News ABC almost shut off the cameras | | | | | I was on Fake News ABC when chaos erupted. This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds and I NEED you to read this because without you, I wouldn’t have stood a chance against Trump-Deranged Martha Raddatz. Before I had time to thank her for having me on her show, she started INSULTING President Trump, our MAGA House Majority, and questioning EVERYTHING we plan to do at the southern border. Here are the FACTS I laid out plain and simple: FACT: Biden-Harris broke our border ON PURPOSE. FACT: The Biden-Harris open border destroyed communities & got Americans killed. FACT: Trump has a mandate to secure the border & deport illegals. Suddenly, before I could even finish, she tried to shut me down saying: “ I’m going to have to stop you there. ” My Mom taught me to always mind my manners, so I calmly explained to her that on DAY ONE of Trump’s Administration, we’re going to get the southern border under control, and ended it there. But if it weren’t for the generous support of folks like you, ABC would’ve continued to get away with spinning the truth with no repercussions, and I have YOU to thank for keeping me in the fight. With the inauguration almost here, we HAVE to keep up the momentum, so, please, if you can, could you chip in today to my to help me stay in the fight?** | | Thank you and God Bless, Byron Donalds __ | | | | | | | Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress 138 Conant Street Beverly, MA 01985 ** Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Amanda Chase
subject: More Dirty Money Being Spent in Senate District 10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Special Election Update
| | | | Things You Should Know
---
---
|
# DIRTY MONEY BEING SPENT
# IN SENATE DISTRICT 10
---
|
# THERE'S MORE...
---
|
# DOMINION DUMPS $250K INTO
# ADAMS CAMPAIGN
---
|
# Why is a utility monopoly trying to influence the election?
---
|
# TAKE A DOMINION FUNDED BUS
# TO THE REPUBLICAN MASS MEETING and vote for Amanda Chase

---
| |
---
| Greetings!, Why is a utility monopoly trying to influence this upcoming Senate District 10 Special Election?
This is not the first time Dominion Energy has dumped a quarter million dollars against me. I'm one of the few legislators in the General Assembly that held them accountable, during my 8 years of service as state senator.
First of all, I voted against utility monopolies being able to spend millions to influence our elections. Dominion spent $250k in my 2023 re-election bid and they are doing it again.
Utility monopolies should not be allowed to influence elections with millions of dollars. If they have employees who want to donate, then they can donate directly to the candidate. They don't need a pass through monopoly like Dominion Energy.
And by the way, most of their employees support me.
Did you know Dominion Energy donates to both Republicans and Democrats who sit on the Commerce and Finance Committees?
Think about that.
When Dominion Energy passed legislation to put Smart Meters on homes and businesses without permission, I pushed back and demanded that homeowners had to give written permission, first.
Smart meters track your energy usage and have been known to cause health issues and even house fires. Written owner permission should be required by law before installation.
While I'm all for deregulation and limited government, I do support accountability for corporations who create problems for people in the community.
When wells were testing positive for known carcinogens, I got involved and forced Dominion to clean up their mess.
When my kids were little, we had a saying, if you mess something up, you clean it up.
I sponsored and passed legislation that required Dominion Energy to put a protective layer between mountains of hazardous and toxic coal ash and our aquifers. Many of us use these rivers for recreation and drinking water.
As written, this legislation requires Dominion Energy to clean up these toxic hazardous coal ash ponds across the state, and is in effect today.
This was not to be done on taxpayer dime, but Dominion's, as they were trespassing.
When leadership saw that my legislation was popular with the people and had bipartisan momentum to pass, they hijacked my bill with other patrons and forced the ratepayer to pay for the clean up in the form of a rate adjustment clause.
Those Senators are no longer in office, but if you look closely on your energy bill, it states, "coal ash." Now you know the rest of the story.
This was historic legislation and instrumental in forcing Dominion Energy to clean up coal ash in Virginia. They should pay to clean it up, not ratepayers.
As a result of our legislation, they can no longer leech known carcinogens into our waterways.
There is now a barrier between mountains of coal ash stored at power plants across Virginia. There is now a liner between the coal ash and the ground, preventing known carcinogens from leaching into our waterways.
I also voted "NO" on allowing a lobbyist to serve as a State Corporation Commission judge. The SCC regulates Dominion Energy. Judges should be well versed in law and be appointed because they are qualified. I do not support political appointments of SCC judges.
I also voted "NO" on the Grid Transformation Act which spent millions of dollars to "update" meter readers.
I've been told that my Dominion backed opponent now has money to bus people to the Republican Mass Meeting.
So if you need a ride to the convention, I'd take advantage of these Dominion sponsored buses, after all- you're paying for them.
Once you arrive at the Republican Mass Meeting, I would greatly appreciate your vote.
Just because you ride in on one of their buses doesn't bind you to support their candidate.
Since 2019, I made a decision not to accept PAC Political Action Committee money or money from lobbyists. There is an expectation that if you accept money from any of these groups they will knock doors for you, send out mailers on the candidate's behalf and do their best to influence the election by spending thousands on propaganda to influence the election, but they expect something in return.
I want you to know that the money that I have received to run my campaign in Senate District 10 is from voluntary clean money from "We the People."
I'm only beholden to you.
While the average donation check from a developer or corporate welfare PAC can range from $1k to $100k per check. The average donation from "We the People" is $100. Every once in awhile a generous donor writes a check for $1,000.
My campaign is run by committed volunteers, not paid campaign staffers. We are all unpaid. We rely on good hearted people who care about their country and just want to do their part.
While no campaign finance reports will be available until after the Republican Mass Meeting, I've listed for you the campaign finance reports of my campaigns and I encourage my opponents to do the same.
The first link takes you to my campaign finance reports as reported by the Virginia State Board of Elections.
The second link allows you to look up other candidates by date and by election.
---
| [My Campaign Finance Reports by Year](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DkT3o5Ecd_667k1UlfjAeUdG1Nufqd-AztJEH7eX_NQenQ-QKg61Ypv9GGhk4Nt132C3KwAx_lSLo7cp19tHNy_JneSN3YuPC1yPaQfcPPZsl9fxk28IuLB50JZAXGQnrx6e3i1eqMpuDSnYDnjt2rsF8UWClftJKgPaXp1LhpGGpaj16TaWKbvkw6WU_o4TQ797vChpGF48unqcSi4-e4lpvEsnwomk82Ptaxst1ZtXfdLTajeOvg==&c=0PN-Spd9-Apf2nk6gInFX4gUcKZvFNo0a9nP8ml480JrSskTrdJx-w==&ch=2vD6TCHOAxl92Nc-Apipb3O9B_AfWqvQx3gg5TOUVze0-4X_PK3g8w==)
---
| [Search Campaign Reports Here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DkT3o5Ecd_667k1UlfjAeUdG1Nufqd-AztJEH7eX_NQenQ-QKg61Ypv9GGhk4Nt1qD9ERd2jeV9axcWo_IC8ozwNZ7UKlFV9oVIgNqC-pO-TqgUtqGYJFdDoO_x3rVy_2KPhwb-UOAZEOwQXGXIRMpO7MRQRsP0W68AGbgJJglQ=&c=0PN-Spd9-Apf2nk6gInFX4gUcKZvFNo0a9nP8ml480JrSskTrdJx-w==&ch=2vD6TCHOAxl92Nc-Apipb3O9B_AfWqvQx3gg5TOUVze0-4X_PK3g8w==)
---

---
| |
---
DETAILS ABOUT THE SPECIAL ELECTION
Only 2 days left until the Republican Mass Meeting. It will be held this coming Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road.
Registration is at the door and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote.
Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Some campaigns are shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location. There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike.
Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin.
Once voters are registered at the door, they will wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots:
Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely
Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50% plus one.
If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50.1,% then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place.
If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50.1%, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50.1%.
The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat.
Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat.
Here's something to think about.
The Republican Mass meeting takes place Friday, December 13. The General Election when we face our Democrat opponent will most likely be Tuesday, January 7. The Senate will gavel in the very next day, Wednesday, January 8 at noon. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in?
I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one.
Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway?
There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days.
Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled.
There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed.
How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do?
I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses.
I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, members of the Board of Supervisors and School Board members across Senate District 10.
I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. You can't buy me. I work for the people of Senate District 10.
The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote.
Thank you! For God & Country,
---
|
---
Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023
---
| |
---

clean_body: Special Election Update | | | | Things You Should Know | DIRTY MONEY BEING SPENT IN SENATE DISTRICT 10 | THERE'S MORE... | DOMINION DUMPS $250K INTO ADAMS CAMPAIGN | Why is a utility monopoly trying to influence the election? | TAKE A DOMINION FUNDED BUS TO THE REPUBLICAN MASS MEETING and vote for Amanda Chase | | | Greetings!, Why is a utility monopoly trying to influence this upcoming Senate District 10 Special Election? This is not the first time Dominion Energy has dumped a quarter million dollars against me. I'm one of the few legislators in the General Assembly that held them accountable, during my 8 years of service as state senator. First of all, I voted against utility monopolies being able to spend millions to influence our elections. Dominion spent $250k in my 2023 re-election bid and they are doing it again. Utility monopolies should not be allowed to influence elections with millions of dollars. If they have employees who want to donate, then they can donate directly to the candidate. They don't need a pass through monopoly like Dominion Energy. And by the way, most of their employees support me. Did you know Dominion Energy donates to both Republicans and Democrats who sit on the Commerce and Finance Committees? Think about that. When Dominion Energy passed legislation to put Smart Meters on homes and businesses without permission, I pushed back and demanded that homeowners had to give written permission, first. Smart meters track your energy usage and have been known to cause health issues and even house fires. Written owner permission should be required by law before installation. While I'm all for deregulation and limited government, I do support accountability for corporations who create problems for people in the community. When wells were testing positive for known carcinogens, I got involved and forced Dominion to clean up their mess. When my kids were little, we had a saying, if you mess something up, you clean it up. I sponsored and passed legislation that required Dominion Energy to put a protective layer between mountains of hazardous and toxic coal ash and our aquifers. Many of us use these rivers for recreation and drinking water. As written, this legislation requires Dominion Energy to clean up these toxic hazardous coal ash ponds across the state, and is in effect today. This was not to be done on taxpayer dime, but Dominion's, as they were trespassing. When leadership saw that my legislation was popular with the people and had bipartisan momentum to pass, they hijacked my bill with other patrons and forced the ratepayer to pay for the clean up in the form of a rate adjustment clause. Those Senators are no longer in office, but if you look closely on your energy bill, it states, "coal ash." Now you know the rest of the story. This was historic legislation and instrumental in forcing Dominion Energy to clean up coal ash in Virginia. They should pay to clean it up, not ratepayers. As a result of our legislation, they can no longer leech known carcinogens into our waterways. There is now a barrier between mountains of coal ash stored at power plants across Virginia. There is now a liner between the coal ash and the ground, preventing known carcinogens from leaching into our waterways. I also voted "NO" on allowing a lobbyist to serve as a State Corporation Commission judge. The SCC regulates Dominion Energy. Judges should be well versed in law and be appointed because they are qualified. I do not support political appointments of SCC judges. I also voted "NO" on the Grid Transformation Act which spent millions of dollars to "update" meter readers. I've been told that my Dominion backed opponent now has money to bus people to the Republican Mass Meeting. So if you need a ride to the convention, I'd take advantage of these Dominion sponsored buses, after all- you're paying for them. Once you arrive at the Republican Mass Meeting, I would greatly appreciate your vote. Just because you ride in on one of their buses doesn't bind you to support their candidate. Since 2019, I made a decision not to accept PAC Political Action Committee money or money from lobbyists. There is an expectation that if you accept money from any of these groups they will knock doors for you, send out mailers on the candidate's behalf and do their best to influence the election by spending thousands on propaganda to influence the election, but they expect something in return. I want you to know that the money that I have received to run my campaign in Senate District 10 is from voluntary clean money from "We the People." I'm only beholden to you. While the average donation check from a developer or corporate welfare PAC can range from $1k to $100k per check. The average donation from "We the People" is $100. Every once in awhile a generous donor writes a check for $1,000. My campaign is run by committed volunteers, not paid campaign staffers. We are all unpaid. We rely on good hearted people who care about their country and just want to do their part. While no campaign finance reports will be available until after the Republican Mass Meeting, I've listed for you the campaign finance reports of my campaigns and I encourage my opponents to do the same. The first link takes you to my campaign finance reports as reported by the Virginia State Board of Elections. The second link allows you to look up other candidates by date and by election. | == | == | | DETAILS ABOUT THE SPECIAL ELECTION Only 2 days left until the Republican Mass Meeting. It will be held this coming Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road. Registration is at the door and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote. Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Some campaigns are shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location. There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin. Once voters are registered at the door, they will wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots: Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50% plus one. If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50.1,% then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place. If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50.1%, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50.1%. The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat. Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat. Here's something to think about. The Republican Mass meeting takes place Friday, December 13. The General Election when we face our Democrat opponent will most likely be Tuesday, January 7. The Senate will gavel in the very next day, Wednesday, January 8 at noon. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in? I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway? There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days. Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled. There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed. How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do? I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses. I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, members of the Board of Supervisors and School Board members across Senate District 10. I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. You can't buy me. I work for the people of Senate District 10. The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote. Thank you! For God & Country, | Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023 | | | | == | | == | | == | | | Miss one of my emails? | | == | | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | | == | | == | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Terrell police officer Jacob Candanoza shot, killed in line of duty,** " Dallas Morning News' **Lana Ferguson** , **Sarah Bahari** and **Jamie Landers** -- "A Terrell police officer died after he was shot during a traffic stop Sunday night in a motel parking lot, officials said.

**Jacob Candanoza** , 28, had just joined the Terrell Police Department in July and was so proud to be a police officer, his father told _The Dallas Morning News_.

About 11 p.m., Candanoza pulled a vehicle over in the parking lot of a Super 8 motel in the 1600 block of South State Highway 34 and requested more officers respond to the location, police said.

Moments later, dispatchers received numerous reports that an officer had been shot. Police, Fire and CareFlite responded.

Candanoza was taken to Baylor Scott and White emergency center in Forney, where he died.

Footage showed dozens of officers from different law enforcement agencies staged outside the hospital before taking part in a procession that escorted Candanoza's body to the Dallas County medical examiner's office shortly after 6 a.m. Monday.
The officer's father, **David Candanoza** , rode in the procession, he told _The News_ on Monday.

He said hundreds of police officers lined the shuttered streets, saluting in unison.

"It was so overwhelming," he said. "I was so grateful to see that."" [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/3927bcc6-bfd5-4deb-984c-7f905c500b84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

"**Federal judge blocks rule that would have given DACA recipients access to Affordable Care Act coverage,** " Texas Tribune's **Jaden Edison** -- "A federal judge on Monday issued a court order temporarily blocking a Biden administration rule that would have granted some people brought into the country illegally as children access to health coverage under the Affordable Care Act, a decision that could affect tens of thousands of Texans.

The decision comes after Texas and 18 other states banded together to sue the federal government following recent guidance from the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services establishing a pathway for some Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) recipients to enroll in health insurance plans.

The states argued that by allowing DACA recipients to benefit from subsidized health insurance and making them "lawfully present" in the health care system, they will want to stay in the country longer, causing states to spend more money on resources like education, health care and law enforcement. State Republican leaders in interviews and lawsuits challenging the federal government's immigration policies often make such claims about undocumented immigrants straining state resources, [despite evidence](https://substack.com/redirect/ecea1160-66c4-4031-bc2b-3816d193d3ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that undocumented Texans contribute more to the economy than they cost the state.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/61ba8d5e-f320-46a8-bb3e-8ff8bbf1102b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Immigration advocacy groups say access to health care will help alleviate the disparities DACA recipients face, such as high uninsured rates and unmet medical needs after years of delaying care.

Texas has [roughly 90,000 DACA recipients](https://substack.com/redirect/91f64081-ff19-476b-860a-5f10528730e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) eligible to sign up for health insurance under the recent federal guidance.

But on Monday, U.S. District Judge **Daniel M. Traynor** temporarily halted the guidance from taking effect as the lawsuit proceeds, stating that the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services does not have the authority to "circumvent congressional authority" and redefine "lawfully present," a term used to describe people who are legally permitted to remain in the U.S.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/61ba8d5e-f320-46a8-bb3e-8ff8bbf1102b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In response, a Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services spokesperson said the agency "is reviewing the court's decision; however, the agency does not comment on litigation," [according to The Hill](https://substack.com/redirect/4e33f2d9-9a6c-4454-a44e-f527d4f0adab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

In a statement posted to social media on Monday, Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton** celebrated the ruling.

"Today, we prevented yet another attempt by the Biden Administration to spend our hard-earned tax dollars on radically unpopular policies that put illegal aliens ahead of" American citizens, the statement said." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Terrell police officer Jacob Candanoza shot, killed in line of duty, " Dallas Morning News' Lana Ferguson , Sarah Bahari and Jamie Landers -- "A Terrell police officer died after he was shot during a traffic stop Sunday night in a motel parking lot, officials said. Jacob Candanoza , 28, had just joined the Terrell Police Department in July and was so proud to be a police officer, his father told The Dallas Morning News. About 11 p.m., Candanoza pulled a vehicle over in the parking lot of a Super 8 motel in the 1600 block of South State Highway 34 and requested more officers respond to the location, police said. Moments later, dispatchers received numerous reports that an officer had been shot. Police, Fire and CareFlite responded. Candanoza was taken to Baylor Scott and White emergency center in Forney, where he died. Footage showed dozens of officers from different law enforcement agencies staged outside the hospital before taking part in a procession that escorted Candanoza's body to the Dallas County medical examiner's office shortly after 6 a.m. Monday. The officer's father, David Candanoza , rode in the procession, he told The News on Monday. He said hundreds of police officers lined the shuttered streets, saluting in unison. "It was so overwhelming," he said. "I was so grateful to see that."" ($) "Federal judge blocks rule that would have given DACA recipients access to Affordable Care Act coverage, " Texas Tribune's Jaden Edison -- "A federal judge on Monday issued a court order temporarily blocking a Biden administration rule that would have granted some people brought into the country illegally as children access to health coverage under the Affordable Care Act, a decision that could affect tens of thousands of Texans. The decision comes after Texas and 18 other states banded together to sue the federal government following recent guidance from the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services establishing a pathway for some Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) recipients to enroll in health insurance plans. The states argued that by allowing DACA recipients to benefit from subsidized health insurance and making them "lawfully present" in the health care system, they will want to stay in the country longer, causing states to spend more money on resources like education, health care and law enforcement. State Republican leaders in interviews and lawsuits challenging the federal government's immigration policies often make such claims about undocumented immigrants straining state resources, that undocumented Texans contribute more to the economy than they cost the state. Immigration advocacy groups say access to health care will help alleviate the disparities DACA recipients face, such as high uninsured rates and unmet medical needs after years of delaying care. Texas has eligible to sign up for health insurance under the recent federal guidance. But on Monday, U.S. District Judge Daniel M. Traynor temporarily halted the guidance from taking effect as the lawsuit proceeds, stating that the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services does not have the authority to "circumvent congressional authority" and redefine "lawfully present," a term used to describe people who are legally permitted to remain in the U.S. In response, a Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services spokesperson said the agency "is reviewing the court's decision; however, the agency does not comment on litigation," . In a statement posted to social media on Monday, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton celebrated the ruling. "Today, we prevented yet another attempt by the Biden Administration to spend our hard-earned tax dollars on radically unpopular policies that put illegal aliens ahead of" American citizens, the statement said." State Republican leaders in interviews and lawsuits challenging the federal government's immigration policies often make such claims about undocumented immigrants straining state resources, [despite evidence](https://substack.com/redirect/738e83fe-8d88-446f-964b-1d5de03f3873?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that undocumented Texans contribute more to the economy than they cost the state.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/0c01b5b8-a667-4d04-93f1-c7bff07e3b0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Immigration advocacy groups say access to health care will help alleviate the disparities DACA recipients face, such as high uninsured rates and unmet medical needs after years of delaying care.

Texas has [roughly 90,000 DACA recipients](https://substack.com/redirect/24f51077-90c6-4a89-9ea2-375e0a56b8c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) eligible to sign up for health insurance under the recent federal guidance.

But on Monday, U.S. District Judge **Daniel M. Traynor** temporarily halted the guidance from taking effect as the lawsuit proceeds, stating that the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services does not have the authority to "circumvent congressional authority" and redefine "lawfully present," a term used to describe people who are legally permitted to remain in the U.S.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/0c01b5b8-a667-4d04-93f1-c7bff07e3b0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In response, a Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services spokesperson said the agency "is reviewing the court's decision; however, the agency does not comment on litigation," [according to The Hill](https://substack.com/redirect/1c9b46e7-b230-489d-aff4-49102e845d18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

In a statement posted to social media on Monday, Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton** celebrated the ruling.

"Today, we prevented yet another attempt by the Biden Administration to spend our hard-earned tax dollars on radically unpopular policies that put illegal aliens ahead of" American citizens, the statement said." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/771c5c6c-d4d8-403f-bd58-18acfc23c5cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Terrell police officer Jacob Candanoza shot, killed in line of duty, " Dallas Morning News' Lana Ferguson , Sarah Bahari and Jamie Landers -- "A Terrell police officer died after he was shot during a traffic stop Sunday night in a motel parking lot, officials said. Jacob Candanoza , 28, had just joined the Terrell Police Department in July and was so proud to be a police officer, his father told The Dallas Morning News. About 11 p.m., Candanoza pulled a vehicle over in the parking lot of a Super 8 motel in the 1600 block of South State Highway 34 and requested more officers respond to the location, police said. Moments later, dispatchers received numerous reports that an officer had been shot. Police, Fire and CareFlite responded. Candanoza was taken to Baylor Scott and White emergency center in Forney, where he died. Footage showed dozens of officers from different law enforcement agencies staged outside the hospital before taking part in a procession that escorted Candanoza's body to the Dallas County medical examiner's office shortly after 6 a.m. Monday. The officer's father, David Candanoza , rode in the procession, he told The News on Monday. He said hundreds of police officers lined the shuttered streets, saluting in unison. "It was so overwhelming," he said. "I was so grateful to see that."" ($) "Federal judge blocks rule that would have given DACA recipients access to Affordable Care Act coverage, " Texas Tribune's Jaden Edison -- "A federal judge on Monday issued a court order temporarily blocking a Biden administration rule that would have granted some people brought into the country illegally as children access to health coverage under the Affordable Care Act, a decision that could affect tens of thousands of Texans. The decision comes after Texas and 18 other states banded together to sue the federal government following recent guidance from the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services establishing a pathway for some Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) recipients to enroll in health insurance plans. The states argued that by allowing DACA recipients to benefit from subsidized health insurance and making them "lawfully present" in the health care system, they will want to stay in the country longer, causing states to spend more money on resources like education, health care and law enforcement. State Republican leaders in interviews and lawsuits challenging the federal government's immigration policies often make such claims about undocumented immigrants straining state resources, that undocumented Texans contribute more to the economy than they cost the state. Immigration advocacy groups say access to health care will help alleviate the disparities DACA recipients face, such as high uninsured rates and unmet medical needs after years of delaying care. Texas has eligible to sign up for health insurance under the recent federal guidance. But on Monday, U.S. District Judge Daniel M. Traynor temporarily halted the guidance from taking effect as the lawsuit proceeds, stating that the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services does not have the authority to "circumvent congressional authority" and redefine "lawfully present," a term used to describe people who are legally permitted to remain in the U.S. In response, a Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services spokesperson said the agency "is reviewing the court's decision; however, the agency does not comment on litigation," . In a statement posted to social media on Monday, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton celebrated the ruling. "Today, we prevented yet another attempt by the Biden Administration to spend our hard-earned tax dollars on radically unpopular policies that put illegal aliens ahead of" American citizens, the statement said." name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Silver is Up 31% YTD. Why You Need to Buy Now!
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Department of Defense Demands
More Silver Than Investors, Solar Panels, and Electronics
Combined.

Silver is up 31% Year to Date &
90.3% for the Last 5 Years.

My Friend, You're Not Going To
Believe This,
According to recent reports and
forecasts, the price of silver could rise dramatically in 2025.
Analysts, economists, and experts
are saying Silver will move to the area of $48.20 to $50.25 in
2025.
There are many reasons for this.
#5 is Mind-Blowing.

Silver is still one of the
best hedges against inflation.
Silver is still one of the
best protectors against a Market Crash.
Silver is the key component
in Solar Panels.
Silver is a crucial component
for semiconductor chips to power the expanding-explosive world of
Artificial Intelligence.
The U.S military? This one
took me by suprise!

Silver is CRITICAL to the
Department of Defense.
Yes, our military is a huge
consumer of Silver. This may come as a surprise, but silver is
used extensively in the manufacture of military goods.
In fact, according to the latest
analysis, the military demand for silver is significantly higher
than the demand from investors, solar panels, and electronics
COMBINED.
You read that right.
Grab This Complimentary Guide.
Everything you need to get started can be found right here.

But how is silver used by the
military?
The list is almost endless. For
example, silver is used in:

the manufacture of bombs,
shells,
missiles,
rockets,
satellites,
fighter jets,
night vision goggles,
torpedoes,
submarines,
tanks,
communications devices,
space technology,
radar systems,
and even nuclear technology.

Yes, this metal is used in the
manufacture of almost ALL military technology.
It's easy to see why - silver is
highly conductive and resistant to corrosion. It's also a great
heat conductor AND has antimicrobial properties (which is why
it's used in silver-nylon dressings.)
But Why Should Investors Care
About This?
Well, if you take a look at the
charts, you'll notice that Silver has been in a Bull Market for
the last three years. In addition to this, US defense spending in
only increasing. Not only that, it shows no sign of slowing down.
And here's why that's so
important.
Complimentary Guide to Start
Investing in Silver. Act Now while it's still early.
Right now, we're seeing major
conflicts in the Middle East and Ukraine. Not only that, but
we're also providing BILLIONS in military aid to these areas.
What's more, this spending is almost guaranteed to continue. And
while we cannot be absolutely certain…it does seem as if
this is affecting the price of silver.
If you want proof, then take a
look at this chart:
This time last year (Nov 2023)
the price of silver sat at $23…one year later (Nov 2024)
it peaked at $35. And with military spending only increasing,
there's a significant chance that the price of silver may
rise…

Now, We Have No Idea What 2025
Holds For The World
This may or may not happen.
But one thing is certain.
Conflicts in the middle-east and
Ukraine show no sign of coming to an end. And this means that
military aid…and therefore military spending…will
only grow.
The bottom line is this:

Silver is a vital component
in most military goods.
War is fueling military
spending…which is sending the price of silver skywards.
Smart investors have already
been taking advantage of this opportunity.

In fact, there's a good chance we
could see record highs in 2025.
But if You're Going to Profit
>From This, Then You Must Act Now.
To help you learn more, we've put
together a special guide. This is a must-have guide if you are
interested in investing in Precious Metals.
You'll learn why silver is so
important and how you can start investing in this metal right
now.
And Yes, This Might Sound Like
War Profiteering…
But with the way things are going
today… investors MUST grab hold of every opportunity they
can.
If you have $50,000 or more sunk
into the Stock Market and want to safeguard your assets from
potential threats posed by the current political climate, or you
want to cash in on the Silver Bull-Market, or both, then I urge
you ACT NOW and grab this Complimentary Guide.

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights
Reserved.

| | | [Take Action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98485163/516803192/-2134543004?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxYzE0NjhjLTIyYjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EHU24tEIcTE_mFS2EFIf5ItUmIvw1WvaXJnh2eHK7YU=&emci=b63e349b-8bb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=31c1468c-22b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)

---
| | **Dear Peter, leg days are here, tell your legislators to act on climate!**
---
Today is the first day of December Legislative days and Oregon’s legislative session starts in just over a month and together we can make it a monumental one. This year our legislators will have to stand strong on climate without federal support, under a Trump presidency. I will be meeting with legislators all week about how important it is for them to lead on climate and environmental issues because of expected attacks on our natural resource agencies and important climate programs. You can help by thanking our state leaders and holding them accountable for making progress on climate. [**Will you take a moment to send a message to our legislators to remind them of the importance of taking action on climate leading up to session?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98485165/516803194/-2134543004?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxYzE0NjhjLTIyYjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EHU24tEIcTE_mFS2EFIf5ItUmIvw1WvaXJnh2eHK7YU=&emci=b63e349b-8bb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=31c1468c-22b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)
---
[Take Action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98485166/516803195/-2134543004?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxYzE0NjhjLTIyYjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EHU24tEIcTE_mFS2EFIf5ItUmIvw1WvaXJnh2eHK7YU=&emci=b63e349b-8bb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=31c1468c-22b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)
---
States across the country are looking to see what states like us will do this next year. Oregon has a history of leading on climate, and that’s one that we are not ready to give up any time soon. [**By sending your message today, we can urge our legislators to make Oregon the bright spot that it is for climate action.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98485167/516803196/-2134543004?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxYzE0NjhjLTIyYjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EHU24tEIcTE_mFS2EFIf5ItUmIvw1WvaXJnh2eHK7YU=&emci=b63e349b-8bb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=31c1468c-22b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) For this upcoming session, Oregon will have pro-environment supermajorities in both the House and Senate, providing us with a great time to take action for our environment and climate. It’s time for our legislators to:
* Pass a transportation package that centers climate and equity;
* Deliver for consumers on reducing utility rates;
* Strengthen our communities’ climate resiliency;
* And, fight for life sustaining essentials like our clean water.

---
[Take Action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98485168/516803197/-2134543004?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxYzE0NjhjLTIyYjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EHU24tEIcTE_mFS2EFIf5ItUmIvw1WvaXJnh2eHK7YU=&emci=b63e349b-8bb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=31c1468c-22b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)
---
| | [**Your legislators need to hear from you, they need to know how important protecting our clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate is to you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98485169/516803198/-2134543004?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxYzE0NjhjLTIyYjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EHU24tEIcTE_mFS2EFIf5ItUmIvw1WvaXJnh2eHK7YU=&emci=b63e349b-8bb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=31c1468c-22b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) It only takes a moment, but your message will support climate action in the upcoming session! Let’s do this together.
---
Sincerely,

Eliza WaltonOLCV Coalition Director

subject: How Florida is rebuilding >>>

body:
This is the power of conservative leadership.| | | [](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/u/click?_t=bc9491309104472aae4991b59e968283&_m=1db1177d619a4f868cbdab6cf18c14b2&_e=fEehBYKHz2QnyablBI5R7pXLbzczzr2200sItOo7k8sAaOA5EQTzzthJaBekmOdNUsA2zvE6B3pYiEq6vopf9NzYIJQnHXi-AsI8WsnpJ5h9S-PEQLYwts8PPytu1RBuOCtz-pCdQaJ28y96rQO_Sp3tEwykgb8hTazN4X7E2m8t8fi9Urhzx9cLzXPtgeaHYjX0V1OWdus-8q1PZAmC8gfWfbkkl5IPaGn4uBFJnn2K_ypoON8qvodgo1cz-US5fuTdTlD1UOukSfEYK7-qgID7lOhkb3xrCFfHUGLQVk6LGDOYnPY3dsivhZ1GOnQ9EYOKEXNowYQwpgqvKksNq2XyOzo_lZs7IaRZi71kOHSMbNnjObNyGMkRDzjAHhSBA1yZSby3zkkeKWGnQkLc8XvspyJ3FnjH7lsUJndJftM%3D)

Friend, As the holidays approach, many Floridians are still working to get back to normal following an active hurricane season.

Thanks to Florida’s solid financial standing, Governor DeSantis has just committed additional funds to our state’s recovery:
* **$500,000** for school district foundations,
* **$300,000** for law enforcement foundations, and
* **$7 million** for Florida’s housing repair program that benefits uninsured homeowners facing significant damages.

These additional funds support the efforts of those who are getting our schools, our streets, and our homes back to normal in the wake of disaster.

**Friend, this is the power of solid conservative governance. Wise financial stewardship in good times has made our state not just ready for a “rainy day,” but for an active hurricane season. **

We have leaders like Governor Ron DeSantis and Florida Republicans to thank for that stewardship. **[Help Florida Freedom Fund continue our work to make sure we elect more leaders like these to office — donate today!](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/u/click?_t=bc9491309104472aae4991b59e968283&_m=1db1177d619a4f868cbdab6cf18c14b2&_e=fEehBYKHz2QnyablBI5R7pXLbzczzr2200sItOo7k8sAaOA5EQTzzthJaBekmOdNUsA2zvE6B3pYiEq6vopf9NzYIJQnHXi-AsI8WsnpJ5h9S-PEQLYwts8PPytu1RBuOCtz-pCdQaJ28y96rQO_Sp3tEwykgb8hTazN4X7E2m8t8fi9Urhzx9cLzXPtgeaHYjX0V1OWdus-8q1PZAmC8gfWfbkkl5IPaGn4uBFJnn2K_ypoON8qvodgo1cz-US5fuTdTlD1UOukSfEYK7-qgME6PtvQ9ao3E07QLR80Dg0srPbjo1477FwW9t5uFnlPeiUHYt2QexVNv-RwTZMd15y_WSbU7bXGnHONfYuZGZzeXMdoYJGNS2BdIuqWxQoOfR_zA7TV7YSN5s9lBsTdLoT9YpKoCWCvav3NjZdB-k4%3D)**

Thank you,Florida Freedom Fund

body:
There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both
President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.

Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and
President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just
got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.

According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_,
_“SHE’S GOING FULL TILT WITH VENGEANCE AND EMOTIONS.”_

How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and
“vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the
Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the
cold hard _facts_.

But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch
hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk
free.

“‘IT IS UNDISPUTED’: FANI WILLIS HARSHLY CHASTISED BY JUDGE FOR
VIOLATING OPEN RECORDS LAWS IN LAWSUIT SEEKING HER COMMUNICATIONS WITH
JACK SMITH AND JAN. 6 COMMITTEE”

[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]

When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as
INMATE NUMBER P01135780.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]
__

IN FANI’S EYES, THE “P” STOOD FOR “PRISONER.” BUT, AS AN
INNOCENT MAN FIGHTING FOR HIS FREEDOM, TO ME THE “P” STANDS FOR
“PATRIOT.”

And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your
last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this
despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I
fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in
Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!

_(Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please
don’t even think twice!)_

IF YOU CAN, AND, SERIOUSLY, ONLY IF YOU CAN, PLEASE MAKE A
CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM
FUND – AS I KEEP FIGHTING FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS THE

subject: KEEP FIGHTING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4d3d6b1984704798a3b76d67c60a973b&_e=KFe5xqrfB4GRCzs-wKuqjYAdS_3t72fzn79c10kPyfWlzQhbKuKumh8EDqYRllCDSn0DAeFC9oo6exl9xViPWGBiTkuYA0Zuzy8raN1sc6FesORb2clPlpXxmnym2rDXFEZTPhr4HAvI5GcU3_ns19vp0WBwWxpzyJxcEt2JFRsQNRAvyATF53oby9JuXA9v80kDUIxPac4dK7-m0DFCV-AieKGYCwuYp2TWz3Wf-zbebT6TiDS1nHA-jsogmeWW132BDfdEP8ZJ3Ls7ysH1T5MUX0pOJOs1JaQQSqNpiDpI_Ec5AsVztUAGpqMxneEPwMW-VwaR2Z4kF9Kr0E-bp2QiA1hXTwGePSaaqk1zWO1vQYoDkix7UFdQf72Byd6d)
---
Dear Peter,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4d3d6b1984704798a3b76d67c60a973b&_e=KFe5xqrfB4GRCzs-wKuqjYAdS_3t72fzn79c10kPyfWlzQhbKuKumh8EDqYRllCDSn0DAeFC9oo6exl9xViPWGBiTkuYA0Zuzy8raN1sc6FesORb2clPlpXxmnym2rDXFEZTPhr4HAvI5GcU3_ns19vp0WBwWxpzyJxcEt2JFRsQNRAvyATF53oby9JuXA9v80kDUIxPac4dK7-m0DFCV-AieKGYCwuYp2TWz3Wf-zYzXu4y4trA1jX71xnu1NDt5OAFMo5LoGw7pFJXkJR8w-AF2E6xOT7S4th8da9DfUhE60Y3BBnxQTTV9N4ibx746kn52HdIvt7Tdmo8ff1KJo8v_XdM7BYQT3TUFEZmAm7868zNgOwOL9sX55oR78St)

name: JanePAC
subject: Take our quick survey to shape JanePAC’s strategy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Be a part of something big.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98486987/516808054/1328794144?refcode=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3ZmNlYTFiLTI3YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yp7b7em8_VZefiyHJTKU9T5-KAiJ9Q4_CI1UiAET8wI=&emci=a84a65af-6ab6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
Hi, 2025 is just around the corner, and we’re gearing up for another year of bold climate action — but as a grassroots organization, we need your input to make it happen. **[That’s why we’re inviting you to take our 2025 Electoral Research Survey today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98486989/516808055/1147531127?refcode=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3ZmNlYTFiLTI3YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yp7b7em8_VZefiyHJTKU9T5-KAiJ9Q4_CI1UiAET8wI=&emci=a84a65af-6ab6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)** Your perspective matters. You know your community better than anyone. You have eyes on the ground — whether it’s a bold new climate initiative, a race that needs attention, a grassroots movement gaining traction, or troubling developments, like corporate polluters influencing decision-makers — we want to hear about it. Your insights will help JanePAC uncover where our support is needed most. From spotlighting climate champions to addressing threats to progress, your voice can guide what races and initiatives we focus on in the coming years. **[Taking our survey is quick and easy, but the impact could be huge!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98486991/516808057/1147531127?refcode=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3ZmNlYTFiLTI3YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yp7b7em8_VZefiyHJTKU9T5-KAiJ9Q4_CI1UiAET8wI=&emci=a84a65af-6ab6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)** | [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98486993/516808058/1147531127?refcode=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3ZmNlYTFiLTI3YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yp7b7em8_VZefiyHJTKU9T5-KAiJ9Q4_CI1UiAET8wI=&emci=a84a65af-6ab6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
Once you’ve completed it, we’ll keep you updated on how your insights are driving real change in the fight for climate progress. Together, we can make sure no community or climate champion goes unnoticed.
[**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98486995/516808061/1147531127?refcode=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3ZmNlYTFiLTI3YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yp7b7em8_VZefiyHJTKU9T5-KAiJ9Q4_CI1UiAET8wI=&emci=a84a65af-6ab6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b7fcea1b-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---

clean_body: Be a part of something big. | Hi, 2025 is just around the corner, and we’re gearing up for another year of bold climate action — but as a grassroots organization, we need your input to make it happen. Your perspective matters. You know your community better than anyone. You have eyes on the ground — whether it’s a bold new climate initiative, a race that needs attention, a grassroots movement gaining traction, or troubling developments, like corporate polluters influencing decision-makers — we want to hear about it. Your insights will help JanePAC uncover where our support is needed most. From spotlighting climate champions to addressing threats to progress, your voice can guide what races and initiatives we focus on in the coming years. | Once you’ve completed it, we’ll keep you updated on how your insights are driving real change in the fight for climate progress. Together, we can make sure no community or climate champion goes unnoticed. In solidarity, The Jane Fonda Climate PAC Team | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121024_1&amount=25]
Headline: 85 Percent of Voters Want Congress to Pass the Equal Rights Amendment [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/ERA_Poll.png]
Fifty years after the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) was initially passed in Congress, an overwhelming majority of likely voters want the provision aimed at guaranteeing equal rights for all genders to go into effect .
Recent polling from Data for Progress finds that 85 percent of likely voters support Congress passing the ERA to give it a second chance at being adopted as a constitutional amendment. Support for the amendment is bipartisan, with 93 percent of Democrats and 79 percent of both independents and Republicans agreeing that the provision should be passed.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should we adopt the Equal Rights Amendment to guarantee full & equal protections?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121024_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121024_1&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121024_1&amount=25]

name: Mark Warner
subject: Remember when Donald Trump said he had nothing to do with Project 2025?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98488354/516812644/-949880732?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_2025_241210_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmZlYzgxMS0yYWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hmnr0sp57elOakhNwtc9yRNuARaBl30irOhht7fvJpI=) Derek,

Remember when Donald Trump spent most of his campaign distancing himself from Project 2025, claiming he had nothing to do with the disastrous blueprint?

**Well, since winning the election, he has picked _at least_ seven people with ties to the manifesto to serve in his administration.** Actions speak louder than words.

Look, Derek, regardless of Trump’s blatant lies about his ties to Project 2025, here’s what we do know: it’s a dangerous dumpster fire. The ideas it lays out dismantle and relocate the federal workforce (which would be a disaster for Virginia’s economy), gut Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, end student debt relief, restrict access to abortion pills... and so much more. These are not thoughtful policies that will make government work better for people.

Trump may try to deny his involvement all he wants – even as he assembles his dream administration with folks who are explicitly tied to the blueprint – because we know the truth.

[_**Just remember that every day in Washington, I will do everything in my power to stop Project 2025 from hurting Virginians and all Americans. Will you pitch in $5 so I can keep up this work in the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98488356/516812647/-949880732?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_2025_241210_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmZlYzgxMS0yYWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hmnr0sp57elOakhNwtc9yRNuARaBl30irOhht7fvJpI=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98488358/516812649/-949880732?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_2025_241210_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmZlYzgxMS0yYWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hmnr0sp57elOakhNwtc9yRNuARaBl30irOhht7fvJpI=)****

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is Different
body:
Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.
And we need you to join us.

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2359d337920a42debbb0149cab94364d&_e=rVnVmJlOyaGbqyO4JSZ5VjHIU7_c2-fWW_OynrObtw4SBlep4fsf-qIep5fYIK2lcufwCm6gv_easSQ3mGjvOdEGkX-U_EGNnOBzmIS-Ik4cowxrPTjra5egxL54soMzK708Tfn_YtWiqDeAbZNgtyvXZNCiBU2R9RiiVwW4NY5xufALdNMfMZyQPHI9-WXpwVeIl3Lm91vN_1RjPWKV1LyWLpIAVr2iVS9hjSFR-Cv4gpubqonreR2Nm3vLnX-WZV48Pn67yiptXspLLJ314cncsDoCz_VYz3ONnaaNrJccwlL89RQdQlFjxNPxCxBzHJrZCA0U66Hi7VpIHT_k5zh38tSCjxfl0C8fEhjb6rfnhlTfTk2K-Tq_b_tVN-RH)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

subject: Holding out-of-state fraudsters accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98488408/516812881/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_PET_AC90_20241210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTZkZGIxOTYtMmFiNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rTCG_77N2aPCIv-L4SS4qNaekKVnTH-QlKGKXKzLOKI=)
---
| | **BREAKING: Arizona grand jury indicts duo for $100,000 school voucher fraud**
_— December 2, 2024_
* * *
_Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes announced Monday another round of fraud charges in the state’s school voucher program involving over $100,000 awarded to the nonexistent students of fabricated parents._
---
Attorney General Kris Mayes is holding out-of-state fraudsters accountable for exploiting Arizona's voucher system, shining a light on the need for transparency and accountability in our state.
This kind of leadership is vital for safeguarding our democracy and ensuring every Arizonan is protected from corruption. Electing Democrats like AG Mayes is **_crucial_** to maintaining these standards and continuing our work toward a better, bluer Arizona.
To solidify our progress, we need a broad coalition to stand with us. By building and strengthening our multiracial coalition and expanding the “big tent” of the Democratic Party, we can continue to elect leaders who share our values and vision for an equitable future.
**[Sign on today and support our efforts to protect Arizona's future. clean_body: | = | | BREAKING: Arizona grand jury indicts duo for $100,000 school voucher fraud — December 2, 2024 Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes announced Monday another round of fraud charges in the state’s school voucher program involving over $100,000 awarded to the nonexistent students of fabricated parents. Attorney General Kris Mayes is holding out-of-state fraudsters accountable for exploiting Arizona's voucher system, shining a light on the need for transparency and accountability in our state. This kind of leadership is vital for safeguarding our democracy and ensuring every Arizonan is protected from corruption. Electing Democrats like AG Mayes is crucial to maintaining these standards and continuing our work toward a better, bluer Arizona. To solidify our progress, we need a broad coalition to stand with us. By building and strengthening our multiracial coalition and expanding the “big tent” of the Democratic Party, we can continue to elect leaders who share our values and vision for an equitable future. Thanks for your time and your continued support. — Arizona Democratic Party Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. Peter: While the final results of the 2024 Election were tough, we want to celebrate the fact that we had record-breaking Democratic turnout here in Georgia. → Democratic voter turnout increased by 2.4% from 2022. ← → Kamala Harris performed best in Georgia among the battleground states, with a 70,000 vote increase from 2020. ← → She also earned more votes than any Democratic candidate in our state’s history. ← It’s clear that we have growing Democratic momentum on our side in the Peach State! But to make sure that we carry it all the way through 2026, we need to gauge voter engagement from our top supporters. Please respond to our poll before midnight: [Did you vote in the 2024 Election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98488561/516813334/975036287?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_121024_1_1_Voter-Survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWYyMDkyZC0yYmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpcZ_CgtEboV3cgpgXE_9-y1E9mNLXIMoYpqi6UkoFo=&emci=12f2092d-2bb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=15f2092d-2bb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=43566853) | | **[YES »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98488562/516813335/975036287?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_121024_1_1_Voter-Survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWYyMDkyZC0yYmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpcZ_CgtEboV3cgpgXE_9-y1E9mNLXIMoYpqi6UkoFo=&emci=12f2092d-2bb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=15f2092d-2bb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=43566853)**

Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=63fdd89879bd4db4b8dfaaba1d101860&_e=mjYl60fC7IS4Wv2hsDfOjHRHSi7VKpK4r-Re-6MB-cGoAIrAjDs6bttcqscvqLCKhG3lQKqQ3WjuvuWG3ybGfd0Hr4udStb8OLTYlBfdtl_sZPKNEGxkYffv_Lc6VImCOpbWJDjeQfe1RNQ2tLV2RHiFyv-BrDWhzE_AtYwWj7hZwkhvy2Cu4s7YScAoeGRumYCPhvdD5bxX47M3EMzn-QM_6EUvLq_EMzh_ui3f8lSA-Fwu411N4fzBG3dSmQNELQvBI30Us9C8jSxwTr8HOB_wZwKN4FqodeGQcnoLqSDeJZ73lydu4oZiFUziIKuJrFy-yhyeY0dcpMgUzjuO4d8ZdYNZCrpnbVfMPbCf_N4Nj1xsppWeAzoa8MN9owkx29A7Cz9EIaW9-JvfT_rzOsw7OCvv0l8O5930ZJpW-0M%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. name: Team Keith
subject: Our work is just getting started, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

The election may be over, but our work is just getting started.

Our team is focused on maintaining an aggressive ground game and preparing to fight back if and when Donald Trump tries to force his extreme agenda on the American people. But to keep this campaign running and grow our grassroots movement, we need to meet certain fundraising goals.

The holiday season is a notoriously difficult time for fundraising. People are busy traveling to see family and friends, preparing for celebrations, and using their hard-earned money to purchase gifts for their loved ones. We get it!

But, Peter, if we’re going to stand up to the second Trump administration, we can’t afford to experience a holiday slump.

We’re reaching out to you today because we have to make a dent in our $50,000 end-of-year goal before the holidays.

You have until December 31 to take advantage of Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, which allows you to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the state of Minnesota.

Peter, will you make your fully refundable $75 donation today to help us avoid a holiday slump and reach our critical end-of-year goal? Every dollar fuels our fight for a better future.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241210ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241210ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241210ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241210ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241210ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241210ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

You can now use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241210ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417

Scott Jennings _**[triggered his woke CNN colleagues](https://substack.com/redirect/8fcf1af5-14d9-4a82-bbe1-61a2ebe1ac95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ when he referred to Daniel Penny as "the good guy" after he was found innocent of manslaughter in the Jordan Neely subway chokehold case, Monday.
"They should build a statue to this guy in New York City!!" Jennings said.
_**[Watch these woke CNN pundits absolutely lose it:](https://substack.com/redirect/8fcf1af5-14d9-4a82-bbe1-61a2ebe1ac95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8fcf1af5-14d9-4a82-bbe1-61a2ebe1ac95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Penny was found innocent by a Manhattan jury after he subdued Jordan Neely, a black man, on a NYC subway using chokehold which resulted in Neely's death. Witnesses said Neely was making belligerent and threatening gestures to passengers before Penny stepped in.
BLM activist are now calling Penny a racist for his actions, as well as the justice system for letting him walk free. BLM leader Hawk Newsome called for _**["black vigilantes"](https://substack.com/redirect/337d5d44-4035-4504-a1e1-d6fe79a5a3c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ to take action following the innocent verdict.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8fcf1af5-14d9-4a82-bbe1-61a2ebe1ac95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
