* * *
# **Christian preacher DISMANTLES woke college brat who hates conservatives**
Based Christian speaker Cliffe Knechtle but _**[a young woke brat in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/57e961d2-7402-4406-a140-3ef21f27ba98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ at Texas State University after their embarrassing angry outburst.
"I'm gonna fight for the mother f***ing revolution, no matter how many conservatives come after me!!!" the young radical screamed at Knechtle. "F**k you all, you f***ing conservatives! Enemy of the people!!!"
Knechtle's calm response is absolutely perfect, _**[watch below:](https://substack.com/redirect/57e961d2-7402-4406-a140-3ef21f27ba98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/57e961d2-7402-4406-a140-3ef21f27ba98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Knechtle is famous for going to college campuses and taking on crowds of dozens of radical left-wingers at the same time. His clips frequently go viral on social media, and showcase himself defending a conservative or christian argument against the woke mindset of the young students. He effortlessly recalls Bible verses from memory... which they seem to hate.
_**[This is the very definition of triggering someone.](https://substack.com/redirect/57e961d2-7402-4406-a140-3ef21f27ba98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/57e961d2-7402-4406-a140-3ef21f27ba98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# College girl hits boyfriend then fakes medical emergency to avoid arrest! Learns lesson the HARD WAY!
Police body cam footage shows _**[the arrest of a 19-year-old female](https://substack.com/redirect/c13052c1-99b4-4430-b21b-9ae84c437efd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ in Key West, Florida on February 14, 2024.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c13052c1-99b4-4430-b21b-9ae84c437efd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The young female suspect was on vacation with her much older boyfriend when hotel guests called police due to what was reported as a "screaming female in the hotel parking lot".
When officers arrived they found the tipsy female suspect with marks on her hands and the boyfriend with marks on his head and neck.
During the officers' investigation, _**[the young suspect openly admitted to striking her boyfriend repeatedly](https://substack.com/redirect/c13052c1-99b4-4430-b21b-9ae84c437efd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and claimed she was pushed and therefore struck her boyfriend. Officers then arrested the 19-year-old for battery, however, once she was in police custody, the suspected started throwing a tantrum then suddenly began having a "medical emergency" which officers believed was an attempt to get out of being arrested.
The young female could not handle that she was being arrested and claimed she was "protecting her boyfriend" but _**[she learned her lesson the hard way.](https://substack.com/redirect/c13052c1-99b4-4430-b21b-9ae84c437efd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c13052c1-99b4-4430-b21b-9ae84c437efd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

Hey there, I hope you’re doing well. The next House session is around the corner and my team and I are doing everything we can to craft an agenda that centers the everyday working families of the 13th District. I’m honored to serve as the New Democrat Coalition’s upcoming Vice-Chair, leading on good-faith, bipartisan policy that advances innovative, inclusive, and forward looking policies. At the top of our list for this upcoming session is addressing the housing crisis that is affecting every corner of this country. **[Earlier this year we released our Affordable Housing Action Plan that would address the lack of affordable housing nationwide and offer solutions that will deliver the relief to allow people to stay in safe, secure, and affordable housing. Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Patriot,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I 'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I 'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5d227dc588b64e1f9fb97d3897960957&_e=cuQ1zop2qu-COrS7ilr3ZLzNk0X17bn6zmJq4YanyQwaL0hX3jYnXVCB5ybJfmKsWs3YxeMY008W_LtGPYQ2MtNkHpgIJNYkNE43FYYfRQzoHcGvVPEtz81TBFYFpTbwjtgmiGi2VwZ9Jfnu7Bx6KszSPitcizslbpgv4KTYtn5WgYCqlSnVOhCf4QFIsvIY_jM9g1ajuBn-6mHVdsSRFcRVk_E2_lfSQ0plT6SKRK5jdOl_0huXHxp7HlDkyntbnfInjr_L6MGN7lIb5FJmHFzS_kzuP--AAPhhLWIOZCel2QjHtqICLtiF9uWFjS0mr6kn63QcUbiyivWVNpz3Q0_z0B5-DjkWeuBm_T_c8XWoq1plmm-A02P1eQMsmmls)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.

**Defending Parental Rights**
While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5d227dc588b64e1f9fb97d3897960957&_e=cuQ1zop2qu-COrS7ilr3ZLzNk0X17bn6zmJq4YanyQwaL0hX3jYnXVCB5ybJfmKsWs3YxeMY008W_LtGPYQ2MtNkHpgIJNYkNE43FYYfRQzoHcGvVPEtz81TBFYFpTbwjtgmiGi2VwZ9Jfnu7Bx6KszSPitcizslbpgv4KTYtn5WgYCqlSnVOhCf4QFIsvIY_jM9g1ajuBn-6mHVdsSRFYn0_mGfK5y6aW4Kc9CPLu6vjuY_QXoxr7_-U93zZmqsVHvTmyKCMG16gssqr1jU2Jf6WXuQ7hytU718_OEzY4mwtGOVaxrNaZymHuToUfNJOnBs7WZztzI3e8R20vcjfl-qg8p8fdz9p0R8C-Okff4RU943s8BU6kjpZabnx5Np)

**School Choice**
Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality.

**Defeating DEI**
Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities.

It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process.

Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple:

Public universities will be **explicitly prohibited** from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs.

In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools.

Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists.

The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, Patriot.

clean_body: Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Patriot, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I 'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I 'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, Patriot. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn't have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don't have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661.

name: Team Swalwell
subject: championing equality for all

body:
a message on Human Rights Day |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98489296/516815694/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTA1MzYyMS0yZWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1HjTrv7XyHRVoeX-mWBPYTSRDXeN0MXPEiKr08VJMBc=&emci=f07a303a-1cb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b1053621-2eb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=7878003)
Friend, Today is Human Rights Day — so let’s take a moment to reflect on the values that unite us: equality, freedom, and dignity for all. These values must hold true for every person, everywhere. On this day in 1948, the United Nations proclaimed the Universal Declaration of Human Rights. A monumental achievement, this document proclaimed that we all have certain inalienable rights regardless of race, color, religion, or any other status. The theme of this year's Human Rights Day is "Our Rights, Our Future, Right Now." And even 76 years later, we must remember the importance of these fundamental human rights in our lives. As we observe this day, it’s clear that our work is far from over. Inequality **persists.** Rights are **overlooked.** Voices are **unheard.** Our team is committed to amplifying these voices, protecting everyone’s rights, and pushing for change. We strive for a world that truly embodies the ideals written out in that declaration. Let’s honor the legacy of this day by taking action and continuing the fight for justice every single day. With optimism,
Team Swalwell
|

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We’ve got to try something different
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The American Dream got me through my toughest times. I still believe in it. But if we’re going to strengthen the American Dream and make sure it endures for our kids and grandkids, it’s time to try something different.
#

Peter —
It wasn’t easy growing up the way I did. We didn’t have much.
What we did have was hope. Hope and hard work — that’s the American Dream. The expectation that, if you kept your nose clean and worked hard, you could get ahead in life. That you could make it. My mom sacrificed so much so my sisters and I could live the American Dream and become a teacher, a doctor, a business owner, and now, a Senator-elect.
As I traveled Arizona over the last two years, one of the most troubling things I saw was that parents continue to work hard for their children. They continue to sacrifice and put in the long hours. But they feel like the American Dream is further and further out of reach, and they worry that their kids are going to end up worse off than they were.
It’s clear that something has to change.
The American Dream got me through my toughest times. I still believe in it. But if we’re going to strengthen the American Dream and make sure it endures for our kids and grandkids, it’s time to try something different.
When I’m sworn in to the United States Senate in January I will be one of the youngest members serving in the chamber. The average age is about 65 — 20 years older than I am. Some people might see that as an excuse to sit back and let others take the lead. Not me. I’m excited to be a voice for the people who need one in the Senate.
The people of Arizona sent me there to get results. I intend to deliver for them, and you, Peter.
Thanks for all your help, and Semper Fi.
Ruben
**A personal invitation from Ruben Gallego**
We’ve built an incredible team over the last two years. And as Ruben begins to prepare to take office, we’re launching the next stage of his campaign:
[**The Sustainers Fund**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec24%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.WZViHP&refcode=em241210-1-90&t=1&akid=3599%2E734936%2EH2PLfd)
Every month, we assess how many monthly recurring donations we are set to receive. This is one of the main ways we budget for and fund our political operations in Arizona and around the country.
Without a continuous source of funding it’s impossible for us to sustain outreach and build a long-term strategy and infrastructure it will take to keep Arizona blue in the years to come.
And one of the single best ways to help us maintain that infrastructure is by joining the thousands of others who sustain our movement with a monthly recurring donation.
[**So, if you’re ready for the next step, can you sign on to chip in $10, $5, even as little as $2 each month to support Ruben in the months and years to come?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec24%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.WZViHP&refcode=em241210-1-90&t=2&akid=3599%2E734936%2EH2PLfd)
[START A RECURRING DONATION](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec24%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.WZViHP&refcode=em241210-1-90&t=3&akid=3599%2E734936%2EH2PLfd)
---

name: Youth Advocacy Alert (via NextGen PAC)
subject: Young people are leading the fight for labor rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; [http://nextgenpac
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98489402/516816065/-1995327540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmIwZDY4Yi0yZWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJ9Ii6NCbDY2Fes59S6mqziHhAACDtZOR0_hqhYKIcc=&emci=2f39fbd6-17b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=16b0d68b-2eb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)
---
Team, with just a few weeks left in 2024, we wanted to take a moment to highlight the work young people have done to fight for better working conditions and fair treatment from corporations.
This year alone, we’ve seen prices for pretty much everything go up. Rent prices have skyrocketed, and many Gen Z adults can’t afford to live on their own.
**Meanwhile, CEOs’ salaries have increased and corporations are barely paying taxes.**
**Over 88% of people under 30 support unions.** Thousands of young people have taken a stand to fight corporate greed, both at the voting booth and on the picket lines.
Just look at Starbucks!
While naysayers said there was no way a multi-billion dollar corporation would give them the time of day, young workers organized and led the way for fair contracts and good-faith negotiation.
_**That’s the kind of change NextGen is fighting for.**_
With 2025 and a second Trump presidency looming large, it’s more important than ever for us to empower young workers and give them the tools they need to make a difference.
[If that’s something you’re willing to fight for, will you chip in $5, $10, or anything you can right now to keep this youth movement going strong?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98489403/516816066/2092983180?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmIwZDY4Yi0yZWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJ9Ii6NCbDY2Fes59S6mqziHhAACDtZOR0_hqhYKIcc=&emci=2f39fbd6-17b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=16b0d68b-2eb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | Team, with just a few weeks left in 2024, we wanted to take a moment to highlight the work young people have done to fight for better working conditions and fair treatment from corporations. This year alone, we’ve seen prices for pretty much everything go up. Rent prices have skyrocketed, and many Gen Z adults can’t afford to live on their own. Meanwhile, CEOs’ salaries have increased and corporations are barely paying taxes. Over 88% of people under 30 support unions. Thousands of young people have taken a stand to fight corporate greed, both at the voting booth and on the picket lines. Just look at Starbucks! While naysayers said there was no way a multi-billion dollar corporation would give them the time of day, young workers organized and led the way for fair contracts and good-faith negotiation. That’s the kind of change NextGen is fighting for. With 2025 and a second Trump presidency looming large, it’s more important than ever for us to empower young workers and give them the tools they need to make a difference. | | | | | | With gratitude, NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: EMILYs List
subject: This isn't policy — it's a personal vendetta.
body:
When asked about cutting funding for Planned Parenthood, Mike Johnson said, "I would like to, that's for sure." |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98489523/516816322/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX20_20241210_AntiDOGE_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1055484&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTNkYTBhOC0yZWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEGWclUg2KINOby_98LOL_I4LAcWfgInxb3QZDgu5c0=) Peter,

Last week, House Speaker Mike Johnson announced on _Fox News_ that he plans to**cut funding for Planned Parenthood, a move that would leave millions of Americans without access to essential health care.**

Johnson feels emboldened to pursue these drastic cuts after holding closed-door meetings with billionaires Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy — two extremists who plan to slash regulations, spending, and federal staff. [**Will you chip in today to help us fight back and build an unbeatable first line of defense to restore our pro-choice majority?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98489524/516816325/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX20_20241210_AntiDOGE_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1055484&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTNkYTBhOC0yZWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEGWclUg2KINOby_98LOL_I4LAcWfgInxb3QZDgu5c0=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98489525/516816330/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX20_20241210_AntiDOGE_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1055484&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTNkYTBhOC0yZWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEGWclUg2KINOby_98LOL_I4LAcWfgInxb3QZDgu5c0=)

The so-called "Department of Government Efficiency" being touted by Johnson, Musk, and Ramaswamy is nothing more than a direct line to Trump's White House plans to gut social programs and agencies that millions of Americans depend on — all for the benefit of Trump's personal agenda.

Throughout his career, Johnson has co-sponsored a total federal abortion ban with no exceptions, and has been advocating to defund Planned Parenthood for years. _This isn't policy — it's a personal vendetta._

Johnson also openly stated that this new agency's goal is to "take a blowtorch to the regulatory state," _putting countless lives at risk by dismantling funding for affordable abortion care._

And Musk's bloated government contracts — thanks to less regulatory oversight of billionaires like him — will ensure that _the rich get richer at the expense of crucial social programs._

[**Democratic pro-choice women have always been the first line of defense, but they need support now more than ever. body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Hey there – Now that the election is behind us, we are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP. You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=db590b21932f4987abd2f8f107e9b34bb7503e7794cc37fcc7fce403509c283e9552cb705562e0f67c433f3a61769250261a04cf0736c290f4473a0da620b82f So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience: Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. >From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Sincerely, https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=db590b21932f4987abd2f8f107e9b34bb7503e7794cc37fcc7fce403509c283e9552cb705562e0f67c433f3a61769250261a04cf0736c290f4473a0da620b82f X_________________ https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=db590b21932f4987abd2f8f107e9b34bb7503e7794cc37fcc7fce403509c283e9552cb705562e0f67c433f3a61769250261a04cf0736c290f4473a0da620b82f >" alias="SIGN THE LETTER >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">SIGN THE LETTER >> Thank you, Team Marsha Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. name: Crow HQ
subject: The next phase in our work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

From his first victory speech in 2018, Jason has made it his mission to stand up for his constituents — no matter what.

Since then, Jason’s worked tirelessly for Colorado. He helped pass legislation that boosted the economy, invested in green energy and climate resiliency, and made progress on commonsense gun reform to protect our communities. He stood up to Donald Trump when he came to Aurora to spread lies about immigrants. And he’s always fought to uphold the rule of law and our democracy.

This team was busy too. Together, we knocked doors, made calls, and spoke to our neighbors to re-elect Jason.

Now, in just a few weeks, we begin a new phase: The start of a new Congress and Trump 2.0. We’re going to fight back against Trump, but we won’t stop there. We need to have a proactive agenda that people will get behind. That starts by listening to you.

Your priorities are Jason’s priorities. Will you take our first post-election priorities survey today? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-12-survey]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-12-survey]

We’re stronger when we unite around your priorities, and we’re grateful for your input.

Thank you,

Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2024]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] Team, From his first victory speech in 2018, Jason has made it his mission to stand up for his constituents — no matter what. Since then, Jason’s worked tirelessly for Colorado. He helped pass legislation that boosted the economy, invested in green energy and climate resiliency, and made progress on commonsense gun reform to protect our communities. He stood up to Donald Trump when he came to Aurora to spread lies about immigrants. And he’s always fought to uphold the rule of law and our democracy. This team was busy too. Together, we knocked doors, made calls, and spoke to our neighbors to re-elect Jason. Now, in just a few weeks, we begin a new phase: The start of a new Congress and Trump 2.0. We’re going to fight back against Trump, but we won’t stop there. We need to have a proactive agenda that people will get behind. That starts by listening to you. Your priorities are Jason’s priorities. Will you take our first post-election priorities survey today? [] TAKE THE SURVEY [] We’re stronger when we unite around your priorities, and we’re grateful for your input. Thank you, Team Crow Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? body:
One in three American women has been to a Planned Parenthood health center in their lifetime. Threatening funding for clinics — based solely on the idea that they are “progressive” — would hurt millions of people.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98489859/516817239/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.12.10_PlannedParenthood_X2_Expanded&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmJhMjU4MC0zMGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QNVQfQ_zCYAethZycL7bcyZEZmwGSs4cJ6LNNa_CMzs=&emci=9eb0b0bb-2eb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0fba2580-30b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=23483442) | **Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, the incoming leaders of President-elect Trump’s to-be-created Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), are already threatening funding for Planned Parenthood clinics.** In an op-ed about their plans for “DOGE,” they shared their plans to cut “federal overspending,” including “$300 million to progressive groups like Planned Parenthood.” Let’s be clear: Planned Parenthood doesn’t get a blank check from the government. body:
In case you missed it...
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98490389/516819485/-1410903697?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Yost_241210_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ1NTY5OC0zMWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjMbKcgjCITik_gPdTYpDukNjTNJk4PTiozarRoqmc=) Team,

Ohio Attorney General Dave Yost is back at it again with his extreme political tricks.

For example, why did he just appeal a ruling affirming that Ohio’s six-week abortion ban was unconstitutional? He’s trying to carve out the sections of the abortion rights amendment we enshrined in the state constitution because they don’t align with his extremist political views.

[_**If you’re tired of Dave Yost ignoring Ohioans, rush $5 right now to join Ohio Democrats in standing up for our freedoms >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98490390/516819486/-1410903697?amount=5&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Yost_241210_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ1NTY5OC0zMWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjMbKcgjCITik_gPdTYpDukNjTNJk4PTiozarRoqmc=)

Voters said we will NOT go back to the extreme, six-week ban that he keeps pushing, but he refuses to listen. Instead, he keeps attacking our freedom to make decisions about our own bodies.

If you want a masterclass on ignoring voters, look no further than Yost. He’s perfected the art of putting extreme anti-abortion politics over people and ignoring the will of Ohioans when it's inconvenient for his views.

And he just **confirmed that he will run for Governor in 2026.** Now more than ever, Ohioans deserve answers about his extreme politics.

[_**If we want to defeat Yost in 2026, we need to gear up NOW. Can you pitch in to help us?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98490391/516819487/-1410903697?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Yost_241210_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ1NTY5OC0zMWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjMbKcgjCITik_gPdTYpDukNjTNJk4PTiozarRoqmc=)

clean_body: In case you missed it... | = Team, Ohio Attorney General Dave Yost is back at it again with his extreme political tricks. For example, why did he just appeal a ruling affirming that Ohio’s six-week abortion ban was unconstitutional? He’s trying to carve out the sections of the abortion rights amendment we enshrined in the state constitution because they don’t align with his extremist political views. = Voters said we will NOT go back to the extreme, six-week ban that he keeps pushing, but he refuses to listen. Instead, he keeps attacking our freedom to make decisions about our own bodies. If you want a masterclass on ignoring voters, look no further than Yost. He’s perfected the art of putting extreme anti-abortion politics over people and ignoring the will of Ohioans when it's inconvenient for his views. And he just confirmed that he will run for Governor in 2026. Now more than ever, Ohioans deserve answers about his extreme politics. = Thank you, The Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

Peter,
---
In the waning days as America's 46th President, Joe Biden has sealed his legacy as the most corrupt president in American history, and he is distancing himself from the field. Each day, he makes an even bigger mockery of every institution we hold dear, and he's not done yet.
In an unprecedented turn, Biden is exploring options to PREEMPTIVELY PARDON his cronies, the very same people who have harassed and harangued the American public for the last four years. Biden's pardon of his son and his preemptive pardons acknowledge that crimes were committed. The left is rotten with woke projectionism-- they allege President Trump will do the very same thing they've done for years. They virtue signal with phrases like, "respecting the rule of law" and "defending democracy," then pardon themselves for their crimes. The left spent four years persecuting President Trump, pro-lifers, and parents, but now they screech that President Trump is the threat to persecute his opponents. It's backward, it's wrong, but it's how the left operates.
November crystalized that the American people see through the facade. I won't sit idly by and watch the rule of law and our revered institutions erode the trust of the American people. A preemptive pardon is nothing more than an admission of guilt, and I'm going to fight to hold the lawless democrats accountable for their crimes.
---

To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor). # **[Kari Lake](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=556144af7d0a404695d184a23ea6257b&_e=r3b-VygKX6QxltpKHg_e_9xvVnS5asP5RvLQ5oYRNR50-5w1xFfHWW52gkR8P7vbuI4gqibO_lPBSWWxAR-uWKqwtG3h_3k1ODntPzu0zP67zsLYUs3SVJkDc6mipbA7DB02tGVSaCbeTUZzYO0FSgrMzoebtrcmgWhDht3NpcR47rt9KWWnoO7i4MIcwjvT1A6_on4ZmwtVKioqsHqb6Zj4B6NUMacAW7ygEGzwJbheL2VO0GwNnbJy82kvEzF_vc02J53L5erpGFNQe0D7zqpxv4APlMT1Fw0GaC0zCuAEfcA3e8czlelm1ugnvItyqUN74gQM5g639pFepywM2j7v5UJfY_OJFXX8N8siylH91TGw9Mscp2enTm67c-_5BkAxxmZ-ssAr0RcBqFVXAKNOQgTigiuG6Bb0rJn3XB8%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=556144af7d0a404695d184a23ea6257b&_e=r3b-VygKX6QxltpKHg_e_9xvVnS5asP5RvLQ5oYRNR50-5w1xFfHWW52gkR8P7vbuI4gqibO_lPBSWWxAR-uWKqwtG3h_3k1ODntPzu0zP67zsLYUs3SVJkDc6mipbA7DB02tGVSaCbeTUZzYO0FSgrMzoebtrcmgWhDht3NpcR47rt9KWWnoO7i4MIcwjvT1A6_on4ZmwtVKioqsHqb6Zj4B6NUMacAW7ygEGzwJbheL2VO0GwNnbJy82kvEzF_FMETCEiG5ShTcIiwqjlMirwTX8bIPugSEgFKyXcRBKGzRiwtnndGT09JweEuRntDEQwfhymOuuPeKF9udkIRFshMM1DkrXDvYURv-a2rcHWGYIeSTHb1KSa3iqEXHLb4zNRhJb8Oh1k8PrrajFdcIdx1zUTi16F6ArjkpQfHXNE%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.

name: CADEM Organizing
subject: December 2024 Organizing Newsletter
body:
Thank you to our California Democrats! | | | | |
---
| As the year comes to a close, we want to thank our incredible volunteers for their dedication and hard work. From door knocking and texting voters to making calls and engaging with communities, you helped us reach voters across California. While the presidential election didn’t go as we hoped, your efforts were key in flipping important U.S. House seats from red to blue here in California, maintaining our majority in the state legislature, and electing the most women legislators in California’s history. Thank you all for your unwavering support and commitment!

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Warning: The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner
body:
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDiaZGD7a28F6IpzXoYe_zlhhP6MfIAsLjdDfGCQGxpW2Z9Ql6vLvmA6ISJSe2hyyImujvGXxsDVc0G9jMnG0DG2sQY5OmsgGAC_O4sYjnbLxrBaV5lZLltmL2PY1It_cbye_N-y0cUMkpyTXZL91P1bi80X3m48E1o0JxJg1YBgrBA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDiYM3BxuJXiNxTCl2nUnUi_LH89mtfHHTm01rOE-fEstAvQeEE1SupTSjzSQ95FIOlCxMSMZeTaVOiPpPCmoQ8P-C8exNfh1OomD83k4Pfc3-ZYMeUNqkZCYIkyycosGOe_XHQKRcd2yObRcUjf8nzRycGu7EXQtb-1JWRR83-yYmg%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDiYwefnWlkc6AH7iY7GzCIuIjWChf7gtwxCs-O-flCcVwDg0nEBP-39YdHNHPmloCSWAsbMKarBHXlK2bMiVqxzQQsJMcGrYgfnrexzQ4ba7Bptam5dZzZda99i1Vu5sZ8Eca-mnpIAZud42vrPov8QiH9lYqClntiokNb3WPYcIzg%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDiZ7q5lJgbwfCzPVPLtePMD0iCGMmj3j8RTpLpCPH6VhvTSG21KoG0zV8iSC5FDD05rfsvoej0KlSp_Cqlct2LnZW-eq54y7WEjfpLplP8LgxOB8oGeQYLnJg2PjjVoF3ubGnqKsNBrwdwQYhK59PR0QzNmAPeejZT9ok5OdDbwvpw%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDibtPMeUyeTuzS-0TudlxO4YvhNCr5Kqs5dWEDN_jPw9gj0J7AWEnWFdeZjJl_F57S__vlWfVQu9BKjV3MZXccF0gzC5IDGSyf20LYANmehE_X_fBLGA54h3tgQ8j07P06AuqWt2Fus6tSyVveB7Rl_MwEnONKelYXsc45cVKlIhPg%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDiYSYZq8923jM1uoq-Hzn4dBpsOSPSONLUcwkVz9JCjxqTFwH0iEpZOK-9jAlNS9qDYOj47zfRH6Gt6PpM_jWCPUfwJtd-Q20RyL5mqxBxMm90997TQ4iBpkizVmEb_gf6FepkrmC4dV_qrnilEqdGkwib5RDh2z7ZXkERc8PIg9AA%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDiY8594lLDd9fKvmHTj1hBs1NQGBfusOVVYQiJ9lx3UZCfjZoJ9Nr3isTIVeTHPmRqVEcp6DtL75evghosCARn8RerVoAr44gYsMGs45wcvbQL1ex-c4U4KheOAAXqrj31QwEZJUQ-MyE0WcNSsqVW9anarjbv_7IcP_ma2HqwLdjw%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDibdQd4N-YfJP2qIrReHaRGA9CO-btDudO-5PYS4-lMsJlX6cfzxKBfJFLy2UdxALwOof_ZlPcofHeI_aDGdiEQDu-jvxoQKHzqgx3mcU5xA5fcdXOA5Ec-RK2Rfgq9kLZDR_umLjQx0LFLFHp0zfFx_vpanrJj6KvGbAMbx-j2S5w%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDibOiz0qfQmtNy_MOzg4S5uy4Yt0Z0_G19AtqRTqoWjskkVpfACgts6ozUDRRpkPFVjGi9r7gEsYVnv_FSHYP7PQZDPDZHZ4_VckV-kAW-p7WlrJCqHDiBPjO-BDAk0-bZQeqDLaY-lAH4ZjKd-3Zq2nNmdPUPFHFGaU37TH2gSsmw%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDiYC2gptW2c3UGvdeDpB7uqOVWzNtZ1s1EHlQG5etf7-FXggPl6BrjkWivsJslDjeE37cmsalfy9v_jD-XfrjflNKGH75JgCqc4-Inmz6zj0pe3fil3WFT8IYqYjfRwKt5nkC3UF4tHijf2mZdZEBYDYI7fA8nzaSbfYt4db0puutg%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDiYM3BxuJXiNxTCl2nUnUi_LO64id-Dnb6Z6oz_zcAM_dG79-cMYwRVbSdD5hbbVeMogGepMD_B2Um3LEE1AFGS_2HpS5ou8JneXYH9_YM4rmCCGFqhG5ekvTDG3LRio21qw8gHXWHyFcuTgp80MmfNwH52r8Hs3ox0wOkzEi-YFiQ%3D%3D)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8495a96a047c47578a1f3543b8849c67&_e=9PryiaWsHH0pOoB7A6JIGbK-_Oj44ndt6nbf2e51lFfHXt9Qy7V68FTOze6L01_TSCV8y7S6KJp43CNiIB1ozMBf2Z30uzfCt0weIAG92p8M5mLTi02nqVMiTHkBFI8P8DIewn510wD72mzvP-b5-gKjY7SbE51tiNEdocApFGacLHP-OeltaMoL6yINySvGIHh1XZO_4O4vh5GUuW_6-yvd80PdlHM_UNraFNYlDiYM3BxuJXiNxTCl2nUnUi_LV2c6Qm67yX_mtxcu-DyTyVhQkO4azlHphQ7S28UUWkCyyl7oBry_-Djz4L3dSGXMt5MPUxQTw0kskqhGp7wVjhcvfCSU5ETIxjbpVjh-fP3NAq4K5DaugBDivU51sfNenJlvYO8aYrH_arNlzi4psw%3D%3D)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."

clean_body: There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Dan Carr
subject: What to look for in a Candidate
body:
#FaithAndPolitics #ChristianVoting #BiblicalLeadership

| |
---|---|---
|
# What to look for in a Candidate
### #FaithAndPolitics #ChristianVoting #BiblicalLeadership
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Dec 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
With our Christian values in America at stake, quitting and giving up should never even be considered options, especially when it comes to standing firm in our beliefs as Christians. During the challenges and uncertainties of the political arena, it's important for the future of our great Nation that we remain steadfast in our commitment to uphold the values and principles that align with our faith.

## Tom Homan is a man with a plan...
You've heard me talk about my trip to the border and what I learned, well Tom Homan knows it all too well. And he and President Trump are ready on day 1 to get to work on the problem with real solutions.
Watch this for what they're doing now, actions to be taken on Day 1, how the media has twisted family separations and more:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a14e261d-eef9-4b45-bb13-6bbf1e019f59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: re: H.R. 9495
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Remember H.R. 9495, the bill that would give Donald Trump’s administration
sweeping power to shut down any nonprofit organization he doesn’t like by
accusing them of supporting terrorists without any due process or
evidence?

After passing the House with the support of 15 establishment Democrats,
it’s now moving to the Senate for a vote to advance to President Biden’s
desk for signature.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140524?t=1002&akid=36221%2E1203867%2E6130tq ]We need to build the public pressure necessary to stop this dangerous
bill in its tracks. Will you send a letter to tell the Senate to block
H.R. 9495 now?

If passed in the Senate, this assault on our freedom of speech and right
to organize will give presidents like Trump unprecedented and unchecked
power to squash dissent, especially when it comes to organizations
speaking out against Israel’s ongoing genocide and ethnic cleansing of
Palestinians.

This is an alarming overreach of executive power that we can’t afford to
put in the hands of any president, especially Trump.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140524?t=1003&akid=36221%2E1203867%2E6130tq ]Join Justice Democrats and other organizations demanding the Senate
vote NO on H.R. 9495 to protect nonprofits and civil society from this
grave threat →

Take Action

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241210-36221-footer&t=1004&refcode2=36221_1203867_6130tq&akid=36221%2E1203867%2E6130tq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=36221%2E1203867%2E6130tq

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: George Whitesides
subject: My most important job
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98492030/516826363/2104826962?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2ZkMWJiMy0zOWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zkfwojBh0LYOuKlJLMsZxq2Tpm7EmKxRTpT93Ea59wY=)
Peter,

Late last month, I sent around our post-election survey. As your Congressman-elect, listening to your voices is my most important job.

Here’s some of what folks had to say:
| Protecting our democracy, climate change, and women’s reproductive rights were the top three issues of concern for **90% of respondents**.

Steve T., Claire H. and others voiced concern with Donald Trump’s attacks on education and the closing of key federal agencies.

A **majority** of respondents are **seriously concerned** about possible cuts to Social Security and Medicare under a second Trump term.
---

There is a lot of work to be done in the new Congress come January, and with Republicans holding onto power by a razor-thin margin, it’ll be anything but easy.

Despite the odds, I’m prepared to keep fighting for good local jobs, lower everyday costs, safeguard reproductive freedom, protect Social Security and Medicare, and much more.

As you can see, we’ve received good feedback from our survey. But the more responses I receive, the better I can serve you in Washington.

**[Will you take just a minute to fill out our survey? I value your opinion on the critical issues facing our communities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98492031/516826395/1304592134?refcode=em-12.10.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2ZkMWJiMy0zOWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zkfwojBh0LYOuKlJLMsZxq2Tpm7EmKxRTpT93Ea59wY=&emci=70ba3fab-39b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=63fd1bb3-39b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=36198509)**
****[Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98492034/516826414/1304592134?refcode=em-12.10.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2ZkMWJiMy0zOWI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zkfwojBh0LYOuKlJLMsZxq2Tpm7EmKxRTpT93Ea59wY=&emci=70ba3fab-39b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=63fd1bb3-39b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=36198509)****
---

Thank you,

George

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f518521658974baa93dec26c106ebec5&_e=jHnztHgly6SoXJiC95CIXq6guZyEkTP3GKLMFzxUoluHXHOxnlMkGNyBCKkzqYRYIh4_EeXBl687GNDDNEIbNPclCEIyiIakZUeQYSVJW38K1Z5aEDyQ-4hmicDXDhMY1QbU9vxod6fL-SsbP8DIjJ9mzG9uH3ez5g6ulRaIa60v0iwP-2lWcJvZ5yBijfB4joEi5l_KcNfWdE-GFVG5Qrb0R6KCIeY6v4-Fvkzak9K5GaTZdXMr7C2RW_TSwRYna9EtGh_x86f6NJRSvppUSZ2MRzr9B5Y5NwcRhniPszBmZX56A40Z_5wqPkXZah_MEMeRG9AqJWSSYc2AS-NAme4RmDPnTXp7e5X0d-jbbpSCTeol1tVlEZ4qOEJ3bqtREmoDeJgounm5s1WBiRiij-G7ihv3B8QDoPMEZwQP49U%3D)
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f518521658974baa93dec26c106ebec5&_e=jHnztHgly6SoXJiC95CIXq6guZyEkTP3GKLMFzxUoluHXHOxnlMkGNyBCKkzqYRYIh4_EeXBl687GNDDNEIbNPclCEIyiIakZUeQYSVJW38K1Z5aEDyQ-4hmicDXDhMY1QbU9vxod6fL-SsbP8DIjJ9mzG9uH3ez5g6ulRaIa60v0iwP-2lWcJvZ5yBijfB4joEi5l_KcNfWdE-GFVG5Qrb0R6KCIeY6v4-Fvkzak9K5GaTZdXMr7C2RW_TSwRYneWXiO7qBzLWjqdYR-vYmAWXhwbKaQ_IJvAPUzl4ktvHbcrKoPmo_CRthEw-DR-NTz5VEDVp_GtVUxLOMyQWsZfKlXHRrsyuTLA3fpD0W_NHUNIdQRK-hR-FW2npImLlGdGPrZuZyM1VP6R33zzh3twEXYrulMCCiY_lXsWUI_vY%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f518521658974baa93dec26c106ebec5&_e=jHnztHgly6SoXJiC95CIXq6guZyEkTP3GKLMFzxUoluHXHOxnlMkGNyBCKkzqYRYIh4_EeXBl687GNDDNEIbNPclCEIyiIakZUeQYSVJW38K1Z5aEDyQ-4hmicDXDhMY1QbU9vxod6fL-SsbP8DIjJ9mzG9uH3ez5g6ulRaIa60v0iwP-2lWcJvZ5yBijfB4joEi5l_KcNfWdE-GFVG5Qrb0R6KCIeY6v4-Fvkzak9K5GaTZdXMr7C2RW_TSwRYnQQEVWqaF-KA8AzvOw-O7Dim76njk8mli0449gpWEPsN9Yo1oVGZJF7eZojPddGHqNSDT-zEovbR2r1oRZbekjEqjRcrAtSinT4nimoeqw6HJBP3DPgUfIivvqsbCVhrxc5gdhV81dTZuc_Z_MlZQX4kuCb0g-l0ZINUP1mO70kc%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

The work of flipping the House in 2026 starts now, Derek.
Ten Truth to Power endorsed candidates won in November, but we won’t BS you, we had some hard losses too.
Republicans currently control the House by just two seats. And with many congressional races being decided by just a few thousand, or even a few hundred votes, we can’t waste any time building the foundation for winning campaigns.
That’s why here at Truth to Power, the work to flip the House starts now.
**[Will you make a $5 contribution today to support our work to elect Democrats who will carry on Katie Porter’s fights and help us take back the House in 2026?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241210?refcode=em20241210-39342&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39342_3422442_yNcqNd&akid=39342%2E3422442%2EyNcqNd)**

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: What should come first in 2025?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
It would be helpful to get your input on the most pressing issues facing our communities today.

[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/XA4B8uNawvntWPcKmuFptg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpOzFDP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZ1VRrFhndkd5DVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Hi Peter, As we inch towards the holidays, I’m preparing to begin my second term in Congress – and I thought it would be helpful to get your input on the most pressing issues facing our communities today. We focused on a range of issues in our winning campaign -- from protecting American jobs to combating climate change and protecting reproductive freedoms. But I know that in these tumultuous times, there are even more challenges we have to prioritize heading into 2025. **Will you fill out this survey to give us your thoughts on what we should focus on in January? Your feedback matters a great deal to me.** [**With a host of urgent issues that need our focus, I want to hear from you about what we need to prioritize as we start. Can you fill out our priorities survey to let me know what’s on your mind?**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Y-vC8-q-9PQvQWYddTT_8A~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpOzFDP0RSaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb25uZXR3b3JrLm9yZy9mb3Jtcy90YWtlLXRoZS1zdXJ2ZXktd2hhdC1zaG91bGQtd2UtcHJpb3JpdGl6ZS1pbi0yMDI1L1cDc3BjQgpnVVGsWGd2R3kNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAGw~~) | **[Take the Survey](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Y-vC8-q-9PQvQWYddTT_8A~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpOzFDP0RSaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb25uZXR3b3JrLm9yZy9mb3Jtcy90YWtlLXRoZS1zdXJ2ZXktd2hhdC1zaG91bGQtd2UtcHJpb3JpdGl6ZS1pbi0yMDI1L1cDc3BjQgpnVVGsWGd2R3kNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAGw~~)**

Thanks in advance for participating and making your voice heard.
-Eric
