name: NDRC Election Results
subject: State-Level Results Analysis: Louisiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is what fair maps can accomplish.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98492450/516827503/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3YTI4YjhlLTM5YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zfpQf--D2w-urXQp-OTLJWNpKtllCZ_T0FZMtljYRyA=&emci=4179e2df-23b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=97a28b8e-39b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98492451/516827504/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_LouisianaStateAnalysis_email_20241210-NDRC-Tier1-LouisianaStateAnalysis_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241210-NDRC-Tier1-LouisianaStateAnalysis_&utm_campaign=LouisianaStateAnalysis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3YTI4YjhlLTM5YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zfpQf--D2w-urXQp-OTLJWNpKtllCZ_T0FZMtljYRyA=)
---
Peter,
This year, in Louisiana, we saw what can happen when fair maps are in place. For the first time in almost three decades, Louisiana voters elected _**two**_ Black members of Congress to represent their state — a victory for equal representation.
**How did we get here?**
Black Louisianans make up one-third of the state’s population, but for years, the state had in place a discriminatory congressional map that included just one Black opportunity district out of six total.
As you’ll remember, the 2023 _Allen v. Milligan_ Supreme Court decision enforced protections enshrined in the Voting Rights Act of 1965. As a result of the ruling, the Louisiana legislature had to draw a fair congressional map — one where Black voters have the opportunity to elect the candidate of their choice in two of the state’s six districts.
Then, just in January of this year, a group calling themselves “non-African-American voters” sued to stop those new maps in a _completely new court!_ But thanks in large part to the efforts of the fair map movement, the Supreme Court ruled in May that the new fair maps would be used in this year’s election.
**What were we looking for in this election?**
On Election night, we were watching results in the 6th Congressional District — the district converted to a majority-Black district under the new map.
With 50.8% of the vote, Louisianans voted Cleo Fields as their next congressman from the 6th District. Louisianians will have a more representative delegation in the 119th Congress and this is something everyone in the fair maps movement should be proud of.
**What does this mean?**
This is a clear example that fair maps help elect leaders that reflect the policy desires of the American people.
This outcome shows that the Voting Rights Act is absolutely still necessary and effective in protecting the right to vote. We must do whatever we can to protect and further enable the law.
**What’s next for Louisiana?**
Just last month, the Supreme Court announced they’ll review a case to decide whether Louisiana _violated_ the law in the January 2024 redraw of the maps, hearing the challenge from the so-called “non-African-American voters.” The decision will likely determine how congressional maps are drawn moving forward in Louisiana and could have larger implications on how the Voting Rights Act is enforced. We’ll be looking for the Supreme Court to find the January 2024 maps constitutional.
Stay tuned — what happened in Louisiana this year is proof that the work we do can pay off. But there’s much more to come on fair maps and representation in Louisiana.
Team NDRC

name: Team McBride
subject: Your responses to our survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
With the new Congress beginning in less than a month, Sarah is hard at work planning her day one priorities.
#
With the new Congress beginning in less than a month, Sarah is hard at work planning her day one priorities. As part of that effort, last week we shared a survey asking what you think Sarah’s priorities should be when she takes office.
**Today, we wanted to share some of the most common responses we received.**
_**What is the TOP issue you want Sarah to prioritize in her first 100 days?**_ Health care
Cost of living
Climate change
Gun violence _**What specific policy change would most improve your life right now?**_ Strengthening Social Security
Preserving and expanding Medicare _**How can Democrats win back working people across the country?**_ Focus on the economy
Pass bills that make life better for working people
---
[**Pitch in $5 to help Sarah keep fighting for Delaware.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241210-1?refcode=em20241210-1612&amount=5&refcode2=1612_21716_FWse8a&akid=1612%2E21716%2EFWse8a)
With Donald Trump entering the White House again, House Democrats are going to have our work cut out for us.
**But no matter what the Trump administration is doing, Sarah will always remain laser-focused on delivering for working families up and down Delaware.**
Your feedback is invaluable as we work to chart the path forward. So if you didn’t get a chance to respond to this survey, make sure to keep an eye out for more to come in the future.
[**For now, please pitch in $5 or any amount you can to help Sarah stay focused on what matters: improving life for our neighbors across Delaware and the country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241210-1?refcode=em20241210-1612&amount=5&refcode2=1612_21716_FWse8a&akid=1612%2E21716%2EFWse8a)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241210-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241210-1612&refcode2=1612_21716_FWse8a&akid=1612%2E21716%2EFWse8a)**
Thank you,
Team McBride

What is the TOP issue you want Sarah to prioritize in her first 100 days? Health care Cost of living Climate change Gun violence What specific policy change would most improve your life right now? Strengthening Social Security Preserving and expanding Medicare How can Democrats win back working people across the country? Focus on the economy Pass bills that make life better for working people With Donald Trump entering the White House again, House Democrats are going to have our work cut out for us. But no matter what the Trump administration is doing, Sarah will always remain laser-focused on delivering for working families up and down Delaware. Your feedback is invaluable as we work to chart the path forward. So if you didn’t get a chance to respond to this survey, make sure to keep an eye out for more to come in the future. Thank you, Team McBride

name: The Democratic Party
subject: We want to hear your thoughts:
body:
We’re gearing up to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but we need your input on which card to move forward with.
---
Derek, as a dedicated DNC supporter, we wanted to make sure you saw this: **We’re gearing up to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but first, we need your input on which design to use.** [**So we’re asking: Can you take a few seconds to tell us which member card design is your favorite? The sooner we hear from you, the sooner we’ll be able to get the winning design ready to print and ship.**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241210_2379_so&t=1&akid=2386%2E22930333%2EICcTID) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241210_2379_so&t=2&akid=2386%2E22930333%2EICcTID)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241210_2379_so&t=3&akid=2386%2E22930333%2EICcTID)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241210_2379_so&t=4&akid=2386%2E22930333%2EICcTID)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241210_2379_so&t=5&akid=2386%2E22930333%2EICcTID)
Democrats all over the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them into 2025 as a reminder of the work we can -- and will -- accomplish together.
We will not follow Donald Trump and J.D. Vance down a path of darkness, chaos, and hate. But here’s what we will do:
We will elect Democratic leaders who will stop Trump’s destructive agenda. From school board members to city council members, state legislators, governors, and members of Congress -- every Democrat we elect is an additional check on Trump, his administration, and his allies in Congress.
We will organize and mobilize on the ground, learn lessons from this past election, and continue our investments in state parties to prevail in upcoming watershed elections in 2025, like Virginia and New Jersey.
And we will bolster our infrastructure and technology to reach voters, listen to voters, and learn from voters.
You’re a key part of this team, and your input is critical to our work. That’s why we want to hear from you today: [**Can you be one of the first supporters to select your favorite member card design?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241210_2379_so&t=6&akid=2386%2E22930333%2EICcTID)
Thanks for everything,
The Democrats
[**Don’t wait -- after you cast your vote on your favorite member card design, make a $3 donation to reserve your card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20241210_2379_so&refcode2=2386_22930333_ICcTID&akid=2386%2E22930333%2EICcTID)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241210_2379_so&amount=3&refcode2=2386_22930333_ICcTID&akid=2386%2E22930333%2EICcTID)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We were really hoping we wouldn't have to send this email today, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[1]John Fetterman

We were really hoping we wouldn't have to send this email
today, Derek.

We’re going to have our work cut out for us to keep Pennsylvania and
John’s Senate seat blue in 2026 & 2028. In an ideal scenario, right now
we'd be much closer to hitting our critical end-of-year goal, and it'd be
smooth sailing through the holiday season from now til our December 31 FEC
deadline. But it's our job to let you know that's simply not the case
right now.

We have about three weeks left until our deadline, which may seem like a
lot of time. But with so many folks (rightfully) spending this holiday
season focusing on their loved ones instead of their inbox, we have to be
more aggressive about meeting our end-of-year goal.

So here's how we close this gap over the next few weeks: If even half of
the people reading this decided to chip in, we'd reach our end-of-quarter
FEC fundraising goal with time to spare.

John and Gisele are really counting on you to be one of the grassroots
donors who steps up before our deadline,
Derek.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241210?amount=5&refcode=em20241210-9673&refcode2=9673_434096_v_T-Yh&akid=9673%2E434096%2Ev_T-Yh ]Will you help get ahead of our end-of-quarter goal by chipping in
$5 right now? After running the numbers, we feel confident
that if enough folks decide to go above and beyond by contributing today,
we'll be on track to meet our goal ahead of this deadline.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241210?amount=5&refcode=em20241210-9673&refcode2=9673_434096_v_T-Yh&akid=9673%2E434096%2Ev_T-Yh ]Contribute $5 »

John said from day one that he would always fight for all of
Pennsylvania's 67 counties. So, we're always gonna keep it real with you!

The reality we're facing right now is that we're still pretty far behind
where we'd really hoped to be, with just a few weeks to go until our last
deadline of 2024.

The reason this deadline is so important is that it’s not just a
reflection of the money we’ve raised, but a demonstration of our
grassroots power in one of the closest swing states in the country. We
can't afford to come up even a few bucks short of our end-of-quarter goal,
and that means putting in the work now, before folks completely log off
for the holidays.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241210?amount=5&refcode=em20241210-9673&refcode2=9673_434096_v_T-Yh&akid=9673%2E434096%2Ev_T-Yh ]Please contribute $5 before midnight,
Derek. Your support today will
help us stay on track for the last few weeks of 2024 and meet our
end-of-quarter goal.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241210?amount=5&refcode=em20241210-9673&refcode2=9673_434096_v_T-Yh&akid=9673%2E434096%2Ev_T-Yh ]Donate »

Just a few weeks to go,
Derek — let's do this!!!

—Team Fetterman 💛

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1001&akid=9673%2E434096%2Ev_T-Yh

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: my promise to you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98492892/516829095/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDU2ZTAxZS0zYmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KQGCGtPmt9HbfLyD0Ym0lNq7m2m-nPElaESge7JUPE=) I’m honored to begin another term representing Oregon families. Improving the lives of hardworking families in our district has always been my top priority – and that will never change. During my first term, I worked hard to deliver results that matter. I’m proud to be one of the few first-term representatives to pass a new law this Congress, and I’m eager to build on that momentum. **With Donald Trump taking office and a razor-thin majority for Republicans in Congress, we’ll have our work cut out for us. I’m clear-eyed about that. But I’m going to work every single day to make progress and defend our freedoms — and I hope I can count on you to stay engaged and be a part of this fight.** In this next term, I’m focused on **fighting for a fairer economy** for families who feel like they don’t have control over their own futures. That means protecting access to affordable health care, standing up to big corporations and their backers in Congress, and reducing costs for hardworking families. I’m going to do everything I can to **protect abortion rights from extremist attacks**. I’m proud of my record, including helping pass one of the most comprehensive reproductive rights laws in Oregon, and this fight is far, far from over. I’ll also continue working to **protect and strengthen Medicare and Social Security** so every American can look forward to a healthy and dignified retirement. I’ve spoken with families across the district about the challenges they’re facing, and I’m ready to keep fighting for the solutions that will make a real difference in their lives. [_**But I can’t do it alone. Your support makes all the difference. Can you donate today to help us keep up the fight?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98492893/516829096/-1905085255?refcode=email_121024_promise&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDU2ZTAxZS0zYmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KQGCGtPmt9HbfLyD0Ym0lNq7m2m-nPElaESge7JUPE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98492894/516829097/-1905085255?refcode=email_121024_promise&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDU2ZTAxZS0zYmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KQGCGtPmt9HbfLyD0Ym0lNq7m2m-nPElaESge7JUPE=)

name: Steve
subject: Take an official stance: Demand proof of citizenship for voters nationwide.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We are still in shock that the Biden Justice Department went as far as to launch legal challenges against Virginia and Alabama for attempting to remove non-citizens from their voter rolls.

| |
---
| | | We are still in shock that the Biden Justice Department went as far as to launch legal challenges against Virginia and Alabama for attempting to remove non-citizens from their voter rolls.

_What a disgrace._

House Republicans believe that it's our sworn duty to make sure 1) only American citizens vote in our elections 2) a valid photo ID is presented at the ballot box, and 3) American elections remain free and fair.

**_[So I'm calling on YOU, the American People, to take an official stance and demand proof of citizenship for voters nationwide.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbFu5DwMhJ9G7mRYlCyvCxcBAld_fhyuuVLQStQuAVkyZO4md09_cIBUV6ViQc43GM6vN_fmKVO5_e83XFJurh2On-4IPsuaEp3zYF8COhjASAVSDU51cRnUHI3pcFGT1hc7jXbo7guOIUx2mBFC1DP6hNfLNUyzN2kO_mo7Wk6OAjWAUlZBH8wIYMDoaIeEQQsz-IyN-9QQY918iZmu2Ph3w7027kPdurzcmfdD6BcBq4D1wPBo2L9TaRjPCwEro9_kGYQOFLCeIM8o91ZrkjXJQEx_sBx32uWOTEy1nDS9tpPWqNyEfuX2QAH2wZsLfts93YrQr18Z3I8Xuf73U_VKGZiNYzVeLIxaqmm0Aix-OKb4DcGnTy2MhU_zp0y5yS-xAPvxKM9_F11b4v5OOdNhJ2GG2-Ypfz6Kv1Pqc4G_AQAA__8cHKU0 "So I’m calling on YOU, the American People, to take an official stance and demand proof of citizenship for voters nationwide.")_**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION ->
REQUIRE PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbFu5DwMhJ9G7mRYlCyvCxcBAld_fhyuuVLQStQuAVkyZO4md09_cIBUV6ViQc43GM6vN_fmKVO5_e83XFJurh2On-4IPsuaEp3zYF8COhjASAVSDU51cRnUHI3pcFGT1hc7jXbo7guOIUx2mBFC1DP6hNfLNUyzN2kO_mo7Wk6OAjWAUlZBH8wIYMDoaIeEQQsz-IyN-9QQY918iZmu2Ph3w7027kPdurzcmfdD6BcBq4D1wPBo2L9TaRjPCwEro9_kGYQOFLCeIM8o91ZrkjXJQEx_sBx32uWOTEy1nDS9tpPWqNyEfuX2QAH2wZsLfts93YrQr18Z3I8Xuf73U_VKGZiNYzVeLIxaqmm0Aix-OKb4DcGnTy2MhU_zp0y5yS-xAPvxKM9_F11b4v5OOdNhJ2GG2-Ypfz6Kv1Pqc4G_AQAA__8cHKU0 "SIGN THE PETITION → REQUIRE PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP")

We have less than one month before the 119th Congress so I'm urgently requesting your support.

**_[Will you step up and join me by signing the petition today?](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbFu5DwMhJ9G7mRYlCyvCxcBAld_fhyuuVLQStQuAVkyZO4md09_cIBUV6ViQc43GM6vN_fmKVO5_e83XFJurh2On-4IPsuaEp3zYF8COhjASAVSDU51cRnUHI3pcFGT1hc7jXbo7guOIUx2mBFC1DP6hNfLNUyzN2kO_mo7Wk6OAjWAUlZBH8wIYMDoaIeEQQsz-IyN-9QQY918iZmu2Ph3w7027kPdurzcmfdD6BcBq4D1wPBo2L9TaRjPCwEro9_kGYQOFLCeIM8o91ZrkjXJQEx_sBx32uWOTEy1nDS9tpPWqNyEfuX2QAH2wZsLfts93YrQr18Z3I8Xuf73U_VKGZiNYzVeLIxaqmm0Aix-OKb4DcGnTy2MhU_zp0y5yS-xAPvxKM9_F11b4v5OOdNhJ2GG2-Ypfz6Kv1Pqc4G_AQAA__8cHKU0 "Will you step up and join me by signing the petition today?")_**

**Steve Scalise**
Majority Leader

name: Kari Lake
subject: There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=58c6ea24b0c0422e94811925fe277ffb&_e=ZJ4fRzajXLP7ZiwmRlwLDqV1EUA5kgR8yp3TQX0aGSJ2pFiycefQr6IGpm5mKZJwNOFtNZUkDRwFuQ2mkTpCmV0QMOLKTk3NI7NNwSni5C3L-jCPFjJZOE7ewNvKptlejkHqHFOUF2D98MsZbLZNdeM9wJj8LCZfdeK4kmjA1XCip6uPdQAX1eohQMAMjVGA1SRJxh0rSGbMEARbbi7_0Kjh3HSfD5JEsiHl2idUlE3_BubWs3JbV__4Md6Mh9JBQhUgqYdYggWxHebGBTrF_L120i-A5wQLij8L-ybwMv9yScZCQNqoDNErUxlkC-I0VmyH4c3n4v-ZqBlpcWgrgu-tPylNljFkhdZtMaKsEzqYSUf0W2l1UCyQ7YTeVG2BxoHP5b09oZdun2by22ao939S3WyH94NKGIbS_jM1AKs%3D)
---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=58c6ea24b0c0422e94811925fe277ffb&_e=ZJ4fRzajXLP7ZiwmRlwLDqV1EUA5kgR8yp3TQX0aGSJ2pFiycefQr6IGpm5mKZJwNOFtNZUkDRwFuQ2mkTpCmV0QMOLKTk3NI7NNwSni5C3L-jCPFjJZOE7ewNvKptlejkHqHFOUF2D98MsZbLZNdeM9wJj8LCZfdeK4kmjA1XCip6uPdQAX1eohQMAMjVGA1SRJxh0rSGbMEARbbi7_0Kjh3HSfD5JEsiHl2idUlE3_BubWs3JbV__4Md6Mh9JBQhUgqYdYggWxHebGBTrF_G_Thlde6NRZkDX-f7YzM5jbOKAaeviXvGoH9rD80dIT2jszNWPk_D9_1U23TjyOmuXtU_Ly85h5XM_bZyLhNNh2SH-8kkQtQi8jgrhv6PDfkyZImIAXeJ6GR56rLIndb94aUAVCCYQ-jPlKrNczN48%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=58c6ea24b0c0422e94811925fe277ffb&_e=ZJ4fRzajXLP7ZiwmRlwLDqV1EUA5kgR8yp3TQX0aGSJ2pFiycefQr6IGpm5mKZJwNOFtNZUkDRwFuQ2mkTpCmV0QMOLKTk3NI7NNwSni5C3L-jCPFjJZOE7ewNvKptlejkHqHFOUF2D98MsZbLZNdeM9wJj8LCZfdeK4kmjA1XCip6uPdQAX1eohQMAMjVGA1SRJxh0rSGbMEARbbi7_0Kjh3HSfD5JEsiHl2idUlE3_BubWs3JbV__4Md6Mh9JBQhUgqYdYggWxHebGBTrF_OD1r-AJnlnTDsesswNd8v77rYfB3quSTwrqnbGmWCQRg8ZnQN_8VFomfMnv3p4hIGOF-htVfjJ7Q7h9z4Sku9ABWeZ4KxPo_2OW5uZ6B6ZBU8CDNICNOkbf_kHjuRLG6bLhTyuxTgi1QplZLFKUmuE%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---

clean_body: Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. | | | | | | | MERRY CHRISTMAS From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo | | From the Desk of | Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this Christmas Card to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones. Fellow Patriot, I’m not giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you. You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country. Not the Left’s lawfare.Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth. generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. body:
God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. | |

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0b9262c37944502b840f82e2ec3fe06&_e=b85BRngVEqZVG2eNj673ae3W7DRoj8tm0LmBB2HKUuLyI3bhNP6ji5HZqjLhIRxyfE_kYuL6cMHsyC6TCy68w-n7rxBx0qqN4kCvvJUIU5jTDRA3NNfmOMit1Gqycj0VtHqOB4QFQxenDyQ1DR40GTdZAryM-QwLfhyRzfUlxeRIr1aweS9eEAMNVtQ8O87IND1hdjSfZI0RYFMl1fyRwtudmrdI6LmTG_XTcqWJiIGgFOfgaXv_hgI6A65O5yxLsod2Hr5azepfjBMLVZKXQzC2nVt0eXu5hyhtWZHjO6CYlDHHJ2PCyDwSYahiOQ7OA-TduKSOaAQLjPWD6Z2p80kiMKlutGovKvDL5ZWiZYnXBODbW25AlAA33dV8n3I_dupK4e8CDlMIhMG0aOE6vA%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0b9262c37944502b840f82e2ec3fe06&_e=b85BRngVEqZVG2eNj673ae3W7DRoj8tm0LmBB2HKUuLyI3bhNP6ji5HZqjLhIRxyfE_kYuL6cMHsyC6TCy68w-n7rxBx0qqN4kCvvJUIU5jTDRA3NNfmOMit1Gqycj0VtHqOB4QFQxenDyQ1DR40GTdZAryM-QwLfhyRzfUlxeRIr1aweS9eEAMNVtQ8O87IND1hdjSfZI0RYFMl1fyRwtudmrdI6LmTG_XTcqWJiIGgFOfgaXv_hgI6A65O5yxL2ojodlj5MmRqxZTHjsdKScQjEWt7wa_aHviUHSOseKgIu8duUivSv9XrdB_IZwzec_IhnT27IXYwz6LP_loEOozjXhjReL5PloyxwHnl6F5ljgNuCocp99jtzrRgy5eqG9QZvzsl1hW0kKDs3XiQIQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0b9262c37944502b840f82e2ec3fe06&_e=b85BRngVEqZVG2eNj673ae3W7DRoj8tm0LmBB2HKUuLyI3bhNP6ji5HZqjLhIRxyfE_kYuL6cMHsyC6TCy68w-n7rxBx0qqN4kCvvJUIU5jTDRA3NNfmOMit1Gqycj0VtHqOB4QFQxenDyQ1DR40GTdZAryM-QwLfhyRzfUlxeRIr1aweS9eEAMNVtQ8O87IND1hdjSfZI0RYFMl1fyRwtudmrdI6LmTG_XTcqWJiIGgFOfgaXv_hgI6A65O5yxL_EpdXofNIyhqG27B8Sw9yu0bhNFJWFw911cn-hwdPANTiHxA2e2fPduHBxIO5coAvhB5hl4EhwJtNbg_1f258Rq0vM-zUtymwKF6PuVLODMN_h2m6GwctYAvhVN8-voqlCEJJ-51hboU7h8EKzQCyA%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0b9262c37944502b840f82e2ec3fe06&_e=b85BRngVEqZVG2eNj673ae3W7DRoj8tm0LmBB2HKUuLyI3bhNP6ji5HZqjLhIRxyfE_kYuL6cMHsyC6TCy68w-n7rxBx0qqN4kCvvJUIU5jTDRA3NNfmOMit1Gqycj0VtHqOB4QFQxenDyQ1DR40GTdZAryM-QwLfhyRzfUlxeRIr1aweS9eEAMNVtQ8O87IND1hdjSfZI0RYFMl1fyRwtudmrdI6LmTG_XTcqWJiIGgFOfgaXv_hgI6A65O5yxL0nCBAF1ADUCDVMPXk8ttu3ZBN6g-8AQof9X_fR_zc1hd3kCybE9ODNtnIi6L3UF-ITMKRRzzyyIiXhjp_k6aI2NnmHutnrw2cAOoH-j9rZCn_4NG4uKaSFnukpQYjY_i2gyTvXNqdBKzvNZ8BOR07g%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. It isn't any more complicated than that. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. subject: Republicans must vote NO to this massive spending "Swampbus" bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
This is what happens when RINOs and the Radical Left have the keys
|
Peter,

It should come as no surprise that career Radical Left and RINO politicians are threatening to push a huge omnibus bill through Congress right before President Trump takes office. This omnibus bill is a MASSIVE waste of taxpayer money. [**I need YOUR help to KILL THE BILL!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a71c0c3c02324b40b9369226c4cf051d&_e=dQc37y8SZLQP32RFXVfyO4pxEtnrqDMGMgcxXP4OvZ06le6wsd-EJQuA4cvjlcUstDK5_p8eq0Q3sm1eklsWdm1_wVOFZqpFKnN3kwe--NFG6iNv2dQA7ucouMn-xLySPRRu8gHrBzLjvR6yhIeF7loMEeKhbN1WTjzM6bzDtT_-HNKcqeYG1oflkm6sX_kqPyazE6sc67DMsqwCYEYdh1yTYHREr0FsF6drQijUSyODqy1gvG6X4ScQ1DdG_CodW8rZRXovdBoFPWKnz260z6ELC59-Iu1ezgQAHg4k67wYG87vp7o1lk2_D9tVMJgn-8ylVGEeKprgmOtSTOCAUw%3D%3D)

Some have been calling it the Christmas "Swampbus," as the DC Swamp is attempting one last effort to sabotage President Trump's administration before it even begins.

If it passes, the Swampbus will:

* _PREVENT President Trump from cutting wasteful spending with Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy 's DOGE_
* _Pass a stopgap spending bill for an ENTIRE YEAR_
* _SUSPEND the debt limit, allowing Neocons and Radical Leftists to spend tax dollars with no end in sight_
* _SEND BILLIONS OVERSEAS!!_

This is what happens when RINOs and Radical Leftists are given the keys. President Trump would NEVER approve of this.

**All we can do is make our voices heard. This is supposed to be a Democracy.**

_That 's why I'm organizing a grassroots effort to amplify the mandate given to MAGA Republicans on November 6th._

[**I 'm looking for 250 Patriots to stand with me to plead with elected officials to KILL THIS BILL!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a71c0c3c02324b40b9369226c4cf051d&_e=dQc37y8SZLQP32RFXVfyO4pxEtnrqDMGMgcxXP4OvZ06le6wsd-EJQuA4cvjlcUstDK5_p8eq0Q3sm1eklsWdm1_wVOFZqpFKnN3kwe--NFG6iNv2dQA7ucouMn-xLySPRRu8gHrBzLjvR6yhIeF7loMEeKhbN1WTjzM6bzDtT_-HNKcqeYG1oflkm6sX_kqyZUYfuu2VG7VdJduUp1y3OBwIXzIChJAVN0q4ENZpWv_5hPOMDoq6G4fg3ST_0N_fPxZd11zGawBVfWcUNcWHZZ9dpgRs8HJ40Hhb8tE780hE0mn02nvOQ3BOlWmD3auksds1eFgNisLTQkT8JOz_g%3D%3D)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..LlMY1lAewncC6TbTgi81PtU_XnmpXye96vBdA-StHHA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152692595)
On May 20, 1962, JFK delivered an impassioned speech at Madison Square Garden [in favor of universal healthcare](https://substack.com/redirect/d2862ef3-7bc1-4d15-bd19-d94a733840e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Then, decades later in 2006 nearly 7 in 10 Americans believed the government should fund healthcare. And now, a new Gallop Poll reports that [62% of Americans believe in guaranteed universal healthcare](https://substack.com/redirect/9212b175-ab42-44fc-9cc3-aee69596fd8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And despite this decades of support, not a single Presidential candidate this cycle had the courage to run on this wildly popular platform. Over the last week I've written in detail about [America's Violent Health System](https://substack.com/redirect/0dee857b-4a03-419c-b2f4-65ac7f4de235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and likewise, shared a deeply personal story about [When Insurance Rejects Life Saving Care](https://substack.com/redirect/23bf47ea-4406-4e95-9803-bd15cff8d5cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about our daughter Hannah Noor.
In response, I've received overwhelming empathy and compassion from conservatives and liberals alike, Republicans and Democrats, from those who self-identify as "Ultra MAGA" to those who label themselves as "Bernie Social Democrats." Americans get it. Healthcare needs to be a human right.
Sadly, politicians, Republicans and too many Democrats alike, don't get it. They worship at the altar of corporate donations. The health insurance industry annually [spends a harrowing $700,000,000 on lobbying politicians](https://substack.com/redirect/bd98e352-288b-444c-846c-d3f073512544?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to do their bidding. And that doesn't even include what they spend on SuperPACs to block out candidates who dare run on a platform of guaranteed universal healthcare. Those same healthcare corporations then engage in a mass media blitz of misinformation and disinformation to convince people to vote against their own self-interests. In reality, guaranteed universal healthcare is a proven model adopted by [every single developed nation on Earth](https://substack.com/redirect/63ba04bf-94cf-440f-bdbb-636b8eeecdfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (_and_ many lower income developing nations). And while I do not have $700,000,000 to counter the lobbying propaganda health insurance corporations infuse into our politics, I do have access to the facts that health insurance corporations hope the American people don't realize.
Below I address five of the main arguments against universal healthcare in the United States, debunk them with facts, and hope you feel compelled to share this far and wide with your networks. We can achieve healthcare as a human right in this country, but it requires us activating, organizing, and educating ourselves to successfully achieve that needed transformational change. **Let 's Address This**.
Help me build a justice based platform to counter the corporate funded misinformation permeating the legacy media landscape. **Become a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..LlMY1lAewncC6TbTgi81PtU_XnmpXye96vBdA-StHHA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152692595)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/846974bc-d540-4078-b74d-67b77569a4d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bill Clark | CQ-Roll Call Group | Getty Images
### Myth 1: We Can't Afford Universal Healthcare
**Fact:** The opposite is true. Dozens of studies prove that universal healthcare will save Americans billions of dollars annually. In fact, [22 studies reviewed all concluded](https://substack.com/redirect/cfc81a7b-fad2-43d1-9461-263fa82d0436?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that universal healthcare would save approximately $450 billion a year. And this is a universal conclusion. [For example](https://substack.com/redirect/cfc81a7b-fad2-43d1-9461-263fa82d0436?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "_Even the[Mercatus Center](https://substack.com/redirect/da76c142-70c2-44ac-86f7-db1cb5f17f55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a right-wing think tank, recently found about $2 trillion in net savings over 10 years from a single-payer Medicare for All system. Most importantly, everyone in America would have high-quality health care coverage_."
Moreover, we cannot forget that right now approximately 73 million Americans are on Medicaid, 68 million Americans are on Medicare, and 10 million Americans are on Tricare. That means that of our nation's 335 million people, approximately 151 million are already on a universal (or near universal) healthcare model. And guess what? These programs each cost significantly less than the exploitative for-profit healthcare model. The overhead on these programs is 2-3%, while the overhead on for profit healthcare is 20%, plus a near unlimited mark up on prescription drugs. In this we have a side by side comparison of access to the exact same doctors and medications, except one has a nominal mark up and the other has a 10X markup. It doesn't take an MBA in finance to understand that the same product or service without the massive markup is the smarter path to take. The only thing we cannot afford is for the current exploitative for profit model to continue.
### Myth 2: If Costs Go Down, So Does Quality of Care
**Fact:** This is simply not true. It is important to understand why costs decrease, because contrary to the myth, every single one of the above studies found that quality of care would _not_ decrease with universal healthcare. Costs under a universal healthcare model decrease instead because we stop wasteful spending. As consumer rights activist and scholar Diane Archer further [explains](https://substack.com/redirect/cfc81a7b-fad2-43d1-9461-263fa82d0436?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a point I reference above:
> Medicare for All is far less costly than our current system largely because it reduces administrative costs. With one public plan negotiating rates with health care providers, billing becomes quite simple. We do away with three-quarters of the estimated $812 billion the U.S. now spends on health care administration. Administrative costs are so high because thousands of insurance companies individually negotiate benefit rules and rates with thousands of hospitals and doctors. On top of that, they rely on different billing procedures -- and this puts a costly burden on providers.
Under a universal healthcare model the doctors that exist now would still exist. The medicine that exists now would still exist. The only thing that wouldn't exist are the ridiculous and pointless administrative costs from for profit insurance corporations. Universal healthcare does not cut out healthcare itself, it cuts out the pointless middle man insurance corporation, and that is what save costs. In fact, speaking of high quality of care, a Yale study found that if we had universal healthcare during the pandemic, [we would have saved more than 335,000 lives](https://substack.com/redirect/c993ee78-d6fd-4c23-955e-c489d14d5647?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### Myth 3: Universal Healthcare Puts Millions Out of Work
**Fact:** What would happen to the roughly 1.8 million Americans who work in medical billing? This is a great question and has a robust answer that I break down in three parts.
First, remember that about 40% of these jobs are already in the Medicaid and Medicare and Tricare industries--which is essentially universal healthcare for a portion of society. Therefore, we're talk about roughly 1 million jobs, which admittedly is still a large number. What to do with those?
Well, hence the second point. Expanding Medicare to accommodate another 175 million people will necessarily require medical billing professionals and administrators to do those jobs. Therefore, the question is not about eliminating jobs, but about transitioning workers from the for profit exploitative system, to a non for profit system that prioritizes access to healthcare. Likewise, remember that ending the for profit system saves us at least $450 billion annually. These resources give us options. For example, these are excellent resources that could be spent on a lengthy 2-year salary severance to those in medical billing who do lose their jobs, plus adequate funding and training to allow them to become proficient in a new job. Indeed, at $70 billion annually, four-year-public college costs a fraction of what would be saved by shifting from an exploitative for profit model, to a universal healthcare model. We cannot afford _not_ to make the shift.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26ceaa1c-7748-412f-a4fa-239faa4165c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Finally, let us agree that maintaining an industry despite the harm an industry is causing is not a great argument. As The Lancet documents, the current for profit exploitative model [enables 68,000 annual preventable deaths](https://substack.com/redirect/4e20175f-2195-4591-ac4c-c1cfa21dfd4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The current for profit exploitative model results in the [lowest life expectancy in the developed world](https://substack.com/redirect/8d686336-5f8b-4f65-b185-93540e62820a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and declining, the [highest infant mortality in the developed world](https://substack.com/redirect/d27313d9-7452-4de3-a2e2-a13fbcb47f51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and increasing, and the [highest maternal mortality in the developed world](https://substack.com/redirect/d27313d9-7452-4de3-a2e2-a13fbcb47f51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and increasing. The current for profit exploitative model results in [500,000 medical bankruptcies every single year](https://substack.com/redirect/969fa871-cbef-48cc-a117-4c3648f95a0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Are 680,000 preventable deaths and 5 million medical bankruptcies over the past decade, and the daunting reality of another 680,000 preventable deaths and 500,000 medical bankruptcies over the next decade, really worth maintaining an industry that enables these atrocities--especially when better alternatives exist?
### Myth 4: Universal Healthcare Means Tax Hikes
**Fact:** Universal healthcare means more money in your pocket. Insurance corporations want working people to pretend the exorbitant fees they charge for limited coverage does not come out of the same paycheck from which our taxes are withdrawn.
Studies show that [Americans spend at least 18.7% of their income on healthcare costs](https://substack.com/redirect/c24a1133-0722-4b93-82e6-20f7a1568ce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But even this is not a true picture because those who are lower income pay a disproportionately higher amount of their income to cover their healthcare costs. The Rand study on this subject [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/c24a1133-0722-4b93-82e6-20f7a1568ce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Households in the bottom fifth of income groups pay an average of 33.9% of their income toward health care, while families in the highest-income group pay 16% of their income toward health care. The analysis finds that households in the middle three income tiers pay between 19.8% and 23.2% of their income toward health care.
Here's why these numbers matter. There does not exist a universal healthcare model that increases taxes by 33.9%, or 23.2%, or even 18.7%. It simply does not exist. Even if income taxes dramatically increase from 24% to 34%, that is still a net savings of 8.7%-23.9% on overall take home pay. University of California, Berkeley professors of economics Emmanuel Saez and Gabriel Zucman [illustrate this well](https://substack.com/redirect/9a266c67-c8e2-46e7-be91-fd6539f268e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Take the case of a secretary earning $50,000 in wage and currently contributing $15,000 through her employer to an insurance company. With universal health insurance, her wage would rise to $65,000 - her full labor compensation. With an income tax of 6% - which, if applied to a base large enough, would be enough to fund universal health insurance - she would have to pay about $4,000 more in tax. But the net gain would be enormous: $11,000. Instead of taking home $50,000, the secretary would take home $61,000.
And moreover, this new model would ensure she pays no more deductibles, co-pays, or additional out of pocket costs. Why? Because the universal healthcare model is designed to maximize access to healthcare, not maximize profits for billion dollar corporations.
### Myth 5: Universal Healthcare Causes Long Wait Lines
**Fact:** For primary physician appointments, Americans already wait longer under our exploitative for profit model than do people in nations with universal healthcare. Frankly, I marvel at this allegation as I reflect over the fact that it took us more than two years to get our daughter the critical life saving medication she needed, only because our exploitative for profit health insurance company refused to accept our doctor's medical instruction. In reality, wait times in the United States are shorter only for elective surgery, but for primary care or for critical care, [the United States is the worst out of any nation with universal healthcare](https://substack.com/redirect/6493a329-b203-468b-901b-6348a327f891?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2598856a-65e6-42e6-854b-64d63c5ce3a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Moreover, think about how illogical the claim is that universal healthcare results in wait times that hurt our health. If that were true, why does every developed nation have a higher life expectancy than does the United States? Why do each of them have lower maternal mortality than does the United States? Why do each of them have lower infant mortality than does the United States? Why why do none of them have medical bankruptcy, while we have 500,000 annually? None of this is by accident. It is due to the obvious fact that when healthcare access is dependent on ensuring people are healthy, rather than on seeing people as piggy banks, healthcare is administered faster.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/94a35a60-69f2-4185-b889-fdafd99ba02b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And for those who claim that universal healthcare is economically unsustainable, and point to the struggles of the British National Health System (NHS), I remind them that any system that is not properly funded will collapse. A recent detailed analysis by the New England Journal of Medicine reports that the main reason why the NHS is struggling has nothing to do with access or quality of care, but instead [that](https://substack.com/redirect/16d9f00b-0623-43ac-a135-53d7f6cee33d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "_The primary contributor is long-term underinvestment in health services._ " Again, this is not accident, but a choice by right wing politicians.
Right wing politicians in the UK are working hard to convince the British public that America's for profit model is the promised land in healthcare access. Our neighbors across the pond should know they're being sold rubbish (as I'm told they say over yonder) and not to believe a word of such corporate funded propaganda.
### Bonus Myth: Why Should I Pay For Other People's Healthcare?
**Fact:** How do you think health insurance works? Once you figure that out, you'll realize that you're already paying for other people's healthcare, as they are paying for yours. You'll also realize that having a larger pool of money from which to cover costs for everyone actually saves you money. And finally, you'll realize that because more than 75 million Americans are uninsured or underinsured, every time they can't pay a bill, for profit insurance companies raise _your_ rates to make up the difference. So when people don't have healthcare, it costs you. Therefore, even if all you care about is yourself, you should want everyone to have healthcare because it will lower your costs as well.
### Conclusion
As I [posted on BlueSky](https://substack.com/redirect/72fc3559-8171-4690-b4da-50d1aded69ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "_If the killing of the UnitedHealth CEO has taught us one thing, its that we're maybe not as divided as we think. When 90% of people empathize with the people the CEO exploited more than with the CEO, it should tell our politicians something. Stop bowing to billionaires & actually work for the people_."
The facts are clear. Universal healthcare costs less, renders the same high quality care, will save at least 68,000 lives annually, prevents 500,000 medical bankruptcies, ignites job creation, increases life expectancy, decreases infant and maternal mortality, and eliminates for profit health insurance lobbying, which is a major source of exploitative lobbying to America's politicians. Literally the only people who believe we need to spend hundreds of billions on administrative costs are insurance executives who need that money for their precious private jets and yachts. I think I can speak for at least 99% Americans when I say, America will be better off with more healthcare access and few private jets for billionaires.
Despite how divided we seem as a nation, Republicans and Democrats alike are united in the need for healthcare as a human right, and we should remember that next time wealthy elites try to position us against one another.

In this we have a side by side comparison of access to the exact same doctors and medications, except one has a nominal mark up and the other has a 10X markup. It doesn't take an MBA in finance to understand that the same product or service without the massive markup is the smarter path to take. The only thing we cannot afford is for the current exploitative for profit model to continue. Myth 2: If Costs Go Down, So Does Quality of Care Fact: This is simply not true. It is important to understand why costs decrease, because contrary to the myth, every single one of the above studies found that quality of care would not decrease with universal healthcare. Costs under a universal healthcare model decrease instead because we stop wasteful spending. As consumer rights activist and scholar Diane Archer further in a point I reference above: Medicare for All is far less costly than our current system largely because it reduces administrative costs. With one public plan negotiating rates with health care providers, billing becomes quite simple. We do away with three-quarters of the estimated $812 billion the U.S. now spends on health care administration. Administrative costs are so high because thousands of insurance companies individually negotiate benefit rules and rates with thousands of hospitals and doctors. On top of that, they rely on different billing procedures -- and this puts a costly burden on providers. Under a universal healthcare model the doctors that exist now would still exist. The medicine that exists now would still exist. The only thing that wouldn't exist are the ridiculous and pointless administrative costs from for profit insurance corporations. Universal healthcare does not cut out healthcare itself, it cuts out the pointless middle man insurance corporation, and that is what save costs. In fact, speaking of high quality of care, a Yale study found that if we had universal healthcare during the pandemic, . Myth 3: Universal Healthcare Puts Millions Out of Work Fact: What would happen to the roughly 1.8 million Americans who work in medical billing? This is a great question and has a robust answer that I break down in three parts. First, remember that about 40% of these jobs are already in the Medicaid and Medicare and Tricare industries--which is essentially universal healthcare for a portion of society. Therefore, we're talk about roughly 1 million jobs, which admittedly is still a large number. What to do with those? Well, hence the second point. Expanding Medicare to accommodate another 175 million people will necessarily require medical billing professionals and administrators to do those jobs. Therefore, the question is not about eliminating jobs, but about transitioning workers from the for profit exploitative system, to a non for profit system that prioritizes access to healthcare. Likewise, remember that ending the for profit system saves us at least $450 billion annually. These resources give us options. For example, these are excellent resources that could be spent on a lengthy 2-year salary severance to those in medical billing who do lose their jobs, plus adequate funding and training to allow them to become proficient in a new job. Indeed, at $70 billion annually, four-year-public college costs a fraction of what would be saved by shifting from an exploitative for profit model, to a universal healthcare model. We cannot afford not to make the shift. | | ---|---|--- Finally, let us agree that maintaining an industry despite the harm an industry is causing is not a great argument. As The Lancet documents, the current for profit exploitative model . The current for profit exploitative model results in the , and declining, the , and increasing, and the , and increasing. The current for profit exploitative model results in . Are 680,000 preventable deaths and 5 million medical bankruptcies over the past decade, and the daunting reality of another 680,000 preventable deaths and 500,000 medical bankruptcies over the next decade, really worth maintaining an industry that enables these atrocities--especially when better alternatives exist? Myth 4: Universal Healthcare Means Tax Hikes Fact: Universal healthcare means more money in your pocket. Insurance corporations want working people to pretend the exorbitant fees they charge for limited coverage does not come out of the same paycheck from which our taxes are withdrawn. Studies show that . But even this is not a true picture because those who are lower income pay a disproportionately higher amount of their income to cover their healthcare costs. The Rand study on this subject : Households in the bottom fifth of income groups pay an average of 33.9% of their income toward health care, while families in the highest-income group pay 16% of their income toward health care. The analysis finds that households in the middle three income tiers pay between 19.8% and 23.2% of their income toward health care. Here's why these numbers matter. There does not exist a universal healthcare model that increases taxes by 33.9%, or 23.2%, or even 18.7%. It simply does not exist. Even if income taxes dramatically increase from 24% to 34%, that is still a net savings of 8.7%-23.9% on overall take home pay. University of California, Berkeley professors of economics Emmanuel Saez and Gabriel Zucman : Take the case of a secretary earning $50,000 in wage and currently contributing $15,000 through her employer to an insurance company. With universal health insurance, her wage would rise to $65,000 - her full labor compensation. With an income tax of 6% - which, if applied to a base large enough, would be enough to fund universal health insurance - she would have to pay about $4,000 more in tax. But the net gain would be enormous: $11,000. Instead of taking home $50,000, the secretary would take home $61,000. And moreover, this new model would ensure she pays no more deductibles, co-pays, or additional out of pocket costs. Why? Because the universal healthcare model is designed to maximize access to healthcare, not maximize profits for billion dollar corporations. Myth 5: Universal Healthcare Causes Long Wait Lines Fact: For primary physician appointments, Americans already wait longer under our exploitative for profit model than do people in nations with universal healthcare. Frankly, I marvel at this allegation as I reflect over the fact that it took us more than two years to get our daughter the critical life saving medication she needed, only because our exploitative for profit health insurance company refused to accept our doctor's medical instruction. In reality, wait times in the United States are shorter only for elective surgery, but for primary care or for critical care, . | | ---|---|--- Moreover, think about how illogical the claim is that universal healthcare results in wait times that hurt our health. If that were true, why does every developed nation have a higher life expectancy than does the United States? Why do each of them have lower maternal mortality than does the United States? Why do each of them have lower infant mortality than does the United States? Why why do none of them have medical bankruptcy, while we have 500,000 annually? None of this is by accident. It is due to the obvious fact that when healthcare access is dependent on ensuring people are healthy, rather than on seeing people as piggy banks, healthcare is administered faster. | | ---|---|--- And for those who claim that universal healthcare is economically unsustainable, and point to the struggles of the British National Health System (NHS), I remind them that any system that is not properly funded will collapse. A recent detailed analysis by the New England Journal of Medicine reports that the main reason why the NHS is struggling has nothing to do with access or quality of care, but instead , "The primary contributor is long-term underinvestment in health services. " Again, this is not accident, but a choice by right wing politicians. Right wing politicians in the UK are working hard to convince the British public that America's for profit model is the promised land in healthcare access. Our neighbors across the pond should know they're being sold rubbish (as I'm told they say over yonder) and not to believe a word of such corporate funded propaganda. Bonus Myth: Why Should I Pay For Other People's Healthcare? Fact: How do you think health insurance works? Once you figure that out, you'll realize that you're already paying for other people's healthcare, as they are paying for yours. You'll also realize that having a larger pool of money from which to cover costs for everyone actually saves you money. And finally, you'll realize that because more than 75 million Americans are uninsured or underinsured, every time they can't pay a bill, for profit insurance companies raise your rates to make up the difference. So when people don't have healthcare, it costs you. Therefore, even if all you care about is yourself, you should want everyone to have healthcare because it will lower your costs as well. Conclusion As I , "If the killing of the UnitedHealth CEO has taught us one thing, its that we're maybe not as divided as we think. When 90% of people empathize with the people the CEO exploited more than with the CEO, it should tell our politicians something. Stop bowing to billionaires & actually work for the people." The facts are clear. Universal healthcare costs less, renders the same high quality care, will save at least 68,000 lives annually, prevents 500,000 medical bankruptcies, ignites job creation, increases life expectancy, decreases infant and maternal mortality, and eliminates for profit health insurance lobbying, which is a major source of exploitative lobbying to America's politicians. Literally the only people who believe we need to spend hundreds of billions on administrative costs are insurance executives who need that money for their precious private jets and yachts. I think I can speak for at least 99% Americans when I say, America will be better off with more healthcare access and few private jets for billionaires. Despite how divided we seem as a nation, Republicans and Democrats alike are united in the need for healthcare as a human right, and we should remember that next time wealthy elites try to position us against one another. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, become a free or paid subscriber.** P.S. If I missed a myth, share it in the comments and I'll consider a future part two piece diving into those. You 're currently a free subscriber to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid. When possible, I hope you'll upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest

Defense Trust.

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust,

body:
Virginia's governor seat is a MUST-FLIP |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98494657/516835329/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX19_20241210_Winsome_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055485&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTY3YTE5My00MmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN_iDKwUN6ynLDErXbq1miAF2L4PNwOZe4ahxK64puA=) Peter,

Lieutenant Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears, one of the leading Republican candidates in Virginia's gubernatorial race, would push an anti-abortion, anti-democracy, and anti-middle class agenda if elected.

We've endorsed pro-choice champion **Abigail Spanberger** to be the next governor of Virginia, and we know Rep. Spanberger can defeat LG Earle-Sears. [**Before I tell you more about Earle-Sears' extreme record, will you donate now to ensure we stop Republicans' radical agendas in their tracks?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98494658/516835330/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX19_20241210_Winsome_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055485&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTY3YTE5My00MmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN_iDKwUN6ynLDErXbq1miAF2L4PNwOZe4ahxK64puA=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98494659/516835331/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX19_20241210_Winsome_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055485&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTY3YTE5My00MmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN_iDKwUN6ynLDErXbq1miAF2L4PNwOZe4ahxK64puA=)
---
Here's where Winsome Earle-Sears stands:
* She is a longtime opponent of LGBTQ+ rights, previously running on her proud _opposition to marriage equality_.

* She has _supported extreme abortion bans_ that would ban the procedure before many people even know they are pregnant.

* She supports _stripping funding from public schools_.

**Virginia's governorship is a must-flip office.** We can't let the state's radical GOP extremists get away with their plan to roll back reproductive rights, restrict public education, and threaten our democracy.

clean_body: Virginia's governor seat is a MUST-FLIP | = Peter, Lieutenant Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears, one of the leading Republican candidates in Virginia's gubernatorial race, would push an anti-abortion, anti-democracy, and anti-middle class agenda if elected. We've endorsed pro-choice champion Abigail Spanberger to be the next governor of Virginia, and we know Rep. Spanberger can defeat LG Earle-Sears. = | = Here's where Winsome Earle-Sears stands: She is a longtime opponent of LGBTQ+ rights, previously running on her proud opposition to marriage equality. She has supported extreme abortion bans that would ban the procedure before many people even know they are pregnant. She supports stripping funding from public schools. Virginia's governorship is a must-flip office.** We can't let the state's radical GOP extremists get away with their plan to roll back reproductive rights, restrict public education, and threaten our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. With a Republican trifecta in Washington, we must fight like never before.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=ou67qTHiotSCNHUBlxFHKQZbOi3nBqcgXs6%2BH5KuFtB%2Bvl7%2F2av3bRhkTjmnQ4ZtBTWpLeIRXYaY8xkkpQyzSPLeG%2B0IMH4fJvoa9ZjM%2BYstYEzk5FND61ZNl0Fjx6KUmHxF9M7hG%2FAzHpRMvRLYtoDSPonx0PpKOkm3VB0AoG9uXHvYUordgqoDYLp1o4ZvlIPBrVVU3H733ZG6NQo5ZytWSuWzTVTTsF3VIPP1zMpMqw59hmclVQ4%2Bc7t0Ab7VTrkBI5BNXMOkuP8dFHbdLynA5XpoMDiwTybamqn8LKHSJ4vtWTKR%2Bi9yUVnf740o1UBP4KqGUXM6cx03SR3HcHPibmm16VjIrCDFRTgFvSj1sl5KHxBnqev8KCQ3AfNhOiWoenbI0BzqjDC59pvmlFw0ECM4eTAP4aMszCkR%2Bsg%3D)

Saludos, Gabe here. Our fight to protect our democracy has never been more important, and it’s going to start right here in New Mexico. With a Republican trifecta in Washington, we must fight like never before to defend our basic rights and freedoms. That’s why I voted to protect Social Security last week. Time and time again, Republicans have made it clear that Social Security is on the chopping block under president-elect Donald Trump. And I refuse to let any New Mexican be left behind by MAGA extremist leadership. That’s why we need to fight to protect our seniors. [My team and I are circulating a brand new petition to demand Republicans protect Social Security. We need at least 7,000 signatures before midnight tonight. Will you stand with me today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98494835/516835883/1553810784?source=SBD_GV_EM_EN_121024_1_1_SOCIALSECURITY_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODQyOWZhMS00M2I3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNOZaWlaZoamc-CQU7aakAh__Xw-4puxK99rfpYfr_w=&emci=be8c159b-43b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=58429fa1-43b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4482565) | | [SIGN ON TODAY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98494838/516835886/1553810784?source=SBD_GV_EM_EN_121024_1_1_SOCIALSECURITY_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODQyOWZhMS00M2I3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNOZaWlaZoamc-CQU7aakAh__Xw-4puxK99rfpYfr_w=&emci=be8c159b-43b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=58429fa1-43b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4482565)

Our seniors deserve to receive their full, fair and hard-earned benefits.
I ran for Congress in 2021 to fight for EVERY single New Mexican. And in 2024, that hasn’t changed. I’m fighting to protect every single one of our freedoms and rights, and that’s why I’m demanding Republicans protect Social Security as we gear up for another presidency under MAGA extremist Donald Trump.
