name: AOC
subject: A question I got after the election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Here’s a question I got after the election:
Very few. Almost none.
I think people need to reckon with the fact that the Supreme Court ruled that a president can commit crimes in office. Just straight up.
So: **we have each other**. And we will work really hard to throw as much sand in gears as possible.
But it’s important to understand how serious this situation is, and how important it is for us to care for each other, be positive with each other, be generous with each other, and not turn on each other.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241210.1Zj_ng&refcode=em20241210-7730-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7730%2E2526796%2Eqb_fp4)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241210.1Zj_ng&refcode=em20241210-7730-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7730%2E2526796%2Eqb_fp4)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241210?refcode=em20241210-7730-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=21&refcode2=7730_2526796_qb_fp4&akid=7730%2E2526796%2Eqb_fp4)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241210-7730-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&akid=7730%2E2526796%2Eqb_fp4)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This email breaks a lot of the rules
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3aa6994de0ec443ebbd319e62f39ebfd&_e=NBIRnuz_ZmRc6H9nxSwaTAVytTl7Tyqx3dgZt5gGq9emW1lAOTJi8eFhYLJQeokO9fzK0tZHDLdy7XaGjjcoRQ4BPrA-a9tjICy5PsFrHS_ttyYEr2iU65Qf8e1RERqGJY9naNQttolNaRGNTlLjrF2brXQIo4RC8Z3QJ6UVh6LGILh0m3vivKDVbbZNp61dFRw3Vlpt9APndB7C9BxDmLOIsoboqbkt3IrxwXfaiEnOTND8bQIKq3D8Ku4gbP4M6-KZIYmCaJYWHmoc_EZmgEp6ty4c3UpG5OhdiR0WUNN2u8_a5aizfoeFJXOS8Ew4x9yiYXIbMYPN3W5cpKIDryw7nTBkqI-zxokA_cm6nosVphZaLLmHMGZFy2pVT13R9K5-GEoYtaObkP3Nt-rfl4CIqS5Xqn7uNXpc3qxOdIc%3D)

Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Peter,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3aa6994de0ec443ebbd319e62f39ebfd&_e=NBIRnuz_ZmRc6H9nxSwaTAVytTl7Tyqx3dgZt5gGq9emW1lAOTJi8eFhYLJQeokO9fzK0tZHDLdy7XaGjjcoRQ4BPrA-a9tjICy5PsFrHS_ttyYEr2iU65Qf8e1RERqGJY9naNQttolNaRGNTlLjrF2brXQIo4RC8Z3QJ6UVh6LGILh0m3vivKDVbbZNp61dFRw3Vlpt9APndB7C9BxDmLOIsoboqbkt3IrxwXfaiEnOTND8bQIKq3D8Ku4gbP4MjhZlzRYnpZ_Ls9dk6Ov9qsC36OzVLpDW5K2W01z8uzq6J6vt0Na7DmRKKgxS9WCoSEuwSliIk_iTyleN7a20-5BwI5vtT85BqLItYqgkMrjQyH6_AQ0hHzxoJPMhwSLldM6ltqxPFx8qlKVbn72j1W-4EQK9M5yyr9jKLjVNXwj2lp1B7Hc6Q6cTQ6sSAnYD)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.

**Defending Parental Rights**
While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3aa6994de0ec443ebbd319e62f39ebfd&_e=NBIRnuz_ZmRc6H9nxSwaTAVytTl7Tyqx3dgZt5gGq9emW1lAOTJi8eFhYLJQeokO9fzK0tZHDLdy7XaGjjcoRQ4BPrA-a9tjICy5PsFrHS_ttyYEr2iU65Qf8e1RERqGJY9naNQttolNaRGNTlLjrF2brXQIo4RC8Z3QJ6UVh6LGILh0m3vivKDVbbZNp61dFRw3Vlpt9APndB7C9BxDmLOIsoboqbkt3IrxwXfaiEnOTND8bQIKq3D8Ku4gbP4MJ3WQa6wqJnuAXBuHJy6NJjn9vDvAIYKeUw5CxagFSvwuTXsGGtS6HmZlAulC4hQev-lPmz_HSzTNjcxzzM8EDWNaBty7bdY1LN7-tC5TBscA81YRf8NmRdT4nwq4TsKD-6-YYcZxp8fIV2z78B0b5j8PIMmrNPKimxXNBx7VaD4xmxIt8gMZPT9wo-ndhCI3)

**School Choice**
Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality.

**Defeating DEI**
Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities.

It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process.

Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple:

Public universities will be **explicitly prohibited** from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs.

In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools.

clean_body: Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Peter, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, Peter. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn't have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don't have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. |

name: Jeremy Shaffer
subject: Thank you + Upcoming Events
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jeremy Shaffer
body:
| | | | |
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/073cb06bb6e7/im-running-and-i-need-your-support-12721468?e=8c80cba7e7)
---
[](https://voteshaffer.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5a4998b6ce4b01517c474232e&id=d304ba6365&e=8c80cba7e7)
| | | | | Dear ,
Thank you, thank you, thank you for all of your tremendous support during the past several months. The financial donations, volunteer efforts, and our positive strategy in the campaign led to a 14%+ margin of victory -- officially 57.02% (23,213) to 42.98% (17,499). This was despite being outspent by ~$730,000 to ~$290,000 (a 2.5 to 1 ratio)! In order to achieve this result we needed to have sufficient resources to get our core message out to voters and you as donors and volunteers stepped up to enable that. It never feels good being subjected to endless barrages of negative attacks, but your support helped fend those off. I am so grateful for every individual’s contribution. Together we were able to win this critical State House seat!

---
[](https://voteshaffer.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5a4998b6ce4b01517c474232e&id=3a524fa516&e=8c80cba7e7)
| Now that the election is over, I am looking forward to pushing for our agenda in the State House. Pennsylvania will once again have a divided government with a Democrat Governor and Republican State Senate. By the absolute slimmest of margins (102 Democrats to 101 Republicans) the State House will be in Democrat control. I will be working hard to find areas that I can work issue by issue to find ways to improve our state and bills that can pass and be signed in this divided government.
**Some Upcoming Events:**
* Pine GOP Election Celebration and Christmas Party (Wed. Dec 11th 6:30PM-8:30PM): Join myself and other area Republicans at the Pine Community Center to celebrate the election results and Christmas (more info below)
* New Years/Thank You Reception: We are working on the details for a local thank you/swearing in/New Years party in January. We hope to see you there ... stay tuned for more information!
* Inauguration Day – January 7th: I will be officially sworn in as a State Representative on January 7th in Harrisburg. If you are near Harrisburg or interested in attending please let me know. We will have a small reception after the swearing in.

---
| **Election and Christmas Celebration Party hosted by Pine GOP!**
---
[](https://voteshaffer.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5a4998b6ce4b01517c474232e&id=0c8e74a02f&e=8c80cba7e7)
| Join Stacey and I at the Election and Christmas Celebration Party this Wednesday from 6:30PM-8:30PM at the Pine Community Center. Thank you to the Pine GOP and all our Republican Committees for the hard work that you have done this year. You don’t have to be from Pine to come join us!
---
| **Official Email List and Newsletter**
Now that I am a State Rep-Elect I have an official state website and email list (different from this personal/political one). If you would like to join that email list (which will have different content) please go to [https://www.repshafferpa.com/](https://voteshaffer.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5a4998b6ce4b01517c474232e&id=395ce14599&e=8c80cba7e7) to sign up and see other information.
---
| With Gratitude,
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://voteshaffer.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5a4998b6ce4b01517c474232e&id=18c3b2d328&e=8c80cba7e7)
---
| Jeremy ShafferRepresentative-elect

We will have a small reception after the swearing in. | Election and Christmas Celebration Party hosted by Pine GOP! | Join Stacey and I at the Election and Christmas Celebration Party this Wednesday from 6:30PM-8:30PM at the Pine Community Center. Thank you to the Pine GOP and all our Republican Committees for the hard work that you have done this year. You don’t have to be from Pine to come join us! | Official Email List and Newsletter** Now that I am a State Rep-Elect I have an official state website and email list (different from this personal/political one). If you would like to join that email list (which will have different content) please go to to sign up and see other information. | With Gratitude, | | | | | | | | | | | Jeremy ShafferRepresentative-elect | | | | | | | | | mailto:Shaffer4PA@gmail.com | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Friends of Jeremy Shaffer. All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you are a valued supporter of Jeremy Shaffer. Paid for by Friends of Jeremy Shaffer P.O. Box 391 ● Gibsonia, PA 15044 ● (412) 837-9565 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Unqualified cabinet nominees, Project 2025, & mass deportations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
No matter what happens, we’re not giving up the fight, Peter.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241210-1&t=1&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)
Have you been following the Trump news, Peter?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241210-1?refcode=em20241210-1515&amount=5&refcode2=1515_587540_MCtjoO&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241210-1?refcode=em20241210-1515&amount=5&refcode2=1515_587540_MCtjoO&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241210-1?refcode=em20241210-1515&amount=5&refcode2=1515_587540_MCtjoO&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241210-1?refcode=em20241210-1515&amount=5&refcode2=1515_587540_MCtjoO&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241210-1?refcode=em20241210-1515&amount=5&refcode2=1515_587540_MCtjoO&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)
If these reports are any indication, we’re going to be in for a long four years. **There is no sugarcoating it – things are going to get _bad._**
From promises to pardon the January 6th insurrectionists on Day One to incompetent cabinet nominees to openly embracing Project 2025, threats of tariffs that will make everything more expensive, and plans for mass deportations — this is just a preview of what we’re going to be up against in less than 50 days.
The recent headlines are alarming to say the least, but we aren’t going to let the GOP intimidate us into giving up our fight. **There’s simply too much at stake for us to remain sitting on the sidelines.**
This year, we helped to elect 6 young bold progressives who will help to lead the fight against the Trump administration’s regressive agenda.
While we prepare to fight back against the worst of what Trump has to offer in his second term, we’re doubling down on our mission of electing the young leaders of tomorrow to continue building the progressive future we all want to see.
From addressing climate change to building a future free of gun violence, we refuse to be distracted by MAGA culture wars and fearmongering.
But we need your help if we’re going to remain at the forefront of confronting the MAGA agenda head on.
**[Peter, can you donate $5 today to help us elect the leaders of tomorrow?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241210-1?refcode=em20241210-1515&amount=5&refcode2=1515_587540_MCtjoO&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241210-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241210-1515&refcode2=1515_587540_MCtjoO&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)**
Thank you for your support!!
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241210-1&t=2&refcode2=1515_587540_MCtjoO&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1515%2E587540%2EMCtjoO)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan just revealed his next sinister plan
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
We’ve had a few weeks to regroup, reflect, and strategize about the path ahead and if we’ve learned anything, it’s this:
Donald Trump, Jim Jordan and their ULTRA-MAGA cronies are gearing up for years of chaos, scandal, and distraction – and they’re already off to the races.
Jordan just announced his plans to continue abusing his position as Judiciary Chair and “investigate the investigators.”
A graphic featuring a sinister black and white photo of Jim Jordan surrounded by reporters as he is scowling with a headline from Spectrum News 1, which reads: “Judiciary Chair Jim Jordan wants to investigate the investigators next.” and mentions plans for him to investigate special counsel involved in investigating Donald Trump and Hunter Biden. [A graphic featuring a sinister black and white photo of Jim Jordan surrounded by reporters as he is scowling with a headline from Spectrum News 1, which reads: “Judiciary Chair Jim Jordan wants to investigate the investigators next.” and mentions plans for him to investigate special counsel involved in investigating Donald Trump and Hunter Biden.]
He’s got his sights set on Special Counsel Jack Smith, the guy who actually dared to hold Trump accountable, and – because his obsession never dies – Hunter Biden.
Does this help you pay your bills? Lower the cost of prescriptions? Fix crumbling roads or bring jobs to our district?
Of course not.
The bottom line is that Jim Jordan’s only priority is targeting Trump’s political enemies – not helping American families.
You guys know me, I never stop!
We’re almost ready to roll out the full offensive plan our movement has been building to take on Jim Jordan and everyone like him in Trump’s orbit, but we need your help to make it happen. Every dollar we raise will go toward launching our efforts before Inauguration Day. Our fight to save America continues. We need you now more than ever. Will you chip in $10, $25, or more now to hold ULTRA-MAGA accountable? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241210_jordan_investigations_link1]
As we’ve seen for the last 17 years, Jordan doesn’t care about you, me or anyone else in Ohio.
He works for Trump, period.
Let me be clear: we are not resigning ourselves to defeat.
That’s exactly what they want. ULTRA-MAGA forces are hoping we’ll throw up our hands, give up, and let them run wild.
But you know me – I’m a fighter.
When they try to knock us down, I stand up stronger. When they try to silence us, I speak louder.
They think they can wear us down, but they don’t realize how resilient, relentless, and unshakable we can be.
What we built together was always bigger than one campaign. It’s a movement that will take on Jim Jordan and the incoming clown show administration outside of a traditional campaign format.
We’ll have the freedom to show up where it matters most, amplify the voices of those they ignore, and strike back with bold strategies that expose their failures and lies.
Together, we’re going to show them that strong women and everyday people can and will rise to the challenge.
In the next few weeks we will be rolling out the full next phase of our plan to hold Jim Jordan and others accountable as we prepare for the fight ahead. Your contributions during this transitional phase are key to our success. Will you chip in $25 or more today to fuel this work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241210_jordan_investigations_link2]
This is our moment to dig in, fight harder, and build a future they can’t tear apart.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

name: Our Revolution
subject: What Luigi Mangione means for Our Revolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20636?t=1014?refcode=email-20241210&akid=7373%2E5885482%2ErStpuh ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Luigi Mangione’s violent act reflects the rage that has been boiling just
under the surface for a long time — working people have long felt the
excruciating effects of a healthcare system designed to let us suffer and
die for profit.

We want to be unequivocal: we condemn the murder of UnitedHealth Group’s
CEO. Violence is never the answer.

But we can’t ignore that this rage is rooted in reality, and we’ve all
felt it. Half a million families go bankrupt each year from medical debt,
and millions are harmed because their care is delayed or denied.

Our Revolution and our founder Bernie Sanders understand the cruel
depravity of this system. Our work has put this fight at the forefront,
and we know we must channel righteous anger into political action, not
lawlessness.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20635?t=1011&akid=7373%2E5885482%2ErStpuh ]We are at a crossroads. The anger erupting right now must become a
turning point, a catalyst for systemic change. With Bernie leading the
charge, our movement can turn our pain into progress. We will fight until
every American has the care they need — free from the stranglehold of
greedy, corporate profit-seekers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20635?t=1012&akid=7373%2E5885482%2ErStpuh ]DONATE NOW

The Oligarchs driving this system, backed by Donald Trump, have one goal:
to maximize profit at any cost. Their vision for healthcare — and every
other industry — comes at the expense of our dignity, our security, and
often, our lives.

This fight needs you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20635?t=1013&akid=7373%2E5885482%2ErStpuh ]Donate today to make sure our movement never surrenders. Let’s show the
ruling class that their days of plundering our lives for profit are
numbered. Together, we’ll build a system that puts people first.

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

| | Congressman Russell Fry, South Carolina’s Seventh Congressional District Congressman, is honored and humbled to represent the Pee Dee and Grand Strand areas in Washington, D.C. Russell Fry is the successful product of the American Dream. He learned from his parents that there is no such thing as a free lunch and that success comes from hard work and determination. Russell self-funded his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina and then earned his law degree at the Charleston School of Law. In law school, he served as Student Bar Association president, helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation, and received the prestigious Civility Award. For over a decade, he practiced law all along the Grand Strand. Russell has always been a public servant and an advocate for the conservative movement. Prior to his election to U.S. Congress, Russell Fry represented Horry County in the South Carolina General Assembly. As Chief Majority Whip in the State House, he fought to lower taxes, defend the unborn, and safeguard the 2nd Amendment. Additionally, Russell fought to put 18 policy initiatives into law in his time as Chairman of the SC House Opioid Abuse Prevention Study Committee. This legislation provided funding for education on opioids, opioid prevention, and opioid treatment. Russell and his wife, Bronwen, have one son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their beloved chocolate lab, Jasper.

clean_body: Once again, the government’s incompetence benefits the Democrats. | | | | | | Peter, Last week, SC-07 Rep. Russell Fry**GRILLED Joe Biden’s Census Director for miscounts that | | | | | | | | | | | By allowing illegal migrants living in sanctuary cities to be counted in the national census, the government’s errors disproportionately awarded blue states like New York with extra electoral votes. While leaving red states like Texas with fewer electoral votes than they should have had. | | | | | Peter, have you noticed that these lapses in judgment by Biden Administration officials almost ALWAYS benefit the Democrats politically? You can’t blame the American people for being FED UP with this rogue regime when it’s constantly and egregiously showcasing its corruption. And while many politicians in DC are opting to look the other way instead of fighting back, Russell Fry is more interested in tackling the SWAMP’s malfeasance head-on. But Russell needs**YOURsupport to finish this fight fortransparencyandjusticeonce Republicans takesupermajoritypower in Washington this coming January. | | | | | | | | Thank you for supporting the good fight for America’s future. Best, Team Fry | | | | | | | | | Congressman Russell Fry, South Carolina’s Seventh Congressional District Congressman, is honored and humbled to represent the Pee Dee and Grand Strand areas in Washington, D.C. Russell Fry is the successful product of the American Dream. He learned from his parents that there is no such thing as a free lunch and that success comes from hard work and determination. Russell self-funded his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina and then earned his law degree at the Charleston School of Law. In law school, he served as Student Bar Association president, helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation, and received the prestigious Civility Award. For over a decade, he practiced law all along the Grand Strand. Russell has always been a public servant and an advocate for the conservative movement. Prior to his election to U.S. Congress, Russell Fry represented Horry County in the South Carolina General Assembly. As Chief Majority Whip in the State House, he fought to lower taxes, defend the unborn, and safeguard the 2nd Amendment. Additionally, Russell fought to put 18 policy initiatives into law in his time as Chairman of the SC House Opioid Abuse Prevention Study Committee. This legislation provided funding for education on opioids, opioid prevention, and opioid treatment. Russell and his wife, Bronwen, have one son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their beloved chocolate lab, Jasper. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ Russell Fry for Congress PO Box 14641 Surfside Beach, SC 29587 | | | | * | | | | | | |

name: David Horowitz
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=13195acb977046d8a847a43a37e7c80b&_e=6slFVHkTvKLCm2e8mN2ZnsunQ2UbzHWpDWeQPLmF3gD2gnzbRK21L4B4hJTH1q_LwSIdpsX4Mnc3pwjc9AneMzSBad-IL4zc6KX7Pjo7ndm2oeUY-Zw8Z9_u6e3hMQF6XQ53a6oOyw3palR6FgkEflqFtxqn_6o-AccZwOAkIsT6XQ9gZpnIBIsSDh_SQfx4A1REm5kUAZdoGn7UXnYCrrJe7IhOsUCos-y6sbke0PPozP9vpskvV_BAMfP93ZsGucwhkqWWOqouhu0Vz05V7R30IC1hN6-G4n_OyGe7wvRbc065Gx94ml_INXqmIwkjkAyDo37_QQ03_JhwpJWVySglVZQ8Ly3ciXWx1xPz_eHINPx4nRBjmeqOlKpeapZvZBfadsPSg1QsPexIxJs6ag%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=13195acb977046d8a847a43a37e7c80b&_e=6slFVHkTvKLCm2e8mN2ZnsunQ2UbzHWpDWeQPLmF3gD2gnzbRK21L4B4hJTH1q_LwSIdpsX4Mnc3pwjc9AneMzSBad-IL4zc6KX7Pjo7ndm2oeUY-Zw8Z9_u6e3hMQF6XQ53a6oOyw3palR6FgkEflqFtxqn_6o-AccZwOAkIsT6XQ9gZpnIBIsSDh_SQfx4A1REm5kUAZdoGn7UXnYCrrJe7IhOsUCos-y6sbke0PPozP9vpskvV_BAMfP93ZsGNK5vdZgfF6rCvk-7EKRg1JqsQKVy4FSGhujs8OPHCiWvKLg6gPvWSgc6qrsDlZNbyNCfmOEEVCSrW0qY2KMXlMqjtZOvo0OeJTsHc76vWMuyufpgMdnPQ2cTKrzUISfi5jrtWAOsbkV2Rb4GgmvwOA%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=13195acb977046d8a847a43a37e7c80b&_e=6slFVHkTvKLCm2e8mN2ZnsunQ2UbzHWpDWeQPLmF3gD2gnzbRK21L4B4hJTH1q_LwSIdpsX4Mnc3pwjc9AneMzSBad-IL4zc6KX7Pjo7ndm2oeUY-Zw8Z9_u6e3hMQF6XQ53a6oOyw3palR6FgkEflqFtxqn_6o-AccZwOAkIsT6XQ9gZpnIBIsSDh_SQfx4A1REm5kUAZdoGn7UXnYCrrJe7IhOsUCos-y6sbke0PPozP9vpskvV_BAMfP93ZsGsEXtmc5lkfaku6Mm6A3GfR3Rvi8LfNpDXsJwAgpL2Zin1zo4Z2ROual0AO9AY5GymGfkzRGstYJgWwkfgYNoLWJccB6iyDvYGCwXN2tU7DLni3GKjR4xv6CCH-VYTBuINMxRr-RjjgNj0tQ9pUbnWw%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=13195acb977046d8a847a43a37e7c80b&_e=6slFVHkTvKLCm2e8mN2ZnsunQ2UbzHWpDWeQPLmF3gD2gnzbRK21L4B4hJTH1q_LwSIdpsX4Mnc3pwjc9AneMzSBad-IL4zc6KX7Pjo7ndm2oeUY-Zw8Z9_u6e3hMQF6XQ53a6oOyw3palR6FgkEflqFtxqn_6o-AccZwOAkIsT6XQ9gZpnIBIsSDh_SQfx4A1REm5kUAZdoGn7UXnYCrrJe7IhOsUCos-y6sbke0PPozP9vpskvV_BAMfP93ZsGEWhXZe8DMcjVIONGBi-GJ4Cko1BjzwR_jmiwJaPlm9VZ1GHW2z7huDoLKMOQqqN5Gt40b8jIU_65r32RY3aVWSjH6A4-S4s0udvpmYTYh51-y2bWqIr1Co4cSjv0ZveC9lMYBXemukDeekCiT10Qzw%3D%3D)
---

Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499

clean_body: Healthcare | Peter, Unfortunately, Trump has recently confirmed that repealing the Affordable Care Act is one of his top priorities when he takes office. But what’s his plan to replace it? After nearly a decade in politics, he still only has vague 'concepts of a plan.' For more than 400,000 Pennsylvanians , the Affordable Care Act isn’t just a talking point — it’s a lifeline. Repealing it would strip away critical protections for people with pre-existing conditions, cause premiums to skyrocket, and put lives at risk. We’ve seen this playbook before: tear down what’s working, make empty promises to replace it, and leave working families to pick up the pieces. Pennsylvania cannot afford to go backward. = As your Lieutenant Governor, I’ve fought to ensure that every Pennsylvanian has access to affordable healthcare. I understand what’s at stake for families across our Commonwealth. That’s why I’m working to build a firewall of Democratic leadership — here in Pennsylvania and across the nation — to protect the progress we’ve made and fight for the healthcare people rely on. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Healthcare isn’t a privilege — it’s a right. And while others want to play politics with people’s lives, I’m committed to defending the programs that provide care to those who need it most. \- Austin Davis Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF AUSTIN DAVIS = Emails like this are the most effective way to grow our campaign and reach supporters like you. name: Seth Moulton
subject: This election should have been a slam dunk for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
Sometimes we need to be willing to say the quiet part out loud even when the truth is uncomfortable: This election should have been a slam dunk for Democrats.

Yet, when I said that the party needed to stop looking down its nose at the very voters we lost across every corner of the country, and be willing to have open conversations about tough issues like the economy, the border, and divisive cultural issues, some in our party got very angry.

The chair of the local Democratic Party called me a Nazi cooperator. The head of the Political Science Department of a major Boston university said that my office was no longer welcome to contact them. And a primary challenger has already registered to run against me.

And all of this despite an overwhelming number of national voices echoing my concerns, not to mention the hundreds of calls and texts I’ve received from voters who said themselves, “I agree with you Seth, but it feels like I’m not allowed to say that out loud.”

It’s starting to feel like some Democrats just don’t want to win. Well, I do. And if you agree, I need your help.

If you’re with me, please consider making an early contribution to my re-election campaign. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

Make no mistake: if we aren’t willing to have difficult conversations as a party and if we continue to push out any voter that doesn’t adhere to the extreme left’s self-defined purity tests, we will continue to lose elections. And, as a result, the vulnerable people whose rights you and I want to protect are the people who will be hurt the most.

As a Marine, I learned about the power of the wisdom that emerges from a group of people with different opinions and experiences. I also learned to be a fighter. I will continue to fight for the individual freedoms of every American. But in order to do that we need to start by winning elections.

Join me today.

Seth

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

---

News Nation host Dan Abrams _**[CLASHED with radical Black Lives Matter activist](https://substack.com/redirect/fe32ce06-2a1d-498c-a5f9-d108aca8ffc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and co-founder Chivona Newsome over the Daniel Penny trial verdict.
"The ultimate question is; 'why did the jury acquit?' is it because they are racist?" Abrams asked.
The BLM activist's answer _**[is unbelievable...](https://substack.com/redirect/fe32ce06-2a1d-498c-a5f9-d108aca8ffc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fe32ce06-2a1d-498c-a5f9-d108aca8ffc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
BLM activists are vocalizing strong discontent with Penny being allowed to walk free after he accidentally killed a black man on the subway who was threatening passengers using a chokehold.
"We need some black vigilantes!!" _**[BLM leader Hawk Newsome said](https://substack.com/redirect/61245378-4274-483e-9c82-32ed1bd7c7f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ to a crowd of protesters outside the trial courthouse following the verdict. "People want to jump up and choke us and kill us for being loud?! How about we do the same!"
Penny, a former Marine, told Fox News that he has "no regrets." "The guilt I would have felt if someone did get hurt, if he did what he was threatening to do, I would never be able to live with myself," _**[he told Fox's Jeanine Pirro. ](https://substack.com/redirect/38d0007b-8ee0-46fb-a1f3-eeea544a64c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fe32ce06-2a1d-498c-a5f9-d108aca8ffc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

#### Hello Again!
PolitiBrawl is on Substack!
We tried to publish on social media but Big Tech has **censored us, shadow-banned us and demonetized us**. If you're receiving this email, you probably followed us on Facebook or Youtube.
So we are pleased to announce that our new home will be Substack! Where we can publish content and our audience will be able to see it. The team at Substack is committed to a free press and free speech and we are proud to be a part of their crusade!
As a member of our loyal audience we look forward to bringing you what you love, news, politics, commentary and most of all... DEBATES!
We make content you want to see and we **KNOW** that you're not seeing it on the woke social media platforms.
Because our subscribers are telling us!
**Do any of these sound familiar?**
> _" I was subscribed to you and I haven't seen any posts from you in a while"_
> _" Just thought you'd like to know that YouTube is unsubbing people without their permission from your channel. At least one."_
> _" I am SOMEHOW no longer subscribed."_
> _" I don't know how, or why, or who, or what made Youtube make me unsub to you, but considering the censorship they practice particularly towards a single party of American politics, I'm not altogether surprised."_
**That's why we are here on Substack.**
If you were a subscriber on Facebook or know us from YouTube, hello again! We've tried to make it as easy as possible for you to join us in our new home. If you're brand new to PolitiBrawl, welcome! We're a team of **upstart journalists,** committed to bring you the content and commentary that you **can 't get anywhere else. **
If you want to see what we make, not what some snowflake **will let you see,**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..UZ4f8OkGAimiHwiI16RNPwEXT7LfH1lpQjcbYs5sGiA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152936817)
If you want to see when we publish, not when some **biased algorithm will show you,**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..UZ4f8OkGAimiHwiI16RNPwEXT7LfH1lpQjcbYs5sGiA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152936817)
Our biggest asset is **you, the audience.**
We do all of this for free because it matters! We just want to be able to publish content and for our audience to be able to see it.
We know times are tough and getting tougher but if you really want to help us, become a**paid subscriber.** We're not interested in getting rich by bankrupting our subscribers, and we know you worry about your money which is why we only charge **$5/month or $50/year.
**
If you can't do any of that, then you can help us out for free by sharing what we make with a friend you know would enjoy it!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=152936817&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTM2ODE3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzM4NzU3MjIsImV4cCI6MTczNjQ2NzcyMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MYC1eGUuv9esmJuWUufki3I7_TU_H4idp1CKJjGAhdw)
**We want to hear from you!**
We learned how badly we were being suppressed because our viewers told us! So if you have a problem, if something is being weird **let us know!** We do our best to stay on top of everything, but things can go wrong. So if you see something that seems wrong, let us know in the comments and we can fix it because we actually read **every single one.**
**Stay up-to-date**
Never miss an update--every new video is sent directly to your email inbox so you can watch it **when it suits you.** We'd also recommend downloading the Substack app - it's the best way to watch videos here on Substack.
